24// ImPlot v0.18 WIP
25
26/*
27
28API BREAKING CHANGES
29====================
30Occasionally introducing changes that are breaking the API. We try to make the breakage minor and easy to fix.
31Below is a change-log of API breaking changes only. If you are using one of the functions listed, expect to have to fix some code.
32When you are not sure about a old symbol or function name, try using the Search/Find function of your IDE to look for comments or references in all implot files.
33You can read releases logs https://github.com/epezent/implot/releases for more details.
34
35- 2023/08/20 (0.17) - ImPlotFlags_NoChild was removed as child windows are no longer needed to capture scroll. You can safely remove this flag if you were using it.
36- 2023/06/26 (0.15) - Various build fixes related to updates in Dear ImGui internals.
37- 2022/11/25 (0.15) - Make PlotText honor ImPlotItemFlags_NoFit.
38- 2022/06/19 (0.14) - The signature of ColormapScale has changed to accommodate a new ImPlotColormapScaleFlags parameter
39- 2022/06/17 (0.14) - **IMPORTANT** All PlotX functions now take an ImPlotX_Flags `flags` parameter. Where applicable, it is located before the existing `offset` and `stride` parameters.
40 If you were providing offset and stride values, you will need to update your function call to include a `flags` value. If you fail to do this, you will likely see
41 unexpected results or crashes without a compiler warning since these three are all default args. We apologize for the inconvenience, but this was a necessary evil.
42 - PlotBarsH has been removed; use PlotBars + ImPlotBarsFlags_Horizontal instead
43 - PlotErrorBarsH has been removed; use PlotErrorBars + ImPlotErrorBarsFlags_Horizontal
44 - PlotHistogram/PlotHistogram2D signatures changed; `cumulative`, `density`, and `outliers` options now specified via ImPlotHistogramFlags
45 - PlotPieChart signature changed; `normalize` option now specified via ImPlotPieChartFlags
46 - PlotText signature changes; `vertical` option now specified via `ImPlotTextFlags_Vertical`
47 - `PlotVLines` and `PlotHLines` replaced with `PlotInfLines` (+ ImPlotInfLinesFlags_Horizontal )
48 - arguments of ImPlotGetter have been reversed to be consistent with other API callbacks
49 - SetupAxisScale + ImPlotScale have replaced ImPlotAxisFlags_LogScale and ImPlotAxisFlags_Time flags
50 - ImPlotFormatters should now return an int indicating the size written
51 - the signature of ImPlotGetter has been reversed so that void* user_data is the last argument and consistent with other callbacks
52- 2021/10/19 (0.13) - MAJOR API OVERHAUL! See #168 and #272
53 - TRIVIAL RENAME:
54 - ImPlotLimits -> ImPlotRect
55 - ImPlotYAxis_ -> ImAxis_
56 - SetPlotYAxis -> SetAxis
57 - BeginDragDropTarget -> BeginDragDropTargetPlot
58 - BeginDragDropSource -> BeginDragDropSourcePlot
59 - ImPlotFlags_NoMousePos -> ImPlotFlags_NoMouseText
60 - SetNextPlotLimits -> SetNextAxesLimits
61 - SetMouseTextLocation -> SetupMouseText
62 - SIGNATURE MODIFIED:
63 - PixelsToPlot/PlotToPixels -> added optional X-Axis arg
64 - GetPlotMousePos -> added optional X-Axis arg
65 - GetPlotLimits -> added optional X-Axis arg
66 - GetPlotSelection -> added optional X-Axis arg
67 - DragLineX/Y/DragPoint -> now takes int id; removed labels (render with Annotation/Tag instead)
68 - REPLACED:
69 - IsPlotXAxisHovered/IsPlotXYAxisHovered -> IsAxisHovered(ImAxis)
70 - BeginDragDropTargetX/BeginDragDropTargetY -> BeginDragDropTargetAxis(ImAxis)
71 - BeginDragDropSourceX/BeginDragDropSourceY -> BeginDragDropSourceAxis(ImAxis)
72 - ImPlotCol_XAxis, ImPlotCol_YAxis1, etc. -> ImPlotCol_AxisText (push/pop this around SetupAxis to style individual axes)
73 - ImPlotCol_XAxisGrid, ImPlotCol_Y1AxisGrid -> ImPlotCol_AxisGrid (push/pop this around SetupAxis to style individual axes)
74 - SetNextPlotLimitsX/Y -> SetNextAxisLimits(ImAxis)
75 - LinkNextPlotLimits -> SetNextAxisLinks(ImAxis)
76 - FitNextPlotAxes -> SetNextAxisToFit(ImAxis)/SetNextAxesToFit
77 - SetLegendLocation -> SetupLegend
78 - ImPlotFlags_NoHighlight -> ImPlotLegendFlags_NoHighlight
79 - ImPlotOrientation -> ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal
80 - Annotate -> Annotation
81 - REMOVED:
82 - GetPlotQuery, SetPlotQuery, IsPlotQueried -> use DragRect
83 - SetNextPlotTicksX, SetNextPlotTicksY -> use SetupAxisTicks
84 - SetNextPlotFormatX, SetNextPlotFormatY -> use SetupAxisFormat
85 - AnnotateClamped -> use Annotation(bool clamp = true)
86 - OBSOLETED:
87 - BeginPlot (original signature) -> use simplified signature + Setup API
88- 2021/07/30 (0.12) - The offset argument of `PlotXG` functions was been removed. Implement offsetting in your getter callback instead.
89- 2021/03/08 (0.9) - SetColormap and PushColormap(ImVec4*) were removed. Use AddColormap for custom colormap support. LerpColormap was changed to SampleColormap.
90 ShowColormapScale was changed to ColormapScale and requires additional arguments.
91- 2021/03/07 (0.9) - The signature of ShowColormapScale was modified to accept a ImVec2 size.
92- 2021/02/28 (0.9) - BeginLegendDragDropSource was changed to BeginDragDropSourceItem with a number of other drag and drop improvements.
93- 2021/01/18 (0.9) - The default behavior for opening context menus was change from double right-click to single right-click. ImPlotInputMap and related functions were moved
94 to implot_internal.h due to its immaturity.
95- 2020/10/16 (0.8) - ImPlotStyleVar_InfoPadding was changed to ImPlotStyleVar_MousePosPadding
96- 2020/09/10 (0.8) - The single array versions of PlotLine, PlotScatter, PlotStems, and PlotShaded were given additional arguments for x-scale and x0.
97- 2020/09/07 (0.8) - Plotting functions which accept a custom getter function pointer have been post-fixed with a G (e.g. PlotLineG)
98- 2020/09/06 (0.7) - Several flags under ImPlotFlags and ImPlotAxisFlags were inverted (e.g. ImPlotFlags_Legend -> ImPlotFlags_NoLegend) so that the default flagset
99 is simply 0. This more closely matches ImGui's style and makes it easier to enable non-default but commonly used flags (e.g. ImPlotAxisFlags_Time).
100- 2020/08/28 (0.5) - ImPlotMarker_ can no longer be combined with bitwise OR, |. This features caused unnecessary slow-down, and almost no one used it.
101- 2020/08/25 (0.5) - ImPlotAxisFlags_Scientific was removed. Logarithmic axes automatically uses scientific notation.
102- 2020/08/17 (0.5) - PlotText was changed so that text is centered horizontally and vertically about the desired point.
103- 2020/08/16 (0.5) - An ImPlotContext must be explicitly created and destroyed now with `CreateContext` and `DestroyContext`. Previously, the context was statically initialized in this source file.
104- 2020/06/13 (0.4) - The flags `ImPlotAxisFlag_Adaptive` and `ImPlotFlags_Cull` were removed. Both are now done internally by default.
105- 2020/06/03 (0.3) - The signature and behavior of PlotPieChart was changed so that data with sum less than 1 can optionally be normalized. The label format can now be specified as well.
106- 2020/06/01 (0.3) - SetPalette was changed to `SetColormap` for consistency with other plotting libraries. `RestorePalette` was removed. Use `SetColormap(ImPlotColormap_Default)`.
107- 2020/05/31 (0.3) - Plot functions taking custom ImVec2* getters were removed. Use the ImPlotPoint* getter versions instead.
108- 2020/05/29 (0.3) - The signature of ImPlotLimits::Contains was changed to take two doubles instead of ImVec2
109- 2020/05/16 (0.2) - All plotting functions were reverted to being prefixed with "Plot" to maintain a consistent VerbNoun style. `Plot` was split into `PlotLine`
110 and `PlotScatter` (however, `PlotLine` can still be used to plot scatter points as `Plot` did before.). `Bar` is not `PlotBars`, to indicate
111 that multiple bars will be plotted.
112- 2020/05/13 (0.2) - `ImMarker` was change to `ImPlotMarker` and `ImAxisFlags` was changed to `ImPlotAxisFlags`.
113- 2020/05/11 (0.2) - `ImPlotFlags_Selection` was changed to `ImPlotFlags_BoxSelect`
114- 2020/05/11 (0.2) - The namespace ImGui:: was replaced with ImPlot::. As a result, the following additional changes were made:
115 - Functions that were prefixed or decorated with the word "Plot" have been truncated. E.g., `ImGui::PlotBars` is now just `ImPlot::Bar`.
116 It should be fairly obvious what was what.
117 - Some functions have been given names that would have otherwise collided with the ImGui namespace. This has been done to maintain a consistent
118 style with ImGui. E.g., 'ImGui::PushPlotStyleVar` is now 'ImPlot::PushStyleVar'.
119- 2020/05/10 (0.2) - The following function/struct names were changes:
120 - ImPlotRange -> ImPlotLimits
121 - GetPlotRange() -> GetPlotLimits()
122 - SetNextPlotRange -> SetNextPlotLimits
123 - SetNextPlotRangeX -> SetNextPlotLimitsX
124 - SetNextPlotRangeY -> SetNextPlotLimitsY
125- 2020/05/10 (0.2) - Plot queries are pixel based by default. Query rects that maintain relative plot position have been removed. This was done to support multi-y-axis.
126
127*/
128

138// Support for pre-1.82 versions. Users on 1.82+ can use 0 (default) flags to mean "all corners" but in order to support older versions we are more explicit.
139#if (IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 18102) && !defined(ImDrawFlags_RoundCornersAll)
140#define ImDrawFlags_RoundCornersAll ImDrawCornerFlags_All
141#endif
142
143// Support for pre-1.89.7 versions.
144#if (IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 18966)
145#define ImGuiButtonFlags_AllowOverlap ImGuiButtonFlags_AllowItemOverlap
146#endif
147
148// Visual Studio warnings
149#ifdef _MSC_VER
150#pragma warning (disable: 4996) // 'This function or variable may be unsafe': strcpy, strdup, sprintf, vsnprintf, sscanf, fopen
151#endif
152
153// Clang/GCC warnings with -Weverything
154#if defined(__clang__)
155#pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wformat-nonliteral" // warning: format string is not a string literal
156#elif defined(__GNUC__)
157#pragma GCC diagnostic ignored "-Wformat-nonliteral" // warning: format not a string literal, format string not checked
158#endif
159
160// Global plot context
161#ifndef GImPlot
162ImPlotContext* GImPlot = nullptr;
163#endif

165//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
166// Struct Implementations
167//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
168
169ImPlotInputMap::ImPlotInputMap() {
170 ImPlot::MapInputDefault(this);
171}
172
173ImPlotStyle::ImPlotStyle() {
174
175 LineWeight = 1;
176 Marker = ImPlotMarker_None;
177 MarkerSize = 4;
178 MarkerWeight = 1;
179 FillAlpha = 1;
180 ErrorBarSize = 5;
181 ErrorBarWeight = 1.5f;
182 DigitalBitHeight = 8;
183 DigitalBitGap = 4;
184
185 PlotBorderSize = 1;
186 MinorAlpha = 0.25f;
187 MajorTickLen = ImVec2(10,10);
188 MinorTickLen = ImVec2(5,5);
189 MajorTickSize = ImVec2(1,1);
190 MinorTickSize = ImVec2(1,1);
191 MajorGridSize = ImVec2(1,1);
192 MinorGridSize = ImVec2(1,1);
193 PlotPadding = ImVec2(10,10);
194 LabelPadding = ImVec2(5,5);
195 LegendPadding = ImVec2(10,10);
196 LegendInnerPadding = ImVec2(5,5);
197 LegendSpacing = ImVec2(5,0);
198 MousePosPadding = ImVec2(10,10);
199 AnnotationPadding = ImVec2(2,2);
200 FitPadding = ImVec2(0,0);
201 PlotDefaultSize = ImVec2(400,300);
202 PlotMinSize = ImVec2(200,150);
203
204 ImPlot::StyleColorsAuto(this);
205
206 Colormap = ImPlotColormap_Deep;
207
208 UseLocalTime = false;
209 Use24HourClock = false;
210 UseISO8601 = false;
211}

213//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
214// Style

217namespace ImPlot {
218
219const char* GetStyleColorName(ImPlotCol col) {
220 static const char* col_names[ImPlotCol_COUNT] = {
221 "Line",
222 "Fill",
223 "MarkerOutline",
224 "MarkerFill",
225 "ErrorBar",
226 "FrameBg",
227 "PlotBg",
228 "PlotBorder",
229 "LegendBg",
230 "LegendBorder",
231 "LegendText",
232 "TitleText",
233 "InlayText",
234 "AxisText",
235 "AxisGrid",
236 "AxisTick",
237 "AxisBg",
238 "AxisBgHovered",
239 "AxisBgActive",
240 "Selection",
241 "Crosshairs"
242 };
243 return col_names[col];
244}
245
246const char* GetMarkerName(ImPlotMarker marker) {
247 switch (marker) {
248 case ImPlotMarker_None: return "None";
249 case ImPlotMarker_Circle: return "Circle";
250 case ImPlotMarker_Square: return "Square";
251 case ImPlotMarker_Diamond: return "Diamond";
252 case ImPlotMarker_Up: return "Up";
253 case ImPlotMarker_Down: return "Down";
254 case ImPlotMarker_Left: return "Left";
255 case ImPlotMarker_Right: return "Right";
256 case ImPlotMarker_Cross: return "Cross";
257 case ImPlotMarker_Plus: return "Plus";
258 case ImPlotMarker_Asterisk: return "Asterisk";
259 default: return "";
260 }
261}
262
263ImVec4 GetAutoColor(ImPlotCol idx) {
264 ImVec4 col(0,0,0,1);
265 switch(idx) {
266 case ImPlotCol_Line: return col; // these are plot dependent!
267 case ImPlotCol_Fill: return col; // these are plot dependent!
268 case ImPlotCol_MarkerOutline: return col; // these are plot dependent!
269 case ImPlotCol_MarkerFill: return col; // these are plot dependent!
270 case ImPlotCol_ErrorBar: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text);
271 case ImPlotCol_FrameBg: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_FrameBg);
272 case ImPlotCol_PlotBg: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_WindowBg);
273 case ImPlotCol_PlotBorder: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Border);
274 case ImPlotCol_LegendBg: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_PopupBg);
275 case ImPlotCol_LegendBorder: return GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_PlotBorder);
276 case ImPlotCol_LegendText: return GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_InlayText);
277 case ImPlotCol_TitleText: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text);
278 case ImPlotCol_InlayText: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text);
279 case ImPlotCol_AxisText: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text);
280 case ImPlotCol_AxisGrid: return GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_AxisText) * ImVec4(1,1,1,0.25f);
281 case ImPlotCol_AxisTick: return GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_AxisGrid);
282 case ImPlotCol_AxisBg: return ImVec4(0,0,0,0);
283 case ImPlotCol_AxisBgHovered: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_ButtonHovered);
284 case ImPlotCol_AxisBgActive: return ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_ButtonActive);
285 case ImPlotCol_Selection: return ImVec4(1,1,0,1);
286 case ImPlotCol_Crosshairs: return GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_PlotBorder);
287 default: return col;
288 }
289}
290
291struct ImPlotStyleVarInfo {
292 ImGuiDataType Type;
293 ImU32 Count;
294 ImU32 Offset;
295 void* GetVarPtr(ImPlotStyle* style) const { return (void*)((unsigned char*)style + Offset); }
296};
297
298static const ImPlotStyleVarInfo GPlotStyleVarInfo[] =
299{
300 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, LineWeight) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_LineWeight

302 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MarkerSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MarkerSize
303 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MarkerWeight) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MarkerWeight
304 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, FillAlpha) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_FillAlpha
305 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, ErrorBarSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_ErrorBarSize
306 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, ErrorBarWeight) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_ErrorBarWeight
307 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, DigitalBitHeight) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_DigitalBitHeight
308 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, DigitalBitGap) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_DigitalBitGap
309
310 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, PlotBorderSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_PlotBorderSize
311 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 1, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MinorAlpha) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MinorAlpha
312 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MajorTickLen) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MajorTickLen
313 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MinorTickLen) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MinorTickLen
314 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MajorTickSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MajorTickSize
315 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MinorTickSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MinorTickSize
316 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MajorGridSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MajorGridSize
317 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MinorGridSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MinorGridSize
318 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, PlotPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_PlotPadding
319 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, LabelPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_LabelPadding
320 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, LegendPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_LegendPadding
321 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, LegendInnerPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_LegendInnerPadding
322 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, LegendSpacing) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_LegendSpacing
323
324 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, MousePosPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_MousePosPadding
325 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, AnnotationPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_AnnotationPadding
326 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, FitPadding) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_FitPadding
327 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, PlotDefaultSize) }, // ImPlotStyleVar_PlotDefaultSize
328 { ImGuiDataType_Float, 2, (ImU32)offsetof(ImPlotStyle, PlotMinSize) } // ImPlotStyleVar_PlotMinSize
329};
330
331static const ImPlotStyleVarInfo* GetPlotStyleVarInfo(ImPlotStyleVar idx) {
332 IM_ASSERT(idx >= 0 && idx < ImPlotStyleVar_COUNT);
333 IM_ASSERT(IM_ARRAYSIZE(GPlotStyleVarInfo) == ImPlotStyleVar_COUNT);
334 return &GPlotStyleVarInfo[idx];
335}
336
337//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
338// Generic Helpers
339//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
340
341void AddTextVertical(ImDrawList *DrawList, ImVec2 pos, ImU32 col, const char *text_begin, const char* text_end) {
342 // the code below is based loosely on ImFont::RenderText
343 if (!text_end)
344 text_end = text_begin + strlen(text_begin);
345 ImGuiContext& g = *GImGui;
346#ifdef IMGUI_HAS_TEXTURES
347 ImFontBaked* font = g.Font->GetFontBaked(g.FontSize);
348 const float scale = g.FontSize / font->Size;
349#else
350 ImFont* font = g.Font;
351 const float scale = g.FontSize / font->FontSize;
352#endif
353 // Align to be pixel perfect
354 pos.x = ImFloor(pos.x);
355 pos.y = ImFloor(pos.y);
356 const char* s = text_begin;
357 int chars_exp = (int)(text_end - s);
358 int chars_rnd = 0;
359 const int vtx_count_max = chars_exp * 4;
360 const int idx_count_max = chars_exp * 6;
361 DrawList->PrimReserve(idx_count_max, vtx_count_max);
362 while (s < text_end) {
363 unsigned int c = (unsigned int)*s;
364 if (c < 0x80) {
365 s += 1;
366 }
367 else {
368 s += ImTextCharFromUtf8(&c, s, text_end);
369 if (c == 0) // Malformed UTF-8?
370 break;
371 }
372 const ImFontGlyph * glyph = font->FindGlyph((ImWchar)c);
373 if (glyph == nullptr) {
374 continue;
375 }
376 DrawList->PrimQuadUV(pos + ImVec2(glyph->Y0, -glyph->X0) * scale, pos + ImVec2(glyph->Y0, -glyph->X1) * scale,
377 pos + ImVec2(glyph->Y1, -glyph->X1) * scale, pos + ImVec2(glyph->Y1, -glyph->X0) * scale,
378 ImVec2(glyph->U0, glyph->V0), ImVec2(glyph->U1, glyph->V0),
379 ImVec2(glyph->U1, glyph->V1), ImVec2(glyph->U0, glyph->V1),
380 col);
381 pos.y -= glyph->AdvanceX * scale;
382 chars_rnd++;
383 }
384 // Give back unused vertices
385 int chars_skp = chars_exp-chars_rnd;
386 DrawList->PrimUnreserve(chars_skp*6, chars_skp*4);
387}
388
389void AddTextCentered(ImDrawList* DrawList, ImVec2 top_center, ImU32 col, const char* text_begin, const char* text_end) {
390 float txt_ht = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
391 const char* title_end = ImGui::FindRenderedTextEnd(text_begin, text_end);
392 ImVec2 text_size;
393 float y = 0;
394 while (const char* tmp = (const char*)memchr(text_begin, '\n', title_end-text_begin)) {
395 text_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(text_begin,tmp,true);
396 DrawList->AddText(ImVec2(top_center.x - text_size.x * 0.5f, top_center.y+y),col,text_begin,tmp);
397 text_begin = tmp + 1;
398 y += txt_ht;
399 }
400 text_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(text_begin,title_end,true);
401 DrawList->AddText(ImVec2(top_center.x - text_size.x * 0.5f, top_center.y+y),col,text_begin,title_end);
402}
403
404double NiceNum(double x, bool round) {
405 double f;
406 double nf;
407 int expv = (int)floor(ImLog10(x));
408 f = x / ImPow(10.0, (double)expv);
409 if (round)
410 if (f < 1.5)
411 nf = 1;
412 else if (f < 3)
413 nf = 2;
414 else if (f < 7)
415 nf = 5;
416 else
417 nf = 10;
418 else if (f <= 1)
419 nf = 1;
420 else if (f <= 2)
421 nf = 2;
422 else if (f <= 5)
423 nf = 5;
424 else
425 nf = 10;
426 return nf * ImPow(10.0, expv);
427}
428
429//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
430// Context Utils
431//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
432
433void SetImGuiContext(ImGuiContext* ctx) {
434 ImGui::SetCurrentContext(ctx);
435}
436
437ImPlotContext* CreateContext() {
438 ImPlotContext* ctx = IM_NEW(ImPlotContext)();
439 Initialize(ctx);
440 if (GImPlot == nullptr)
441 SetCurrentContext(ctx);
442 return ctx;
443}
444
445void DestroyContext(ImPlotContext* ctx) {
446 if (ctx == nullptr)
447 ctx = GImPlot;
448 if (GImPlot == ctx)
449 SetCurrentContext(nullptr);
450 IM_DELETE(ctx);
451}
452
453ImPlotContext* GetCurrentContext() {
454 return GImPlot;
455}
456
457void SetCurrentContext(ImPlotContext* ctx) {
458 GImPlot = ctx;
459}
460
461#define IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(name, qual) ctx->ColormapData.Append(#name, name, sizeof(name)/sizeof(ImU32), qual)
462#define IM_RGB(r,g,b) IM_COL32(r,g,b,255)
463
464void Initialize(ImPlotContext* ctx) {
465 ResetCtxForNextPlot(ctx);
466 ResetCtxForNextAlignedPlots(ctx);
467 ResetCtxForNextSubplot(ctx);
468
469 const ImU32 Deep[] = {4289753676, 4283598045, 4285048917, 4283584196, 4289950337, 4284512403, 4291005402, 4287401100, 4285839820, 4291671396 };
470 const ImU32 Dark[] = {4280031972, 4290281015, 4283084621, 4288892568, 4278222847, 4281597951, 4280833702, 4290740727, 4288256409 };
471 const ImU32 Pastel[] = {4289639675, 4293119411, 4291161036, 4293184478, 4289124862, 4291624959, 4290631909, 4293712637, 4294111986 };
472 const ImU32 Paired[] = {4293119554, 4290017311, 4287291314, 4281114675, 4288256763, 4280031971, 4285513725, 4278222847, 4292260554, 4288298346, 4288282623, 4280834481};
473 const ImU32 Viridis[] = {4283695428, 4285867080, 4287054913, 4287455029, 4287526954, 4287402273, 4286883874, 4285579076, 4283552122, 4280737725, 4280674301 };
474 const ImU32 Plasma[] = {4287039501, 4288480321, 4289200234, 4288941455, 4287638193, 4286072780, 4284638433, 4283139314, 4281771772, 4280667900, 4280416752 };
475 const ImU32 Hot[] = {4278190144, 4278190208, 4278190271, 4278190335, 4278206719, 4278223103, 4278239231, 4278255615, 4283826175, 4289396735, 4294967295 };
476 const ImU32 Cool[] = {4294967040, 4294960666, 4294954035, 4294947661, 4294941030, 4294934656, 4294928025, 4294921651, 4294915020, 4294908646, 4294902015 };
477 const ImU32 Pink[] = {4278190154, 4282532475, 4284308894, 4285690554, 4286879686, 4287870160, 4288794330, 4289651940, 4291685869, 4293392118, 4294967295 };
478 const ImU32 Jet[] = {4289331200, 4294901760, 4294923520, 4294945280, 4294967040, 4289396565, 4283826090, 4278255615, 4278233855, 4278212095, 4278190335 };
479 const ImU32 Twilight[] = {IM_RGB(226,217,226),IM_RGB(166,191,202),IM_RGB(109,144,192),IM_RGB(95,88,176),IM_RGB(83,30,124),IM_RGB(47,20,54),IM_RGB(100,25,75),IM_RGB(159,60,80),IM_RGB(192,117,94),IM_RGB(208,179,158),IM_RGB(226,217,226)};
480 const ImU32 RdBu[] = {IM_RGB(103,0,31),IM_RGB(178,24,43),IM_RGB(214,96,77),IM_RGB(244,165,130),IM_RGB(253,219,199),IM_RGB(247,247,247),IM_RGB(209,229,240),IM_RGB(146,197,222),IM_RGB(67,147,195),IM_RGB(33,102,172),IM_RGB(5,48,97)};
481 const ImU32 BrBG[] = {IM_RGB(84,48,5),IM_RGB(140,81,10),IM_RGB(191,129,45),IM_RGB(223,194,125),IM_RGB(246,232,195),IM_RGB(245,245,245),IM_RGB(199,234,229),IM_RGB(128,205,193),IM_RGB(53,151,143),IM_RGB(1,102,94),IM_RGB(0,60,48)};
482 const ImU32 PiYG[] = {IM_RGB(142,1,82),IM_RGB(197,27,125),IM_RGB(222,119,174),IM_RGB(241,182,218),IM_RGB(253,224,239),IM_RGB(247,247,247),IM_RGB(230,245,208),IM_RGB(184,225,134),IM_RGB(127,188,65),IM_RGB(77,146,33),IM_RGB(39,100,25)};
483 const ImU32 Spectral[] = {IM_RGB(158,1,66),IM_RGB(213,62,79),IM_RGB(244,109,67),IM_RGB(253,174,97),IM_RGB(254,224,139),IM_RGB(255,255,191),IM_RGB(230,245,152),IM_RGB(171,221,164),IM_RGB(102,194,165),IM_RGB(50,136,189),IM_RGB(94,79,162)};
484 const ImU32 Greys[] = {IM_COL32_WHITE, IM_COL32_BLACK };
485
486 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Deep, true);
487 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Dark, true);
488 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Pastel, true);
489 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Paired, true);
490 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Viridis, false);
491 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Plasma, false);
492 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Hot, false);
493 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Cool, false);
494 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Pink, false);
495 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Jet, false);
496 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Twilight, false);
497 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(RdBu, false);
498 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(BrBG, false);
499 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(PiYG, false);
500 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Spectral, false);
501 IMPLOT_APPEND_CMAP(Greys, false);
502}
503
504void ResetCtxForNextPlot(ImPlotContext* ctx) {
505 // reset the next plot/item data
506 ctx->NextPlotData.Reset();
507 ctx->NextItemData.Reset();
508 // reset labels
509 ctx->Annotations.Reset();
510 ctx->Tags.Reset();
511 // reset extents/fit
512 ctx->OpenContextThisFrame = false;
513 // reset digital plot items count
514 ctx->DigitalPlotItemCnt = 0;
515 ctx->DigitalPlotOffset = 0;
516 // nullify plot
517 ctx->CurrentPlot = nullptr;
518 ctx->CurrentItem = nullptr;
519 ctx->PreviousItem = nullptr;
520}
521
522void ResetCtxForNextAlignedPlots(ImPlotContext* ctx) {
523 ctx->CurrentAlignmentH = nullptr;
524 ctx->CurrentAlignmentV = nullptr;
525}
526
527void ResetCtxForNextSubplot(ImPlotContext* ctx) {
528 ctx->CurrentSubplot = nullptr;
529 ctx->CurrentAlignmentH = nullptr;
530 ctx->CurrentAlignmentV = nullptr;
531}
532
533//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
534// Plot Utils
535//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
536
537ImPlotPlot* GetPlot(const char* title) {
538 ImGuiWindow* Window = GImGui->CurrentWindow;
539 const ImGuiID ID = Window->GetID(title);
540 return GImPlot->Plots.GetByKey(ID);
541}
542
543ImPlotPlot* GetCurrentPlot() {
544 return GImPlot->CurrentPlot;
545}
546
547void BustPlotCache() {
548 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
549 gp.Plots.Clear();
550 gp.Subplots.Clear();
551}
552
553//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
554// Legend Utils
555//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
556
557ImVec2 GetLocationPos(const ImRect& outer_rect, const ImVec2& inner_size, ImPlotLocation loc, const ImVec2& pad) {
558 ImVec2 pos;
559 if (ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_West) && !ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_East))
560 pos.x = outer_rect.Min.x + pad.x;
561 else if (!ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_West) && ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_East))
562 pos.x = outer_rect.Max.x - pad.x - inner_size.x;
563 else
564 pos.x = outer_rect.GetCenter().x - inner_size.x * 0.5f;
565 // legend reference point y
566 if (ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_North) && !ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_South))
567 pos.y = outer_rect.Min.y + pad.y;
568 else if (!ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_North) && ImHasFlag(loc, ImPlotLocation_South))
569 pos.y = outer_rect.Max.y - pad.y - inner_size.y;
570 else
571 pos.y = outer_rect.GetCenter().y - inner_size.y * 0.5f;
572 pos.x = IM_ROUND(pos.x);
573 pos.y = IM_ROUND(pos.y);
574 return pos;
575}
576
577ImVec2 CalcLegendSize(ImPlotItemGroup& items, const ImVec2& pad, const ImVec2& spacing, bool vertical) {
578 // vars
579 const int nItems = items.GetLegendCount();
580 const float txt_ht = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
581 const float icon_size = txt_ht;
582 // get label max width
583 float max_label_width = 0;
584 float sum_label_width = 0;
585 for (int i = 0; i < nItems; ++i) {
586 const char* label = items.GetLegendLabel(i);
587 const float label_width = ImGui::CalcTextSize(label, nullptr, true).x;
588 max_label_width = label_width > max_label_width ? label_width : max_label_width;
589 sum_label_width += label_width;
590 }
591 // calc legend size
592 const ImVec2 legend_size = vertical ?
593 ImVec2(pad.x * 2 + icon_size + max_label_width, pad.y * 2 + nItems * txt_ht + (nItems - 1) * spacing.y) :
594 ImVec2(pad.x * 2 + icon_size * nItems + sum_label_width + (nItems - 1) * spacing.x, pad.y * 2 + txt_ht);
595 return legend_size;
596}
597
598bool ClampLegendRect(ImRect& legend_rect, const ImRect& outer_rect, const ImVec2& pad) {
599 bool clamped = false;
600 ImRect outer_rect_pad(outer_rect.Min + pad, outer_rect.Max - pad);
601 if (legend_rect.Min.x < outer_rect_pad.Min.x) {
602 legend_rect.Min.x = outer_rect_pad.Min.x;
603 clamped = true;
604 }
605 if (legend_rect.Min.y < outer_rect_pad.Min.y) {
606 legend_rect.Min.y = outer_rect_pad.Min.y;
607 clamped = true;
608 }
609 if (legend_rect.Max.x > outer_rect_pad.Max.x) {
610 legend_rect.Max.x = outer_rect_pad.Max.x;
611 clamped = true;
612 }
613 if (legend_rect.Max.y > outer_rect_pad.Max.y) {
614 legend_rect.Max.y = outer_rect_pad.Max.y;
615 clamped = true;
616 }
617 return clamped;
618}
619
620int LegendSortingComp(const void* _a, const void* _b) {
621 ImPlotItemGroup* items = GImPlot->SortItems;
622 const int a = *(const int*)_a;
623 const int b = *(const int*)_b;
624 const char* label_a = items->GetLegendLabel(a);
625 const char* label_b = items->GetLegendLabel(b);
626 return strcmp(label_a,label_b);
627}
628
629bool ShowLegendEntries(ImPlotItemGroup& items, const ImRect& legend_bb, bool hovered, const ImVec2& pad, const ImVec2& spacing, bool vertical, ImDrawList& DrawList) {
630 // vars
631 const float txt_ht = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
632 const float icon_size = txt_ht;
633 const float icon_shrink = 2;
634 ImU32 col_txt = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendText);
635 ImU32 col_txt_dis = ImAlphaU32(col_txt, 0.25f);
636 // render each legend item
637 float sum_label_width = 0;
638 bool any_item_hovered = false;
639
640 const int num_items = items.GetLegendCount();
641 if (num_items < 1)
642 return hovered;
643 // build render order
644 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
645 ImVector<int>& indices = gp.TempInt1;
646 indices.resize(num_items);
647 for (int i = 0; i < num_items; ++i)
648 indices[i] = i;
649 if (ImHasFlag(items.Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Sort) && num_items > 1) {
650 gp.SortItems = &items;
651 qsort(indices.Data, num_items, sizeof(int), LegendSortingComp);
652 }
653 // render
654 for (int i = 0; i < num_items; ++i) {
655 const int idx = ImHasFlag(items.Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Reverse) ? indices[num_items - 1 - i] : indices[i];
656 ImPlotItem* item = items.GetLegendItem(idx);
657 const char* label = items.GetLegendLabel(idx);
658 const float label_width = ImGui::CalcTextSize(label, nullptr, true).x;
659 const ImVec2 top_left = vertical ?
660 legend_bb.Min + pad + ImVec2(0, i * (txt_ht + spacing.y)) :
661 legend_bb.Min + pad + ImVec2(i * (icon_size + spacing.x) + sum_label_width, 0);
662 sum_label_width += label_width;
663 ImRect icon_bb;
664 icon_bb.Min = top_left + ImVec2(icon_shrink,icon_shrink);
665 icon_bb.Max = top_left + ImVec2(icon_size - icon_shrink, icon_size - icon_shrink);
666 ImRect label_bb;
667 label_bb.Min = top_left;
668 label_bb.Max = top_left + ImVec2(label_width + icon_size, icon_size);
669 ImU32 col_txt_hl;
670 ImU32 col_item = ImAlphaU32(item->Color,1);
671
672 ImRect button_bb(icon_bb.Min, label_bb.Max);
673
674 ImGui::KeepAliveID(item->ID);
675
676 bool item_hov = false;
677 bool item_hld = false;
678 bool item_clk = ImHasFlag(items.Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoButtons)
679 ? false
680 : ImGui::ButtonBehavior(button_bb, item->ID, &item_hov, &item_hld);
681
682 if (item_clk)
683 item->Show = !item->Show;
684
685
686 const bool can_hover = (item_hov)
687 && (!ImHasFlag(items.Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoHighlightItem)
688 || !ImHasFlag(items.Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoHighlightAxis));
689
690 if (can_hover) {
691 item->LegendHoverRect.Min = icon_bb.Min;
692 item->LegendHoverRect.Max = label_bb.Max;
693 item->LegendHovered = true;
694 col_txt_hl = ImMixU32(col_txt, col_item, 64);
695 any_item_hovered = true;
696 }
697 else {
698 col_txt_hl = ImGui::GetColorU32(col_txt);
699 }
700 ImU32 col_icon;
701 if (item_hld)
702 col_icon = item->Show ? ImAlphaU32(col_item,0.5f) : ImGui::GetColorU32(ImGuiCol_TextDisabled, 0.5f);
703 else if (item_hov)
704 col_icon = item->Show ? ImAlphaU32(col_item,0.75f) : ImGui::GetColorU32(ImGuiCol_TextDisabled, 0.75f);
705 else
706 col_icon = item->Show ? col_item : col_txt_dis;
707
708 DrawList.AddRectFilled(icon_bb.Min, icon_bb.Max, col_icon);
709 const char* text_display_end = ImGui::FindRenderedTextEnd(label, nullptr);
710 if (label != text_display_end)
711 DrawList.AddText(top_left + ImVec2(icon_size, 0), item->Show ? col_txt_hl : col_txt_dis, label, text_display_end);
712 }
713 return hovered && !any_item_hovered;
714}
715
716//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
717// Locators
718//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
719
720static const float TICK_FILL_X = 0.8f;
721static const float TICK_FILL_Y = 1.0f;
722
723void Locator_Default(ImPlotTicker& ticker, const ImPlotRange& range, float pixels, bool vertical, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* formatter_data) {
724 if (range.Min == range.Max)
725 return;
726 const int nMinor = 10;
727 const int nMajor = ImMax(2, (int)IM_ROUND(pixels / (vertical ? 300.0f : 400.0f)));
728 const double nice_range = NiceNum(range.Size() * 0.99, false);
729 const double interval = NiceNum(nice_range / (nMajor - 1), true);
730 const double graphmin = floor(range.Min / interval) * interval;
731 const double graphmax = ceil(range.Max / interval) * interval;
732 bool first_major_set = false;
733 int first_major_idx = 0;
734 const int idx0 = ticker.TickCount(); // ticker may have user custom ticks
735 ImVec2 total_size(0,0);
736 for (double major = graphmin; major < graphmax + 0.5 * interval; major += interval) {
737 // is this zero? combat zero formatting issues
738 if (major-interval < 0 && major+interval > 0)
739 major = 0;
740 if (range.Contains(major)) {
741 if (!first_major_set) {
742 first_major_idx = ticker.TickCount();
743 first_major_set = true;
744 }
745 total_size += ticker.AddTick(major, true, 0, true, formatter, formatter_data).LabelSize;
746 }
747 for (int i = 1; i < nMinor; ++i) {
748 double minor = major + i * interval / nMinor;
749 if (range.Contains(minor)) {
750 total_size += ticker.AddTick(minor, false, 0, true, formatter, formatter_data).LabelSize;
751 }
752 }
753 }
754 // prune if necessary
755 if ((!vertical && total_size.x > pixels*TICK_FILL_X) || (vertical && total_size.y > pixels*TICK_FILL_Y)) {
756 for (int i = first_major_idx-1; i >= idx0; i -= 2)
757 ticker.Ticks[i].ShowLabel = false;
758 for (int i = first_major_idx+1; i < ticker.TickCount(); i += 2)
759 ticker.Ticks[i].ShowLabel = false;
760 }
761}
762
763bool CalcLogarithmicExponents(const ImPlotRange& range, float pix, bool vertical, int& exp_min, int& exp_max, int& exp_step) {
764 if (range.Min * range.Max > 0) {
765 const int nMajor = vertical ? ImMax(2, (int)IM_ROUND(pix * 0.02f)) : ImMax(2, (int)IM_ROUND(pix * 0.01f)); // TODO: magic numbers
766 double log_min = ImLog10(ImAbs(range.Min));
767 double log_max = ImLog10(ImAbs(range.Max));
768 double log_a = ImMin(log_min,log_max);
769 double log_b = ImMax(log_min,log_max);
770 exp_step = ImMax(1,(int)(log_b - log_a) / nMajor);
771 exp_min = (int)log_a;
772 exp_max = (int)log_b;
773 if (exp_step != 1) {
774 while(exp_step % 3 != 0) exp_step++; // make step size multiple of three
775 while(exp_min % exp_step != 0) exp_min--; // decrease exp_min until exp_min + N * exp_step will be 0
776 }
777 return true;
778 }
779 return false;
780}
781
782void AddTicksLogarithmic(const ImPlotRange& range, int exp_min, int exp_max, int exp_step, ImPlotTicker& ticker, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* data) {
783 const double sign = ImSign(range.Max);
784 for (int e = exp_min - exp_step; e < (exp_max + exp_step); e += exp_step) {
785 double major1 = sign*ImPow(10, (double)(e));
786 double major2 = sign*ImPow(10, (double)(e + 1));
787 double interval = (major2 - major1) / 9;
788 if (major1 >= (range.Min - DBL_EPSILON) && major1 <= (range.Max + DBL_EPSILON))
789 ticker.AddTick(major1, true, 0, true, formatter, data);
790 for (int j = 0; j < exp_step; ++j) {
791 major1 = sign*ImPow(10, (double)(e+j));
792 major2 = sign*ImPow(10, (double)(e+j+1));
793 interval = (major2 - major1) / 9;
794 for (int i = 1; i < (9 + (int)(j < (exp_step - 1))); ++i) {
795 double minor = major1 + i * interval;
796 if (minor >= (range.Min - DBL_EPSILON) && minor <= (range.Max + DBL_EPSILON))
797 ticker.AddTick(minor, false, 0, false, formatter, data);
798 }
799 }
800 }
801}
802
803void Locator_Log10(ImPlotTicker& ticker, const ImPlotRange& range, float pixels, bool vertical, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* formatter_data) {
804 int exp_min, exp_max, exp_step;
805 if (CalcLogarithmicExponents(range, pixels, vertical, exp_min, exp_max, exp_step))
806 AddTicksLogarithmic(range, exp_min, exp_max, exp_step, ticker, formatter, formatter_data);
807}
808
809float CalcSymLogPixel(double plt, const ImPlotRange& range, float pixels) {
810 double scaleToPixels = pixels / range.Size();
811 double scaleMin = TransformForward_SymLog(range.Min,nullptr);
812 double scaleMax = TransformForward_SymLog(range.Max,nullptr);
813 double s = TransformForward_SymLog(plt, nullptr);
814 double t = (s - scaleMin) / (scaleMax - scaleMin);
815 plt = range.Min + range.Size() * t;
816
817 return (float)(0 + scaleToPixels * (plt - range.Min));
818}
819
820void Locator_SymLog(ImPlotTicker& ticker, const ImPlotRange& range, float pixels, bool vertical, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* formatter_data) {
821 if (range.Min >= -1 && range.Max <= 1) {
822 Locator_Default(ticker, range, pixels, vertical, formatter, formatter_data);
823 }
824 else if (range.Min * range.Max < 0) { // cross zero
825 const float pix_min = 0;
826 const float pix_max = pixels;
827 const float pix_p1 = CalcSymLogPixel(1, range, pixels);
828 const float pix_n1 = CalcSymLogPixel(-1, range, pixels);
829 int exp_min_p, exp_max_p, exp_step_p;
830 int exp_min_n, exp_max_n, exp_step_n;
831 CalcLogarithmicExponents(ImPlotRange(1,range.Max), ImAbs(pix_max-pix_p1),vertical,exp_min_p,exp_max_p,exp_step_p);
832 CalcLogarithmicExponents(ImPlotRange(range.Min,-1),ImAbs(pix_n1-pix_min),vertical,exp_min_n,exp_max_n,exp_step_n);
833 int exp_step = ImMax(exp_step_n, exp_step_p);
834 ticker.AddTick(0,true,0,true,formatter,formatter_data);
835 AddTicksLogarithmic(ImPlotRange(1,range.Max), exp_min_p,exp_max_p,exp_step,ticker,formatter,formatter_data);
836 AddTicksLogarithmic(ImPlotRange(range.Min,-1),exp_min_n,exp_max_n,exp_step,ticker,formatter,formatter_data);
837 }
838 else {
839 Locator_Log10(ticker, range, pixels, vertical, formatter, formatter_data);
840 }
841}
842
843void AddTicksCustom(const double* values, const char* const labels[], int n, ImPlotTicker& ticker, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* data) {
844 for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
845 if (labels != nullptr)
846 ticker.AddTick(values[i], false, 0, true, labels[i]);
847 else
848 ticker.AddTick(values[i], false, 0, true, formatter, data);
849 }
850}
851
852//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
853// Time Ticks and Utils
854//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
855
856// this may not be thread safe?
857static const double TimeUnitSpans[ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT] = {
858 0.000001,
859 0.001,
860 1,
861 60,
862 3600,
863 86400,
864 2629800,
865 31557600
866};
867
868inline ImPlotTimeUnit GetUnitForRange(double range) {
869 static double cutoffs[ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT] = {0.001, 1, 60, 3600, 86400, 2629800, 31557600, IMPLOT_MAX_TIME};
870 for (int i = 0; i < ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT; ++i) {
871 if (range <= cutoffs[i])
872 return (ImPlotTimeUnit)i;
873 }
874 return ImPlotTimeUnit_Yr;
875}
876
877inline int LowerBoundStep(int max_divs, const int* divs, const int* step, int size) {
878 if (max_divs < divs[0])
879 return 0;
880 for (int i = 1; i < size; ++i) {
881 if (max_divs < divs[i])
882 return step[i-1];
883 }
884 return step[size-1];
885}
886
887inline int GetTimeStep(int max_divs, ImPlotTimeUnit unit) {
888 if (unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_Ms || unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_Us) {
889 static const int step[] = {500,250,200,100,50,25,20,10,5,2,1};
890 static const int divs[] = {2,4,5,10,20,40,50,100,200,500,1000};
891 return LowerBoundStep(max_divs, divs, step, 11);
892 }
893 if (unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_S || unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_Min) {
894 static const int step[] = {30,15,10,5,1};
895 static const int divs[] = {2,4,6,12,60};
896 return LowerBoundStep(max_divs, divs, step, 5);
897 }
898 else if (unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_Hr) {
899 static const int step[] = {12,6,3,2,1};
900 static const int divs[] = {2,4,8,12,24};
901 return LowerBoundStep(max_divs, divs, step, 5);
902 }
903 else if (unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_Day) {
904 static const int step[] = {14,7,2,1};
905 static const int divs[] = {2,4,14,28};
906 return LowerBoundStep(max_divs, divs, step, 4);
907 }
908 else if (unit == ImPlotTimeUnit_Mo) {
909 static const int step[] = {6,3,2,1};
910 static const int divs[] = {2,4,6,12};
911 return LowerBoundStep(max_divs, divs, step, 4);
912 }
913 return 0;
914}
915
916ImPlotTime MkGmtTime(struct tm *ptm) {
917 ImPlotTime t;
918#ifdef _WIN32
919 t.S = _mkgmtime(ptm);
920#else
921 t.S = timegm(ptm);
922#endif
923 if (t.S < 0)
924 t.S = 0;
925 return t;
926}
927
928tm* GetGmtTime(const ImPlotTime& t, tm* ptm)
929{
930#ifdef _WIN32
931 if (gmtime_s(ptm, &t.S) == 0)
932 return ptm;
933 else
934 return nullptr;
935#else
936 return gmtime_r(&t.S, ptm);
937#endif
938}
939
940ImPlotTime MkLocTime(struct tm *ptm) {
941 ImPlotTime t;
942 t.S = mktime(ptm);
943 if (t.S < 0)
944 t.S = 0;
945 return t;
946}
947
948tm* GetLocTime(const ImPlotTime& t, tm* ptm) {
949#ifdef _WIN32
950 if (localtime_s(ptm, &t.S) == 0)
951 return ptm;
952 else
953 return nullptr;
954#else
955 return localtime_r(&t.S, ptm);
956#endif
957}
958
959ImPlotTime MakeTime(int year, int month, int day, int hour, int min, int sec, int us) {
960 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
961
962 int yr = year - 1900;
963 if (yr < 0)
964 yr = 0;
965
966 sec = sec + us / 1000000;
967 us = us % 1000000;
968
969 Tm.tm_sec = sec;
970 Tm.tm_min = min;
971 Tm.tm_hour = hour;
972 Tm.tm_mday = day;
973 Tm.tm_mon = month;
974 Tm.tm_year = yr;
975
976 ImPlotTime t = MkTime(&Tm);
977
978 t.Us = us;
979 return t;
980}
981
982int GetYear(const ImPlotTime& t) {
983 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
984 GetTime(t, &Tm);
985 return Tm.tm_year + 1900;
986}
987
988int GetMonth(const ImPlotTime& t) {
989 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
990 ImPlot::GetTime(t, &Tm);
991 return Tm.tm_mon;
992}
993
994ImPlotTime AddTime(const ImPlotTime& t, ImPlotTimeUnit unit, int count) {
995 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
996 ImPlotTime t_out = t;
997 switch(unit) {
998 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Us: t_out.Us += count; break;
999 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Ms: t_out.Us += count * 1000; break;
1000 case ImPlotTimeUnit_S: t_out.S += count; break;
1001 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Min: t_out.S += count * 60; break;
1002 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Hr: t_out.S += count * 3600; break;
1003 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Day: t_out.S += count * 86400; break;
1004 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Mo: for (int i = 0; i < abs(count); ++i) {
1005 GetTime(t_out, &Tm);
1006 if (count > 0)
1007 t_out.S += 86400 * GetDaysInMonth(Tm.tm_year + 1900, Tm.tm_mon);
1008 else if (count < 0)
1009 t_out.S -= 86400 * GetDaysInMonth(Tm.tm_year + 1900 - (Tm.tm_mon == 0 ? 1 : 0), Tm.tm_mon == 0 ? 11 : Tm.tm_mon - 1); // NOT WORKING
1010 }
1011 break;
1012 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Yr: for (int i = 0; i < abs(count); ++i) {
1013 if (count > 0)
1014 t_out.S += 86400 * (365 + (int)IsLeapYear(GetYear(t_out)));
1015 else if (count < 0)
1016 t_out.S -= 86400 * (365 + (int)IsLeapYear(GetYear(t_out) - 1));
1017 // this is incorrect if leap year and we are past Feb 28
1018 }
1019 break;
1020 default: break;
1021 }
1022 t_out.RollOver();
1023 return t_out;
1024}
1025
1026ImPlotTime FloorTime(const ImPlotTime& t, ImPlotTimeUnit unit) {
1027 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1028 GetTime(t, &gp.Tm);
1029 switch (unit) {
1030 case ImPlotTimeUnit_S: return ImPlotTime(t.S, 0);
1031 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Ms: return ImPlotTime(t.S, (t.Us / 1000) * 1000);
1032 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Us: return t;
1033 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Yr: gp.Tm.tm_mon = 0; // fall-through
1034 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Mo: gp.Tm.tm_mday = 1; // fall-through
1035 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Day: gp.Tm.tm_hour = 0; // fall-through
1036 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Hr: gp.Tm.tm_min = 0; // fall-through
1037 case ImPlotTimeUnit_Min: gp.Tm.tm_sec = 0; break;
1038 default: return t;
1039 }
1040 return MkTime(&gp.Tm);
1041}
1042
1043ImPlotTime CeilTime(const ImPlotTime& t, ImPlotTimeUnit unit) {
1044 return AddTime(FloorTime(t, unit), unit, 1);
1045}
1046
1047ImPlotTime RoundTime(const ImPlotTime& t, ImPlotTimeUnit unit) {
1048 ImPlotTime t1 = FloorTime(t, unit);
1049 ImPlotTime t2 = AddTime(t1,unit,1);
1050 if (t1.S == t2.S)
1051 return t.Us - t1.Us < t2.Us - t.Us ? t1 : t2;
1052 return t.S - t1.S < t2.S - t.S ? t1 : t2;
1053}
1054
1055ImPlotTime CombineDateTime(const ImPlotTime& date_part, const ImPlotTime& tod_part) {
1056 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1057 tm& Tm = gp.Tm;
1058 GetTime(date_part, &gp.Tm);
1059 int y = Tm.tm_year;
1060 int m = Tm.tm_mon;
1061 int d = Tm.tm_mday;
1062 GetTime(tod_part, &gp.Tm);
1063 Tm.tm_year = y;
1064 Tm.tm_mon = m;
1065 Tm.tm_mday = d;
1066 ImPlotTime t = MkTime(&Tm);
1067 t.Us = tod_part.Us;
1068 return t;
1069}
1070
1071// TODO: allow users to define these
1072static const char* MONTH_NAMES[] = {"January","February","March","April","May","June","July","August","September","October","November","December"};
1073static const char* WD_ABRVS[] = {"Su","Mo","Tu","We","Th","Fr","Sa"};
1074static const char* MONTH_ABRVS[] = {"Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"};
1075
1076int FormatTime(const ImPlotTime& t, char* buffer, int size, ImPlotTimeFmt fmt, bool use_24_hr_clk) {
1077 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
1078 GetTime(t, &Tm);
1079 const int us = t.Us % 1000;
1080 const int ms = t.Us / 1000;
1081 const int sec = Tm.tm_sec;
1082 const int min = Tm.tm_min;
1083 if (use_24_hr_clk) {
1084 const int hr = Tm.tm_hour;
1085 switch(fmt) {
1086 case ImPlotTimeFmt_Us: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ".%03d %03d", ms, us);
1087 case ImPlotTimeFmt_SUs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d.%03d %03d", sec, ms, us);
1088 case ImPlotTimeFmt_SMs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d.%03d", sec, ms);
1089 case ImPlotTimeFmt_S: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d", sec);
1090 case ImPlotTimeFmt_MinSMs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d:%02d.%03d", min, sec, ms);
1091 case ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinSMs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%02d:%02d:%02d.%03d", hr, min, sec, ms);
1092 case ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinS: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%02d:%02d:%02d", hr, min, sec);
1093 case ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%02d:%02d", hr, min);
1094 case ImPlotTimeFmt_Hr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%02d:00", hr);
1095 default: return 0;
1096 }
1097 }
1098 else {
1099 const char* ap = Tm.tm_hour < 12 ? "am" : "pm";
1100 const int hr = (Tm.tm_hour == 0 || Tm.tm_hour == 12) ? 12 : Tm.tm_hour % 12;
1101 switch(fmt) {
1102 case ImPlotTimeFmt_Us: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ".%03d %03d", ms, us);
1103 case ImPlotTimeFmt_SUs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d.%03d %03d", sec, ms, us);
1104 case ImPlotTimeFmt_SMs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d.%03d", sec, ms);
1105 case ImPlotTimeFmt_S: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d", sec);
1106 case ImPlotTimeFmt_MinSMs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, ":%02d:%02d.%03d", min, sec, ms);
1107 case ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinSMs: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d:%02d:%02d.%03d%s", hr, min, sec, ms, ap);
1108 case ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinS: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d:%02d:%02d%s", hr, min, sec, ap);
1109 case ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d:%02d%s", hr, min, ap);
1110 case ImPlotTimeFmt_Hr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d%s", hr, ap);
1111 default: return 0;
1112 }
1113 }
1114}
1115
1116int FormatDate(const ImPlotTime& t, char* buffer, int size, ImPlotDateFmt fmt, bool use_iso_8601) {
1117 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
1118 GetTime(t, &Tm);
1119 const int day = Tm.tm_mday;
1120 const int mon = Tm.tm_mon + 1;
1121 const int year = Tm.tm_year + 1900;
1122 const int yr = year % 100;
1123 if (use_iso_8601) {
1124 switch (fmt) {
1125 case ImPlotDateFmt_DayMo: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "--%02d-%02d", mon, day);
1126 case ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d-%02d-%02d", year, mon, day);
1127 case ImPlotDateFmt_MoYr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d-%02d", year, mon);
1128 case ImPlotDateFmt_Mo: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "--%02d", mon);
1129 case ImPlotDateFmt_Yr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d", year);
1130 default: return 0;
1131 }
1132 }
1133 else {
1134 switch (fmt) {
1135 case ImPlotDateFmt_DayMo: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d/%d", mon, day);
1136 case ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d/%d/%02d", mon, day, yr);
1137 case ImPlotDateFmt_MoYr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%s %d", MONTH_ABRVS[Tm.tm_mon], year);
1138 case ImPlotDateFmt_Mo: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%s", MONTH_ABRVS[Tm.tm_mon]);
1139 case ImPlotDateFmt_Yr: return ImFormatString(buffer, size, "%d", year);
1140 default: return 0;
1141 }
1142 }
1143 }
1144
1145int FormatDateTime(const ImPlotTime& t, char* buffer, int size, ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmt) {
1146 int written = 0;
1147 if (fmt.Date != ImPlotDateFmt_None)
1148 written += FormatDate(t, buffer, size, fmt.Date, fmt.UseISO8601);
1149 if (fmt.Time != ImPlotTimeFmt_None) {
1150 if (fmt.Date != ImPlotDateFmt_None)
1151 buffer[written++] = ' ';
1152 written += FormatTime(t, &buffer[written], size - written, fmt.Time, fmt.Use24HourClock);
1153 }
1154 return written;
1155}
1156
1157inline float GetDateTimeWidth(ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmt) {
1158 static const ImPlotTime t_max_width = MakeTime(2888, 12, 22, 12, 58, 58, 888888); // best guess at time that maximizes pixel width
1159 char buffer[32];
1160 FormatDateTime(t_max_width, buffer, 32, fmt);
1161 return ImGui::CalcTextSize(buffer).x;
1162}
1163
1164inline bool TimeLabelSame(const char* l1, const char* l2) {
1165 size_t len1 = strlen(l1);
1166 size_t len2 = strlen(l2);
1167 size_t n = len1 < len2 ? len1 : len2;
1168 return strcmp(l1 + len1 - n, l2 + len2 - n) == 0;
1169}
1170
1171static const ImPlotDateTimeSpec TimeFormatLevel0[ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT] = {
1172 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_Us),
1173 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_SMs),
1174 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_S),
1175 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1176 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_Hr),
1177 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMo, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1178 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_Mo, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1179 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_Yr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None)
1180};
1181
1182static const ImPlotDateTimeSpec TimeFormatLevel1[ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT] = {
1183 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1184 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinS),
1185 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1186 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1187 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1188 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1189 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_Yr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1190 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_Yr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None)
1191};
1192
1193static const ImPlotDateTimeSpec TimeFormatLevel1First[ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT] = {
1194 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinS),
1195 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinS),
1196 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1197 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1198 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1199 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1200 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_Yr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1201 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_Yr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None)
1202};
1203
1204static const ImPlotDateTimeSpec TimeFormatMouseCursor[ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT] = {
1205 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_Us),
1206 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_SUs),
1207 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_SMs),
1208 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMinS),
1209 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_None, ImPlotTimeFmt_HrMin),
1210 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMo, ImPlotTimeFmt_Hr),
1211 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_DayMoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None),
1212 ImPlotDateTimeSpec(ImPlotDateFmt_MoYr, ImPlotTimeFmt_None)
1213};
1214
1215inline ImPlotDateTimeSpec GetDateTimeFmt(const ImPlotDateTimeSpec* ctx, ImPlotTimeUnit idx) {
1216 ImPlotStyle& style = GetStyle();
1217 ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmt = ctx[idx];
1218 fmt.UseISO8601 = style.UseISO8601;
1219 fmt.Use24HourClock = style.Use24HourClock;
1220 return fmt;
1221}
1222
1223void Locator_Time(ImPlotTicker& ticker, const ImPlotRange& range, float pixels, bool vertical, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* formatter_data) {
1224 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(vertical == false, "Cannot locate Time ticks on vertical axis!");
1225 (void)vertical;
1226 // get units for level 0 and level 1 labels
1227 const ImPlotTimeUnit unit0 = GetUnitForRange(range.Size() / (pixels / 100)); // level = 0 (top)
1228 const ImPlotTimeUnit unit1 = ImClamp(unit0 + 1, 0, ImPlotTimeUnit_COUNT-1); // level = 1 (bottom)
1229 // get time format specs
1230 const ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmt0 = GetDateTimeFmt(TimeFormatLevel0, unit0);
1231 const ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmt1 = GetDateTimeFmt(TimeFormatLevel1, unit1);
1232 const ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmtf = GetDateTimeFmt(TimeFormatLevel1First, unit1);
1233 // min max times
1234 const ImPlotTime t_min = ImPlotTime::FromDouble(range.Min);
1235 const ImPlotTime t_max = ImPlotTime::FromDouble(range.Max);
1236 // maximum allowable density of labels
1237 const float max_density = 0.5f;
1238 // book keeping
1239 int last_major_offset = -1;
1240 // formatter data
1241 Formatter_Time_Data ftd;
1242 ftd.UserFormatter = formatter;
1243 ftd.UserFormatterData = formatter_data;
1244 if (unit0 != ImPlotTimeUnit_Yr) {
1245 // pixels per major (level 1) division
1246 const float pix_per_major_div = pixels / (float)(range.Size() / TimeUnitSpans[unit1]);
1247 // nominal pixels taken up by labels
1248 const float fmt0_width = GetDateTimeWidth(fmt0);
1249 const float fmt1_width = GetDateTimeWidth(fmt1);
1250 const float fmtf_width = GetDateTimeWidth(fmtf);
1251 // the maximum number of minor (level 0) labels that can fit between major (level 1) divisions
1252 const int minor_per_major = (int)(max_density * pix_per_major_div / fmt0_width);
1253 // the minor step size (level 0)
1254 const int step = GetTimeStep(minor_per_major, unit0);
1255 // generate ticks
1256 ImPlotTime t1 = FloorTime(ImPlotTime::FromDouble(range.Min), unit1);
1257 while (t1 < t_max) {
1258 // get next major
1259 const ImPlotTime t2 = AddTime(t1, unit1, 1);
1260 // add major tick
1261 if (t1 >= t_min && t1 <= t_max) {
1262 // minor level 0 tick
1263 ftd.Time = t1; ftd.Spec = fmt0;
1264 ticker.AddTick(t1.ToDouble(), true, 0, true, Formatter_Time, &ftd);
1265 // major level 1 tick
1266 ftd.Time = t1; ftd.Spec = last_major_offset < 0 ? fmtf : fmt1;
1267 ImPlotTick& tick_maj = ticker.AddTick(t1.ToDouble(), true, 1, true, Formatter_Time, &ftd);
1268 const char* this_major = ticker.GetText(tick_maj);
1269 if (last_major_offset >= 0 && TimeLabelSame(ticker.TextBuffer.Buf.Data + last_major_offset, this_major))
1270 tick_maj.ShowLabel = false;
1271 last_major_offset = tick_maj.TextOffset;
1272 }
1273 // add minor ticks up until next major
1274 if (minor_per_major > 1 && (t_min <= t2 && t1 <= t_max)) {
1275 ImPlotTime t12 = AddTime(t1, unit0, step);
1276 while (t12 < t2) {
1277 float px_to_t2 = (float)((t2 - t12).ToDouble()/range.Size()) * pixels;
1278 if (t12 >= t_min && t12 <= t_max) {
1279 ftd.Time = t12; ftd.Spec = fmt0;
1280 ticker.AddTick(t12.ToDouble(), false, 0, px_to_t2 >= fmt0_width, Formatter_Time, &ftd);
1281 if (last_major_offset < 0 && px_to_t2 >= fmt0_width && px_to_t2 >= (fmt1_width + fmtf_width) / 2) {
1282 ftd.Time = t12; ftd.Spec = fmtf;
1283 ImPlotTick& tick_maj = ticker.AddTick(t12.ToDouble(), true, 1, true, Formatter_Time, &ftd);
1284 last_major_offset = tick_maj.TextOffset;
1285 }
1286 }
1287 t12 = AddTime(t12, unit0, step);
1288 }
1289 }
1290 t1 = t2;
1291 }
1292 }
1293 else {
1294 const ImPlotDateTimeSpec fmty = GetDateTimeFmt(TimeFormatLevel0, ImPlotTimeUnit_Yr);
1295 const float label_width = GetDateTimeWidth(fmty);
1296 const int max_labels = (int)(max_density * pixels / label_width);
1297 const int year_min = GetYear(t_min);
1298 const int year_max = GetYear(CeilTime(t_max, ImPlotTimeUnit_Yr));
1299 const double nice_range = NiceNum((year_max - year_min)*0.99,false);
1300 const double interval = NiceNum(nice_range / (max_labels - 1), true);
1301 const int graphmin = (int)(floor(year_min / interval) * interval);
1302 const int graphmax = (int)(ceil(year_max / interval) * interval);
1303 const int step = (int)interval <= 0 ? 1 : (int)interval;
1304
1305 for (int y = graphmin; y < graphmax; y += step) {
1306 ImPlotTime t = MakeTime(y);
1307 if (t >= t_min && t <= t_max) {
1308 ftd.Time = t; ftd.Spec = fmty;
1309 ticker.AddTick(t.ToDouble(), true, 0, true, Formatter_Time, &ftd);
1310 }
1311 }
1312 }
1313}
1314
1315//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1316// Context Menu
1317//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1318
1319template <typename F>
1320bool DragFloat(const char*, F*, float, F, F) {
1321 return false;
1322}
1323
1324template <>
1325bool DragFloat<double>(const char* label, double* v, float v_speed, double v_min, double v_max) {
1326 return ImGui::DragScalar(label, ImGuiDataType_Double, v, v_speed, &v_min, &v_max, "%.3g", 1);
1327}
1328
1329template <>
1330bool DragFloat<float>(const char* label, float* v, float v_speed, float v_min, float v_max) {
1331 return ImGui::DragScalar(label, ImGuiDataType_Float, v, v_speed, &v_min, &v_max, "%.3g", 1);
1332}
1333
1334inline void BeginDisabledControls(bool cond) {
1335 if (cond) {
1336 ImGui::PushItemFlag(ImGuiItemFlags_Disabled, true);
1337 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_Alpha, ImGui::GetStyle().Alpha * 0.25f);
1338 }
1339}
1340
1341inline void EndDisabledControls(bool cond) {
1342 if (cond) {
1343 ImGui::PopItemFlag();
1344 ImGui::PopStyleVar();
1345 }
1346}
1347
1348void ShowAxisContextMenu(ImPlotAxis& axis, ImPlotAxis* equal_axis, bool /*time_allowed*/) {
1349
1350 ImGui::PushItemWidth(75);
1351 bool always_locked = axis.IsRangeLocked() || axis.IsAutoFitting();
1352 bool label = axis.HasLabel();
1353 bool grid = axis.HasGridLines();
1354 bool ticks = axis.HasTickMarks();
1355 bool labels = axis.HasTickLabels();
1356 double drag_speed = (axis.Range.Size() <= DBL_EPSILON) ? DBL_EPSILON * 1.0e+13 : 0.01 * axis.Range.Size(); // recover from almost equal axis limits.
1357
1358 if (axis.Scale == ImPlotScale_Time) {
1359 ImPlotTime tmin = ImPlotTime::FromDouble(axis.Range.Min);
1360 ImPlotTime tmax = ImPlotTime::FromDouble(axis.Range.Max);
1361
1362 BeginDisabledControls(always_locked);
1363 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("##LockMin", (unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_LockMin);
1364 EndDisabledControls(always_locked);
1365 ImGui::SameLine();
1366 BeginDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMin() || always_locked);
1367 if (ImGui::BeginMenu("Min Time")) {
1368 if (ShowTimePicker("mintime", &tmin)) {
1369 if (tmin >= tmax)
1370 tmax = AddTime(tmin, ImPlotTimeUnit_S, 1);
1371 axis.SetRange(tmin.ToDouble(),tmax.ToDouble());
1372 }
1373 ImGui::Separator();
1374 if (ShowDatePicker("mindate",&axis.PickerLevel,&axis.PickerTimeMin,&tmin,&tmax)) {
1375 tmin = CombineDateTime(axis.PickerTimeMin, tmin);
1376 if (tmin >= tmax)
1377 tmax = AddTime(tmin, ImPlotTimeUnit_S, 1);
1378 axis.SetRange(tmin.ToDouble(), tmax.ToDouble());
1379 }
1380 ImGui::EndMenu();
1381 }
1382 EndDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMin() || always_locked);
1383
1384 BeginDisabledControls(always_locked);
1385 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("##LockMax", (unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_LockMax);
1386 EndDisabledControls(always_locked);
1387 ImGui::SameLine();
1388 BeginDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMax() || always_locked);
1389 if (ImGui::BeginMenu("Max Time")) {
1390 if (ShowTimePicker("maxtime", &tmax)) {
1391 if (tmax <= tmin)
1392 tmin = AddTime(tmax, ImPlotTimeUnit_S, -1);
1393 axis.SetRange(tmin.ToDouble(),tmax.ToDouble());
1394 }
1395 ImGui::Separator();
1396 if (ShowDatePicker("maxdate",&axis.PickerLevel,&axis.PickerTimeMax,&tmin,&tmax)) {
1397 tmax = CombineDateTime(axis.PickerTimeMax, tmax);
1398 if (tmax <= tmin)
1399 tmin = AddTime(tmax, ImPlotTimeUnit_S, -1);
1400 axis.SetRange(tmin.ToDouble(), tmax.ToDouble());
1401 }
1402 ImGui::EndMenu();
1403 }
1404 EndDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMax() || always_locked);
1405 }
1406 else {
1407 BeginDisabledControls(always_locked);
1408 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("##LockMin", (unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_LockMin);
1409 EndDisabledControls(always_locked);
1410 ImGui::SameLine();
1411 BeginDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMin() || always_locked);
1412 double temp_min = axis.Range.Min;
1413 if (DragFloat("Min", &temp_min, (float)drag_speed, -HUGE_VAL, axis.Range.Max - DBL_EPSILON)) {
1414 axis.SetMin(temp_min,true);
1415 if (equal_axis != nullptr)
1416 equal_axis->SetAspect(axis.GetAspect());
1417 }
1418 EndDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMin() || always_locked);
1419
1420 BeginDisabledControls(always_locked);
1421 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("##LockMax", (unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_LockMax);
1422 EndDisabledControls(always_locked);
1423 ImGui::SameLine();
1424 BeginDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMax() || always_locked);
1425 double temp_max = axis.Range.Max;
1426 if (DragFloat("Max", &temp_max, (float)drag_speed, axis.Range.Min + DBL_EPSILON, HUGE_VAL)) {
1427 axis.SetMax(temp_max,true);
1428 if (equal_axis != nullptr)
1429 equal_axis->SetAspect(axis.GetAspect());
1430 }
1431 EndDisabledControls(axis.IsLockedMax() || always_locked);
1432 }
1433
1434 ImGui::Separator();
1435
1436 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("Auto-Fit",(unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_AutoFit);
1437 // TODO
1438 // BeginDisabledControls(axis.IsTime() && time_allowed);
1439 // ImGui::CheckboxFlags("Log Scale",(unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_LogScale);
1440 // EndDisabledControls(axis.IsTime() && time_allowed);
1441 // if (time_allowed) {
1442 // BeginDisabledControls(axis.IsLog() || axis.IsSymLog());
1443 // ImGui::CheckboxFlags("Time",(unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_Time);
1444 // EndDisabledControls(axis.IsLog() || axis.IsSymLog());
1445 // }
1446 ImGui::Separator();
1447 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("Invert",(unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_Invert);
1448 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("Opposite",(unsigned int*)&axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite);
1449 ImGui::Separator();
1450 BeginDisabledControls(axis.LabelOffset == -1);
1451 if (ImGui::Checkbox("Label", &label))
1452 ImFlipFlag(axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoLabel);
1453 EndDisabledControls(axis.LabelOffset == -1);
1454 if (ImGui::Checkbox("Grid Lines", &grid))
1455 ImFlipFlag(axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoGridLines);
1456 if (ImGui::Checkbox("Tick Marks", &ticks))
1457 ImFlipFlag(axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoTickMarks);
1458 if (ImGui::Checkbox("Tick Labels", &labels))
1459 ImFlipFlag(axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoTickLabels);
1460
1461}
1462
1463bool ShowLegendContextMenu(ImPlotLegend& legend, bool visible) {
1464 const float s = ImGui::GetFrameHeight();
1465 bool ret = false;
1466 if (ImGui::Checkbox("Show",&visible))
1467 ret = true;
1468 if (legend.CanGoInside)
1469 ImGui::CheckboxFlags("Outside",(unsigned int*)&legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Outside);
1470 if (ImGui::RadioButton("H", ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal)))
1471 legend.Flags |= ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal;
1472 ImGui::SameLine();
1473 if (ImGui::RadioButton("V", !ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal)))
1474 legend.Flags &= ~ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal;
1475 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_ItemSpacing, ImVec2(2,2));
1476 if (ImGui::Button("NW",ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_NorthWest; } ImGui::SameLine();
1477 if (ImGui::Button("N", ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_North; } ImGui::SameLine();
1478 if (ImGui::Button("NE",ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_NorthEast; }
1479 if (ImGui::Button("W", ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_West; } ImGui::SameLine();
1480 if (ImGui::InvisibleButton("C", ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { } ImGui::SameLine();
1481 if (ImGui::Button("E", ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_East; }
1482 if (ImGui::Button("SW",ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_SouthWest; } ImGui::SameLine();
1483 if (ImGui::Button("S", ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_South; } ImGui::SameLine();
1484 if (ImGui::Button("SE",ImVec2(1.5f*s,s))) { legend.Location = ImPlotLocation_SouthEast; }
1485 ImGui::PopStyleVar();
1486 return ret;
1487}
1488
1489void ShowSubplotsContextMenu(ImPlotSubplot& subplot) {
1490 if ((ImGui::BeginMenu("Linking"))) {
1491 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Link Rows",nullptr,ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkRows)))
1492 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkRows);
1493 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Link Cols",nullptr,ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkCols)))
1494 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkCols);
1495 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Link All X",nullptr,ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkAllX)))
1496 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkAllX);
1497 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Link All Y",nullptr,ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkAllY)))
1498 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkAllY);
1499 ImGui::EndMenu();
1500 }
1501 if ((ImGui::BeginMenu("Settings"))) {
1502 BeginDisabledControls(!subplot.HasTitle);
1503 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Title",nullptr,subplot.HasTitle && !ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoTitle)))
1504 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoTitle);
1505 EndDisabledControls(!subplot.HasTitle);
1506 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Resizable",nullptr,!ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoResize)))
1507 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoResize);
1508 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Align",nullptr,!ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoAlign)))
1509 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoAlign);
1510 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Share Items",nullptr,ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_ShareItems)))
1511 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_ShareItems);
1512 ImGui::EndMenu();
1513 }
1514}
1515
1516void ShowPlotContextMenu(ImPlotPlot& plot) {
1517 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1518 const bool owns_legend = gp.CurrentItems == &plot.Items;
1519 const bool equal = ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Equal);
1520
1521 char buf[16] = {};
1522
1523 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
1524 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
1525 if (!x_axis.Enabled || !x_axis.HasMenus())
1526 continue;
1527 ImGui::PushID(i);
1528 ImFormatString(buf, sizeof(buf) - 1, i == 0 ? "X-Axis" : "X-Axis %d", i + 1);
1529 if (ImGui::BeginMenu(x_axis.HasLabel() ? plot.GetAxisLabel(x_axis) : buf)) {
1530 ShowAxisContextMenu(x_axis, equal ? x_axis.OrthoAxis : nullptr, false);
1531 ImGui::EndMenu();
1532 }
1533 ImGui::PopID();
1534 }
1535
1536 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
1537 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
1538 if (!y_axis.Enabled || !y_axis.HasMenus())
1539 continue;
1540 ImGui::PushID(i);
1541 ImFormatString(buf, sizeof(buf) - 1, i == 0 ? "Y-Axis" : "Y-Axis %d", i + 1);
1542 if (ImGui::BeginMenu(y_axis.HasLabel() ? plot.GetAxisLabel(y_axis) : buf)) {
1543 ShowAxisContextMenu(y_axis, equal ? y_axis.OrthoAxis : nullptr, false);
1544 ImGui::EndMenu();
1545 }
1546 ImGui::PopID();
1547 }
1548
1549 ImGui::Separator();
1550 if (!ImHasFlag(gp.CurrentItems->Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoMenus)) {
1551 if ((ImGui::BeginMenu("Legend"))) {
1552 if (owns_legend) {
1553 if (ShowLegendContextMenu(plot.Items.Legend, !ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend)))
1554 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend);
1555 }
1556 else if (gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr) {
1557 if (ShowLegendContextMenu(gp.CurrentSubplot->Items.Legend, !ImHasFlag(gp.CurrentSubplot->Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoLegend)))
1558 ImFlipFlag(gp.CurrentSubplot->Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoLegend);
1559 }
1560 ImGui::EndMenu();
1561 }
1562 }
1563 if ((ImGui::BeginMenu("Settings"))) {
1564 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Equal", nullptr, ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Equal)))
1565 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Equal);
1566 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Box Select",nullptr,!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoBoxSelect)))
1567 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoBoxSelect);
1568 BeginDisabledControls(plot.TitleOffset == -1);
1569 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Title",nullptr,plot.HasTitle()))
1570 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoTitle);
1571 EndDisabledControls(plot.TitleOffset == -1);
1572 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Mouse Position",nullptr,!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoMouseText)))
1573 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoMouseText);
1574 if (ImGui::MenuItem("Crosshairs",nullptr,ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Crosshairs)))
1575 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Crosshairs);
1576 ImGui::EndMenu();
1577 }
1578 if (gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr && !ImHasFlag(gp.CurrentSubplot->Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoMenus)) {
1579 ImGui::Separator();
1580 if ((ImGui::BeginMenu("Subplots"))) {
1581 ShowSubplotsContextMenu(*gp.CurrentSubplot);
1582 ImGui::EndMenu();
1583 }
1584 }
1585}
1586
1587//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1588// Axis Utils
1589//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1590
1591static inline int AxisPrecision(const ImPlotAxis& axis) {
1592 const double range = axis.Ticker.TickCount() > 1 ? (axis.Ticker.Ticks[1].PlotPos - axis.Ticker.Ticks[0].PlotPos) : axis.Range.Size();
1593 return Precision(range);
1594}
1595
1596static inline double RoundAxisValue(const ImPlotAxis& axis, double value) {
1597 return RoundTo(value, AxisPrecision(axis));
1598}
1599
1600void LabelAxisValue(const ImPlotAxis& axis, double value, char* buff, int size, bool round) {
1601 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1602 // TODO: We shouldn't explicitly check that the axis is Time here. Ideally,
1603 // Formatter_Time would handle the formatting for us, but the code below
1604 // needs additional arguments which are not currently available in ImPlotFormatter
1605 if (axis.Locator == Locator_Time) {
1606 ImPlotTimeUnit unit = axis.Vertical
1607 ? GetUnitForRange(axis.Range.Size() / (gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.GetHeight() / 100)) // TODO: magic value!
1608 : GetUnitForRange(axis.Range.Size() / (gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.GetWidth() / 100)); // TODO: magic value!
1609 FormatDateTime(ImPlotTime::FromDouble(value), buff, size, GetDateTimeFmt(TimeFormatMouseCursor, unit));
1610 }
1611 else {
1612 if (round)
1613 value = RoundAxisValue(axis, value);
1614 axis.Formatter(value, buff, size, axis.FormatterData);
1615 }
1616}
1617
1618void UpdateAxisColors(ImPlotAxis& axis) {
1619 const ImVec4 col_grid = GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_AxisGrid);
1620 axis.ColorMaj = ImGui::GetColorU32(col_grid);
1621 axis.ColorMin = ImGui::GetColorU32(col_grid*ImVec4(1,1,1,GImPlot->Style.MinorAlpha));
1622 axis.ColorTick = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_AxisTick);
1623 axis.ColorTxt = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_AxisText);
1624 axis.ColorBg = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_AxisBg);
1625 axis.ColorHov = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_AxisBgHovered);
1626 axis.ColorAct = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_AxisBgActive);
1627 // axis.ColorHiLi = IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS;
1628}
1629
1630void PadAndDatumAxesX(ImPlotPlot& plot, float& pad_T, float& pad_B, ImPlotAlignmentData* align) {
1631
1632 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1633
1634 const float T = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
1635 const float P = gp.Style.LabelPadding.y;
1636 const float K = gp.Style.MinorTickLen.x;
1637
1638 int count_T = 0;
1639 int count_B = 0;
1640 float last_T = plot.AxesRect.Min.y;
1641 float last_B = plot.AxesRect.Max.y;
1642
1643 for (int i = IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i-- > 0;) { // FYI: can iterate forward
1644 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.XAxis(i);
1645 if (!axis.Enabled)
1646 continue;
1647 const bool label = axis.HasLabel();
1648 const bool ticks = axis.HasTickLabels();
1649 const bool opp = axis.IsOpposite();
1650 const bool time = axis.Scale == ImPlotScale_Time;
1651 if (opp) {
1652 if (count_T++ > 0)
1653 pad_T += K + P;
1654 if (label)
1655 pad_T += T + P;
1656 if (ticks)
1657 pad_T += ImMax(T, axis.Ticker.MaxSize.y) + P + (time ? T + P : 0);
1658 axis.Datum1 = plot.CanvasRect.Min.y + pad_T;
1659 axis.Datum2 = last_T;
1660 last_T = axis.Datum1;
1661 }
1662 else {
1663 if (count_B++ > 0)
1664 pad_B += K + P;
1665 if (label)
1666 pad_B += T + P;
1667 if (ticks)
1668 pad_B += ImMax(T, axis.Ticker.MaxSize.y) + P + (time ? T + P : 0);
1669 axis.Datum1 = plot.CanvasRect.Max.y - pad_B;
1670 axis.Datum2 = last_B;
1671 last_B = axis.Datum1;
1672 }
1673 }
1674
1675 if (align) {
1676 count_T = count_B = 0;
1677 float delta_T, delta_B;
1678 align->Update(pad_T,pad_B,delta_T,delta_B);
1679 for (int i = IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i-- > 0;) {
1680 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.XAxis(i);
1681 if (!axis.Enabled)
1682 continue;
1683 if (axis.IsOpposite()) {
1684 axis.Datum1 += delta_T;
1685 axis.Datum2 += count_T++ > 1 ? delta_T : 0;
1686 }
1687 else {
1688 axis.Datum1 -= delta_B;
1689 axis.Datum2 -= count_B++ > 1 ? delta_B : 0;
1690 }
1691 }
1692 }
1693}
1694
1695void PadAndDatumAxesY(ImPlotPlot& plot, float& pad_L, float& pad_R, ImPlotAlignmentData* align) {
1696
1697 // [ pad_L ] [ pad_R ]
1698 // .................CanvasRect................
1699 // :TPWPK.PTPWP _____PlotRect____ PWPTP.KPWPT:
1700 // :A # |- A # |- -| # A -| # A:
1701 // :X | X | | X | x:
1702 // :I # |- I # |- -| # I -| # I:
1703 // :S | S | | S | S:
1704 // :3 # |- 0 # |-_______________-| # 1 -| # 2:
1705 // :.........................................:
1706 //
1707 // T = text height
1708 // P = label padding
1709 // K = minor tick length
1710 // W = label width
1711
1712 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1713
1714 const float T = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
1715 const float P = gp.Style.LabelPadding.x;
1716 const float K = gp.Style.MinorTickLen.y;
1717
1718 int count_L = 0;
1719 int count_R = 0;
1720 float last_L = plot.AxesRect.Min.x;
1721 float last_R = plot.AxesRect.Max.x;
1722
1723 for (int i = IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i-- > 0;) { // FYI: can iterate forward
1724 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.YAxis(i);
1725 if (!axis.Enabled)
1726 continue;
1727 const bool label = axis.HasLabel();
1728 const bool ticks = axis.HasTickLabels();
1729 const bool opp = axis.IsOpposite();
1730 if (opp) {
1731 if (count_R++ > 0)
1732 pad_R += K + P;
1733 if (label)
1734 pad_R += T + P;
1735 if (ticks)
1736 pad_R += axis.Ticker.MaxSize.x + P;
1737 axis.Datum1 = plot.CanvasRect.Max.x - pad_R;
1738 axis.Datum2 = last_R;
1739 last_R = axis.Datum1;
1740 }
1741 else {
1742 if (count_L++ > 0)
1743 pad_L += K + P;
1744 if (label)
1745 pad_L += T + P;
1746 if (ticks)
1747 pad_L += axis.Ticker.MaxSize.x + P;
1748 axis.Datum1 = plot.CanvasRect.Min.x + pad_L;
1749 axis.Datum2 = last_L;
1750 last_L = axis.Datum1;
1751 }
1752 }
1753
1754 plot.PlotRect.Min.x = plot.CanvasRect.Min.x + pad_L;
1755 plot.PlotRect.Max.x = plot.CanvasRect.Max.x - pad_R;
1756
1757 if (align) {
1758 count_L = count_R = 0;
1759 float delta_L, delta_R;
1760 align->Update(pad_L,pad_R,delta_L,delta_R);
1761 for (int i = IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i-- > 0;) {
1762 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.YAxis(i);
1763 if (!axis.Enabled)
1764 continue;
1765 if (axis.IsOpposite()) {
1766 axis.Datum1 -= delta_R;
1767 axis.Datum2 -= count_R++ > 1 ? delta_R : 0;
1768 }
1769 else {
1770 axis.Datum1 += delta_L;
1771 axis.Datum2 += count_L++ > 1 ? delta_L : 0;
1772 }
1773 }
1774 }
1775}
1776
1777//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1778// RENDERING
1779//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1780
1781static inline void RenderGridLinesX(ImDrawList& DrawList, const ImPlotTicker& ticker, const ImRect& rect, ImU32 col_maj, ImU32 col_min, float size_maj, float size_min) {
1782 const float density = ticker.TickCount() / rect.GetWidth();
1783 ImVec4 col_min4 = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(col_min);
1784 col_min4.w *= ImClamp(ImRemap(density, 0.1f, 0.2f, 1.0f, 0.0f), 0.0f, 1.0f);
1785 col_min = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(col_min4);
1786 for (int t = 0; t < ticker.TickCount(); t++) {
1787 const ImPlotTick& xt = ticker.Ticks[t];
1788 if (xt.PixelPos < rect.Min.x || xt.PixelPos > rect.Max.x)
1789 continue;
1790 if (xt.Level == 0) {
1791 if (xt.Major)
1792 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(xt.PixelPos, rect.Min.y), ImVec2(xt.PixelPos, rect.Max.y), col_maj, size_maj);
1793 else if (density < 0.2f)
1794 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(xt.PixelPos, rect.Min.y), ImVec2(xt.PixelPos, rect.Max.y), col_min, size_min);
1795 }
1796 }
1797}
1798
1799static inline void RenderGridLinesY(ImDrawList& DrawList, const ImPlotTicker& ticker, const ImRect& rect, ImU32 col_maj, ImU32 col_min, float size_maj, float size_min) {
1800 const float density = ticker.TickCount() / rect.GetHeight();
1801 ImVec4 col_min4 = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(col_min);
1802 col_min4.w *= ImClamp(ImRemap(density, 0.1f, 0.2f, 1.0f, 0.0f), 0.0f, 1.0f);
1803 col_min = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(col_min4);
1804 for (int t = 0; t < ticker.TickCount(); t++) {
1805 const ImPlotTick& yt = ticker.Ticks[t];
1806 if (yt.PixelPos < rect.Min.y || yt.PixelPos > rect.Max.y)
1807 continue;
1808 if (yt.Major)
1809 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(rect.Min.x, yt.PixelPos), ImVec2(rect.Max.x, yt.PixelPos), col_maj, size_maj);
1810 else if (density < 0.2f)
1811 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(rect.Min.x, yt.PixelPos), ImVec2(rect.Max.x, yt.PixelPos), col_min, size_min);
1812 }
1813}
1814
1815static inline void RenderSelectionRect(ImDrawList& DrawList, const ImVec2& p_min, const ImVec2& p_max, const ImVec4& col) {
1816 const ImU32 col_bg = ImGui::GetColorU32(col * ImVec4(1,1,1,0.25f));
1817 const ImU32 col_bd = ImGui::GetColorU32(col);
1818 DrawList.AddRectFilled(p_min, p_max, col_bg);
1819 DrawList.AddRect(p_min, p_max, col_bd);
1820}
1821
1822//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1823// Input Handling
1824//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1825
1826static const float MOUSE_CURSOR_DRAG_THRESHOLD = 5.0f;
1827static const float BOX_SELECT_DRAG_THRESHOLD = 4.0f;
1828
1829bool UpdateInput(ImPlotPlot& plot) {
1830
1831 bool changed = false;
1832
1833 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
1834 ImGuiIO& IO = ImGui::GetIO();
1835
