1836 // BUTTON STATE -----------------------------------------------------------
1837
1838 const ImGuiButtonFlags plot_button_flags = ImGuiButtonFlags_AllowOverlap
1839 | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnClick
1840 | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnDoubleClick
1841 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonLeft
1842 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonRight
1843 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonMiddle;
1844 const ImGuiButtonFlags axis_button_flags = ImGuiButtonFlags_FlattenChildren
1845 | plot_button_flags;
1846
1847 const bool plot_clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(plot.PlotRect,plot.ID,&plot.Hovered,&plot.Held,plot_button_flags);
1848#if (IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 18966)
1849 ImGui::SetItemAllowOverlap(); // Handled by ButtonBehavior()
1850#endif
1851
1852 if (plot_clicked) {
1853 if (!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoBoxSelect) && IO.MouseClicked[gp.InputMap.Select] && ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods, gp.InputMap.SelectMod)) {
1854 plot.Selecting = true;
1855 plot.SelectStart = IO.MousePos;
1856 plot.SelectRect = ImRect(0,0,0,0);
1857 }
1858 if (IO.MouseDoubleClicked[gp.InputMap.Fit]) {
1859 plot.FitThisFrame = true;
1860 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i)
1861 plot.Axes[i].FitThisFrame = true;
1862 }
1863 }
1864
1865 const bool can_pan = IO.MouseDown[gp.InputMap.Pan] && ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods, gp.InputMap.PanMod);
1866
1867 plot.Held = plot.Held && can_pan;
1868
1869 bool x_click[IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES] = {false};
1870 bool x_held[IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES] = {false};
1871 bool x_hov[IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES] = {false};
1872
1873 bool y_click[IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES] = {false};
1874 bool y_held[IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES] = {false};
1875 bool y_hov[IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES] = {false};
1876
1877 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; ++i) {
1878 ImPlotAxis& xax = plot.XAxis(i);
1879 if (xax.Enabled) {
1880 ImGui::KeepAliveID(xax.ID);
1881 x_click[i] = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(xax.HoverRect,xax.ID,&xax.Hovered,&xax.Held,axis_button_flags);
1882 if (x_click[i] && IO.MouseDoubleClicked[gp.InputMap.Fit])
1883 plot.FitThisFrame = xax.FitThisFrame = true;
1884 xax.Held = xax.Held && can_pan;
1885 x_hov[i] = xax.Hovered || plot.Hovered;
1886 x_held[i] = xax.Held || plot.Held;
1887 }
1888 }
1889
1890 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; ++i) {
1891 ImPlotAxis& yax = plot.YAxis(i);
1892 if (yax.Enabled) {
1893 ImGui::KeepAliveID(yax.ID);
1894 y_click[i] = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(yax.HoverRect,yax.ID,&yax.Hovered,&yax.Held,axis_button_flags);
1895 if (y_click[i] && IO.MouseDoubleClicked[gp.InputMap.Fit])
1896 plot.FitThisFrame = yax.FitThisFrame = true;
1897 yax.Held = yax.Held && can_pan;
1898 y_hov[i] = yax.Hovered || plot.Hovered;
1899 y_held[i] = yax.Held || plot.Held;
1900 }
1901 }
1902
1903 // cancel due to DND activity
1904 if (GImGui->DragDropActive || (IO.KeyMods == gp.InputMap.OverrideMod && gp.InputMap.OverrideMod != 0))
1905 return false;
1906
1907 // STATE -------------------------------------------------------------------
1908
1909 const bool axis_equal = ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Equal);
1910
1911 const bool any_x_hov = plot.Hovered || AnyAxesHovered(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_X1], IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES);
1912 const bool any_x_held = plot.Held || AnyAxesHeld(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_X1], IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES);
1913 const bool any_y_hov = plot.Hovered || AnyAxesHovered(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_Y1], IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES);
1914 const bool any_y_held = plot.Held || AnyAxesHeld(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_Y1], IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES);
1915 const bool any_hov = any_x_hov || any_y_hov;
1916 const bool any_held = any_x_held || any_y_held;
1917
1918 const ImVec2 select_drag = ImGui::GetMouseDragDelta(gp.InputMap.Select);
1919 const ImVec2 pan_drag = ImGui::GetMouseDragDelta(gp.InputMap.Pan);
1920 const float select_drag_sq = ImLengthSqr(select_drag);
1921 const float pan_drag_sq = ImLengthSqr(pan_drag);
1922 const bool selecting = plot.Selecting && select_drag_sq > MOUSE_CURSOR_DRAG_THRESHOLD;
1923 const bool panning = any_held && pan_drag_sq > MOUSE_CURSOR_DRAG_THRESHOLD;
1924
1925 // CONTEXT MENU -----------------------------------------------------------
1926
1927 if (IO.MouseReleased[gp.InputMap.Menu] && !plot.ContextLocked)
1928 gp.OpenContextThisFrame = true;
1929
1930 if (selecting || panning)
1931 plot.ContextLocked = true;
1932 else if (!(IO.MouseDown[gp.InputMap.Menu] || IO.MouseReleased[gp.InputMap.Menu]))
1933 plot.ContextLocked = false;
1934
1935 // DRAG INPUT -------------------------------------------------------------
1936
1937 if (any_held && !plot.Selecting) {
1938 int drag_direction = 0;
1939 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
1940 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
1941 if (x_held[i] && !x_axis.IsInputLocked()) {
1942 drag_direction |= (1 << 1);
1943 bool increasing = x_axis.IsInverted() ? IO.MouseDelta.x > 0 : IO.MouseDelta.x < 0;
1944 if (IO.MouseDelta.x != 0 && !x_axis.IsPanLocked(increasing)) {
1945 const double plot_l = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Min.x - IO.MouseDelta.x);
1946 const double plot_r = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Max.x - IO.MouseDelta.x);
1947 x_axis.SetMin(x_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_r : plot_l);
1948 x_axis.SetMax(x_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_l : plot_r);
1949 if (axis_equal && x_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr)
1950 x_axis.OrthoAxis->SetAspect(x_axis.GetAspect());
1951 changed = true;
1952 }
1953 }
1954 }
1955 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
1956 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
1957 if (y_held[i] && !y_axis.IsInputLocked()) {
1958 drag_direction |= (1 << 2);
1959 bool increasing = y_axis.IsInverted() ? IO.MouseDelta.y < 0 : IO.MouseDelta.y > 0;
1960 if (IO.MouseDelta.y != 0 && !y_axis.IsPanLocked(increasing)) {
1961 const double plot_t = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Min.y - IO.MouseDelta.y);
1962 const double plot_b = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Max.y - IO.MouseDelta.y);
1963 y_axis.SetMin(y_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_t : plot_b);
1964 y_axis.SetMax(y_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_b : plot_t);
1965 if (axis_equal && y_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr)
1966 y_axis.OrthoAxis->SetAspect(y_axis.GetAspect());
1967 changed = true;
1968 }
1969 }
1970 }
1971 if (IO.MouseDragMaxDistanceSqr[gp.InputMap.Pan] > MOUSE_CURSOR_DRAG_THRESHOLD) {
1972 switch (drag_direction) {
1973 case 0 : ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_NotAllowed); break;
1974 case (1 << 1) : ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeEW); break;
1975 case (1 << 2) : ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNS); break;
1976 default : ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeAll); break;
1977 }
1978 }
1979 }
1980
1981 // SCROLL INPUT -----------------------------------------------------------
1982
1983 if (any_hov && ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods, gp.InputMap.ZoomMod)) {
1984
1985 float zoom_rate = gp.InputMap.ZoomRate;
1986 if (IO.MouseWheel == 0.0f)
1987 zoom_rate = 0;
1988 else if (IO.MouseWheel > 0)
1989 zoom_rate = (-zoom_rate) / (1.0f + (2.0f * zoom_rate));
1990 ImVec2 rect_size = plot.PlotRect.GetSize();
1991 float tx = ImRemap(IO.MousePos.x, plot.PlotRect.Min.x, plot.PlotRect.Max.x, 0.0f, 1.0f);
1992 float ty = ImRemap(IO.MousePos.y, plot.PlotRect.Min.y, plot.PlotRect.Max.y, 0.0f, 1.0f);
1993
1994 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
1995 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
1996 const bool equal_zoom = axis_equal && x_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr;
1997 const bool equal_locked = (equal_zoom != false) && x_axis.OrthoAxis->IsInputLocked();
1998 if (x_hov[i] && !x_axis.IsInputLocked() && !equal_locked) {
1999 ImGui::SetKeyOwner(ImGuiKey_MouseWheelY, plot.ID);
2000 if (zoom_rate != 0.0f) {
2001 float correction = (plot.Hovered && equal_zoom) ? 0.5f : 1.0f;
2002 const double plot_l = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Min.x - rect_size.x * tx * zoom_rate * correction);
2003 const double plot_r = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Max.x + rect_size.x * (1 - tx) * zoom_rate * correction);
2004 x_axis.SetMin(x_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_r : plot_l);
2005 x_axis.SetMax(x_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_l : plot_r);
2006 if (axis_equal && x_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr)
2007 x_axis.OrthoAxis->SetAspect(x_axis.GetAspect());
2008 changed = true;
2009 }
2010 }
2011 }
2012 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2013 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
2014 const bool equal_zoom = axis_equal && y_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr;
2015 const bool equal_locked = equal_zoom && y_axis.OrthoAxis->IsInputLocked();
2016 if (y_hov[i] && !y_axis.IsInputLocked() && !equal_locked) {
2017 ImGui::SetKeyOwner(ImGuiKey_MouseWheelY, plot.ID);
2018 if (zoom_rate != 0.0f) {
2019 float correction = (plot.Hovered && equal_zoom) ? 0.5f : 1.0f;
2020 const double plot_t = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Min.y - rect_size.y * ty * zoom_rate * correction);
2021 const double plot_b = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.PlotRect.Max.y + rect_size.y * (1 - ty) * zoom_rate * correction);
2022 y_axis.SetMin(y_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_t : plot_b);
2023 y_axis.SetMax(y_axis.IsInverted() ? plot_b : plot_t);
2024 if (axis_equal && y_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr)
2025 y_axis.OrthoAxis->SetAspect(y_axis.GetAspect());
2026 changed = true;
2027 }
2028 }
2029 }
2030 }
2031
2032 // BOX-SELECTION ----------------------------------------------------------
2033
2034 if (plot.Selecting) {
2035 const ImVec2 d = plot.SelectStart - IO.MousePos;
2036 const bool x_can_change = !ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods,gp.InputMap.SelectHorzMod) && ImFabs(d.x) > 2;
2037 const bool y_can_change = !ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods,gp.InputMap.SelectVertMod) && ImFabs(d.y) > 2;
2038 // confirm
2039 if (IO.MouseReleased[gp.InputMap.Select]) {
2040 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
2041 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2042 if (!x_axis.IsInputLocked() && x_can_change) {
2043 const double p1 = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.SelectStart.x);
2044 const double p2 = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(IO.MousePos.x);
2045 x_axis.SetMin(ImMin(p1, p2));
2046 x_axis.SetMax(ImMax(p1, p2));
2047 changed = true;
2048 }
2049 }
2050 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2051 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
2052 if (!y_axis.IsInputLocked() && y_can_change) {
2053 const double p1 = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(plot.SelectStart.y);
2054 const double p2 = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(IO.MousePos.y);
2055 y_axis.SetMin(ImMin(p1, p2));
2056 y_axis.SetMax(ImMax(p1, p2));
2057 changed = true;
2058 }
2059 }
2060 if (x_can_change || y_can_change || (ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods,gp.InputMap.SelectHorzMod) && ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods,gp.InputMap.SelectVertMod)))
2061 gp.OpenContextThisFrame = false;
2062 plot.Selected = plot.Selecting = false;
2063 }
2064 // cancel
2065 else if (IO.MouseReleased[gp.InputMap.SelectCancel]) {
2066 plot.Selected = plot.Selecting = false;
2067 gp.OpenContextThisFrame = false;
2068 }
2069 else if (ImLengthSqr(d) > BOX_SELECT_DRAG_THRESHOLD) {
2070 // bad selection
2071 if (plot.IsInputLocked()) {
2072 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_NotAllowed);
2073 gp.OpenContextThisFrame = false;
2074 plot.Selected = false;
2075 }
2076 else {
2077 // TODO: Handle only min or max locked cases
2078 const bool full_width = ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods, gp.InputMap.SelectHorzMod) || AllAxesInputLocked(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_X1], IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES);
2079 const bool full_height = ImHasFlag(IO.KeyMods, gp.InputMap.SelectVertMod) || AllAxesInputLocked(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_Y1], IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES);
2080 plot.SelectRect.Min.x = full_width ? plot.PlotRect.Min.x : ImMin(plot.SelectStart.x, IO.MousePos.x);
2081 plot.SelectRect.Max.x = full_width ? plot.PlotRect.Max.x : ImMax(plot.SelectStart.x, IO.MousePos.x);
2082 plot.SelectRect.Min.y = full_height ? plot.PlotRect.Min.y : ImMin(plot.SelectStart.y, IO.MousePos.y);
2083 plot.SelectRect.Max.y = full_height ? plot.PlotRect.Max.y : ImMax(plot.SelectStart.y, IO.MousePos.y);
2084 plot.SelectRect.Min -= plot.PlotRect.Min;
2085 plot.SelectRect.Max -= plot.PlotRect.Min;
2086 plot.Selected = true;
2087 }
2088 }
2089 else {
2090 plot.Selected = false;
2091 }
2092 }
2093 return changed;
2094}
2095
2096//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2097// Next Plot Data (Legacy)
2098//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2099
2100void ApplyNextPlotData(ImAxis idx) {
2101 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2102 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2103 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2104 if (!axis.Enabled)
2105 return;
2106 double* npd_lmin = gp.NextPlotData.LinkedMin[idx];
2107 double* npd_lmax = gp.NextPlotData.LinkedMax[idx];
2108 bool npd_rngh = gp.NextPlotData.HasRange[idx];
2109 ImPlotCond npd_rngc = gp.NextPlotData.RangeCond[idx];
2110 ImPlotRange npd_rngv = gp.NextPlotData.Range[idx];
2111 axis.LinkedMin = npd_lmin;
2112 axis.LinkedMax = npd_lmax;
2113 axis.PullLinks();
2114 if (npd_rngh) {
2115 if (!plot.Initialized || npd_rngc == ImPlotCond_Always)
2116 axis.SetRange(npd_rngv);
2117 }
2118 axis.HasRange = npd_rngh;
2119 axis.RangeCond = npd_rngc;
2120}
2121
2122//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2123// Setup
2124//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2125
2126void SetupAxis(ImAxis idx, const char* label, ImPlotAxisFlags flags) {
2127 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2128 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2129 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2130 // get plot and axis
2131 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2132 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2133 // set ID
2134 axis.ID = plot.ID + idx + 1;
2135 // check and set flags
2136 if (plot.JustCreated || flags != axis.PreviousFlags)
2137 axis.Flags = flags;
2138 axis.PreviousFlags = flags;
2139 // enable axis
2140 axis.Enabled = true;
2141 // set label
2142 plot.SetAxisLabel(axis,label);
2143 // cache colors
2144 UpdateAxisColors(axis);
2145}
2146
2147void SetupAxisLimits(ImAxis idx, double min_lim, double max_lim, ImPlotCond cond) {
2148 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2149 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2150 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!"); // get plot and axis
2151 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2152 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2153 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2154 if (!plot.Initialized || cond == ImPlotCond_Always)
2155 axis.SetRange(min_lim, max_lim);
2156 axis.HasRange = true;
2157 axis.RangeCond = cond;
2158}
2159
2160void SetupAxisFormat(ImAxis idx, const char* fmt) {
2161 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2162 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2163 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2164 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2165 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2166 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2167 axis.HasFormatSpec = fmt != nullptr;
2168 if (fmt != nullptr)
2169 ImStrncpy(axis.FormatSpec,fmt,sizeof(axis.FormatSpec));
2170}
2171
2172void SetupAxisLinks(ImAxis idx, double* min_lnk, double* max_lnk) {
2173 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2174 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2175 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2176 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2177 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2178 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2179 axis.LinkedMin = min_lnk;
2180 axis.LinkedMax = max_lnk;
2181 axis.PullLinks();
2182}
2183
2184void SetupAxisFormat(ImAxis idx, ImPlotFormatter formatter, void* data) {
2185 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2186 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2187 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2188 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2189 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2190 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2191 axis.Formatter = formatter;
2192 axis.FormatterData = data;
2193}
2194
2195void SetupAxisTicks(ImAxis idx, const double* values, int n_ticks, const char* const labels[], bool show_default) {
2196 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2197 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2198 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2199 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2200 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2201 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2202 axis.ShowDefaultTicks = show_default;
2203 AddTicksCustom(values,
2204 labels,
2205 n_ticks,
2206 axis.Ticker,
2207 axis.Formatter ? axis.Formatter : Formatter_Default,
2208 (axis.Formatter && axis.FormatterData) ? axis.FormatterData : axis.HasFormatSpec ? axis.FormatSpec : (void*)IMPLOT_LABEL_FORMAT);
2209}
2210
2211void SetupAxisTicks(ImAxis idx, double v_min, double v_max, int n_ticks, const char* const labels[], bool show_default) {
2212 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2213 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2214 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2215 n_ticks = n_ticks < 2 ? 2 : n_ticks;
2216 FillRange(gp.TempDouble1, n_ticks, v_min, v_max);
2217 SetupAxisTicks(idx, gp.TempDouble1.Data, n_ticks, labels, show_default);
2218}
2219
2220void SetupAxisScale(ImAxis idx, ImPlotScale scale) {
2221 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2222 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2223 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2224 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2225 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2226 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2227 axis.Scale = scale;
2228 switch (scale)
2229 {
2230 case ImPlotScale_Time:
2231 axis.TransformForward = nullptr;
2232 axis.TransformInverse = nullptr;
2233 axis.TransformData = nullptr;
2234 axis.Locator = Locator_Time;
2235 axis.ConstraintRange = ImPlotRange(IMPLOT_MIN_TIME, IMPLOT_MAX_TIME);
2236 axis.Ticker.Levels = 2;
2237 break;
2238 case ImPlotScale_Log10:
2239 axis.TransformForward = TransformForward_Log10;
2240 axis.TransformInverse = TransformInverse_Log10;
2241 axis.TransformData = nullptr;
2242 axis.Locator = Locator_Log10;
2243 axis.ConstraintRange = ImPlotRange(DBL_MIN, INFINITY);
2244 break;
2245 case ImPlotScale_SymLog:
2246 axis.TransformForward = TransformForward_SymLog;
2247 axis.TransformInverse = TransformInverse_SymLog;
2248 axis.TransformData = nullptr;
2249 axis.Locator = Locator_SymLog;
2250 axis.ConstraintRange = ImPlotRange(-INFINITY, INFINITY);
2251 break;
2252 default:
2253 axis.TransformForward = nullptr;
2254 axis.TransformInverse = nullptr;
2255 axis.TransformData = nullptr;
2256 axis.Locator = nullptr;
2257 axis.ConstraintRange = ImPlotRange(-INFINITY, INFINITY);
2258 break;
2259 }
2260}
2261
2262void SetupAxisScale(ImAxis idx, ImPlotTransform fwd, ImPlotTransform inv, void* data) {
2263 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2264 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2265 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2266 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2267 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2268 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2269 axis.Scale = IMPLOT_AUTO;
2270 axis.TransformForward = fwd;
2271 axis.TransformInverse = inv;
2272 axis.TransformData = data;
2273}
2274
2275void SetupAxisLimitsConstraints(ImAxis idx, double v_min, double v_max) {
2276 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2277 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2278 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2279 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2280 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2281 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2282 axis.ConstraintRange.Min = v_min;
2283 axis.ConstraintRange.Max = v_max;
2284}
2285
2286void SetupAxisZoomConstraints(ImAxis idx, double z_min, double z_max) {
2287 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2288 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2289 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2290 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2291 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[idx];
2292 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis.Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
2293 axis.ConstraintZoom.Min = z_min;
2294 axis.ConstraintZoom.Max = z_max;
2295}
2296
2297void SetupAxes(const char* x_label, const char* y_label, ImPlotAxisFlags x_flags, ImPlotAxisFlags y_flags) {
2298 SetupAxis(ImAxis_X1, x_label, x_flags);
2299 SetupAxis(ImAxis_Y1, y_label, y_flags);
2300}
2301
2302void SetupAxesLimits(double x_min, double x_max, double y_min, double y_max, ImPlotCond cond) {
2303 SetupAxisLimits(ImAxis_X1, x_min, x_max, cond);
2304 SetupAxisLimits(ImAxis_Y1, y_min, y_max, cond);
2305}
2306
2307void SetupLegend(ImPlotLocation location, ImPlotLegendFlags flags) {
2308 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2309 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR((gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked) || (gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr && gp.CurrentPlot == nullptr),
2310 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot or BeginSubplots and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2311 if (gp.CurrentItems) {
2312 ImPlotLegend& legend = gp.CurrentItems->Legend;
2313 // check and set location
2314 if (location != legend.PreviousLocation)
2315 legend.Location = location;
2316 legend.PreviousLocation = location;
2317 // check and set flags
2318 if (flags != legend.PreviousFlags)
2319 legend.Flags = flags;
2320 legend.PreviousFlags = flags;
2321 }
2322}
2323
2324void SetupMouseText(ImPlotLocation location, ImPlotMouseTextFlags flags) {
2325 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2326 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr && !gp.CurrentPlot->SetupLocked,
2327 "Setup needs to be called after BeginPlot and before any setup locking functions (e.g. PlotX)!");
2328 gp.CurrentPlot->MouseTextLocation = location;
2329 gp.CurrentPlot->MouseTextFlags = flags;
2330}
2331
2332//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2333// SetNext
2334//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2335
2336void SetNextAxisLimits(ImAxis axis, double v_min, double v_max, ImPlotCond cond) {
2337 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2338 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot == nullptr, "SetNextAxisLimits() needs to be called before BeginPlot()!");
2339 IM_ASSERT(cond == 0 || ImIsPowerOfTwo(cond)); // Make sure the user doesn't attempt to combine multiple condition flags.
2340 gp.NextPlotData.HasRange[axis] = true;
2341 gp.NextPlotData.RangeCond[axis] = cond;
2342 gp.NextPlotData.Range[axis].Min = v_min;
2343 gp.NextPlotData.Range[axis].Max = v_max;
2344}
2345
2346void SetNextAxisLinks(ImAxis axis, double* link_min, double* link_max) {
2347 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2348 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot == nullptr, "SetNextAxisLinks() needs to be called before BeginPlot()!");
2349 gp.NextPlotData.LinkedMin[axis] = link_min;
2350 gp.NextPlotData.LinkedMax[axis] = link_max;
2351}
2352
2353void SetNextAxisToFit(ImAxis axis) {
2354 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2355 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot == nullptr, "SetNextAxisToFit() needs to be called before BeginPlot()!");
2356 gp.NextPlotData.Fit[axis] = true;
2357}
2358
2359void SetNextAxesLimits(double x_min, double x_max, double y_min, double y_max, ImPlotCond cond) {
2360 SetNextAxisLimits(ImAxis_X1, x_min, x_max, cond);
2361 SetNextAxisLimits(ImAxis_Y1, y_min, y_max, cond);
2362}
2363
2364void SetNextAxesToFit() {
2365 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i)
2366 SetNextAxisToFit(i);
2367}
2368
2369//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2370// BeginPlot
2371//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2372
2373bool BeginPlot(const char* title_id, const ImVec2& size, ImPlotFlags flags) {
2374 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
2375 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2376 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot == nullptr, "Mismatched BeginPlot()/EndPlot()!");
2377
2378 // FRONT MATTER -----------------------------------------------------------
2379
2380 if (gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr)
2381 ImGui::PushID(gp.CurrentSubplot->CurrentIdx);
2382
2383 // get globals
2384 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
2385 ImGuiWindow* Window = G.CurrentWindow;
2386
2387 // skip if needed
2388 if (Window->SkipItems && !gp.CurrentSubplot) {
2389 ResetCtxForNextPlot(GImPlot);
2390 return false;
2391 }
2392
2393 // ID and age (TODO: keep track of plot age in frames)
2394 const ImGuiID ID = Window->GetID(title_id);
2395 const bool just_created = gp.Plots.GetByKey(ID) == nullptr;
2396 gp.CurrentPlot = gp.Plots.GetOrAddByKey(ID);
2397
2398 ImPlotPlot &plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2399 plot.ID = ID;
2400 plot.Items.ID = ID - 1;
2401 plot.JustCreated = just_created;
2402 plot.SetupLocked = false;
2403
2404 // check flags
2405 if (plot.JustCreated)
2406 plot.Flags = flags;
2407 else if (flags != plot.PreviousFlags)
2408 plot.Flags = flags;
2409 plot.PreviousFlags = flags;
2410
2411 // setup default axes
2412 if (plot.JustCreated) {
2413 SetupAxis(ImAxis_X1);
2414 SetupAxis(ImAxis_Y1);
2415 }
2416
2417 // reset axes
2418 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i) {
2419 plot.Axes[i].Reset();
2420 UpdateAxisColors(plot.Axes[i]);
2421 }
2422 // ensure first axes enabled
2423 plot.Axes[ImAxis_X1].Enabled = true;
2424 plot.Axes[ImAxis_Y1].Enabled = true;
2425 // set initial axes
2426 plot.CurrentX = ImAxis_X1;
2427 plot.CurrentY = ImAxis_Y1;
2428
2429 // process next plot data (legacy)
2430 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i)
2431 ApplyNextPlotData(i);
2432
2433 // clear text buffers
2434 plot.ClearTextBuffer();
2435 plot.SetTitle(title_id);
2436
2437 // set frame size
2438 ImVec2 frame_size;
2439 if (gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr)
2440 frame_size = gp.CurrentSubplot->CellSize;
2441 else
2442 frame_size = ImGui::CalcItemSize(size, gp.Style.PlotDefaultSize.x, gp.Style.PlotDefaultSize.y);
2443
2444 if (frame_size.x < gp.Style.PlotMinSize.x && (size.x < 0.0f || gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr))
2445 frame_size.x = gp.Style.PlotMinSize.x;
2446 if (frame_size.y < gp.Style.PlotMinSize.y && (size.y < 0.0f || gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr))
2447 frame_size.y = gp.Style.PlotMinSize.y;
2448
2449 plot.FrameRect = ImRect(Window->DC.CursorPos, Window->DC.CursorPos + frame_size);
2450 ImGui::ItemSize(plot.FrameRect);
2451 if (!ImGui::ItemAdd(plot.FrameRect, plot.ID, &plot.FrameRect) && !gp.CurrentSubplot) {
2452 ResetCtxForNextPlot(GImPlot);
2453 return false;
2454 }
2455
2456 // setup items (or dont)
2457 if (gp.CurrentItems == nullptr)
2458 gp.CurrentItems = &plot.Items;
2459
2460 return true;
2461}
2462
2463//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2464// SetupFinish
2465//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2466
2467void SetupFinish() {
2468 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
2469 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2470 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "SetupFinish needs to be called after BeginPlot!");
2471
2472 ImGuiContext& G = *GImGui;
2473 ImDrawList& DrawList = *G.CurrentWindow->DrawList;
2474 const ImGuiStyle& Style = G.Style;
2475
2476 ImPlotPlot &plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2477
2478 // lock setup
2479 plot.SetupLocked = true;
2480
2481 // finalize axes and set default formatter/locator
2482 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i) {
2483 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[i];
2484 if (axis.Enabled) {
2485 axis.Constrain();
2486 if (!plot.Initialized && axis.CanInitFit())
2487 plot.FitThisFrame = axis.FitThisFrame = true;
2488 }
2489 if (axis.Formatter == nullptr) {
2490 axis.Formatter = Formatter_Default;
2491 if (axis.HasFormatSpec)
2492 axis.FormatterData = axis.FormatSpec;
2493 else
2494 axis.FormatterData = (void*)IMPLOT_LABEL_FORMAT;
2495 }
2496 if (axis.Locator == nullptr) {
2497 axis.Locator = Locator_Default;
2498 }
2499 }
2500
2501 // setup nullptr orthogonal axes
2502 const bool axis_equal = ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Equal);
2503 for (int ix = ImAxis_X1, iy = ImAxis_Y1; ix < ImAxis_Y1 || iy < ImAxis_COUNT; ++ix, ++iy) {
2504 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.Axes[ix];
2505 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.Axes[iy];
2506 if (x_axis.Enabled && y_axis.Enabled) {
2507 if (x_axis.OrthoAxis == nullptr)
2508 x_axis.OrthoAxis = &y_axis;
2509 if (y_axis.OrthoAxis == nullptr)
2510 y_axis.OrthoAxis = &x_axis;
2511 }
2512 else if (x_axis.Enabled)
2513 {
2514 if (x_axis.OrthoAxis == nullptr && !axis_equal)
2515 x_axis.OrthoAxis = &plot.Axes[ImAxis_Y1];
2516 }
2517 else if (y_axis.Enabled) {
2518 if (y_axis.OrthoAxis == nullptr && !axis_equal)
2519 y_axis.OrthoAxis = &plot.Axes[ImAxis_X1];
2520 }
2521 }
2522
2523 // canvas/axes bb
2524 plot.CanvasRect = ImRect(plot.FrameRect.Min + gp.Style.PlotPadding, plot.FrameRect.Max - gp.Style.PlotPadding);
2525 plot.AxesRect = plot.FrameRect;
2526
2527 // outside legend adjustments
2528 if (!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend) && plot.Items.GetLegendCount() > 0 && ImHasFlag(plot.Items.Legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Outside)) {
2529 ImPlotLegend& legend = plot.Items.Legend;
2530 const bool horz = ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal);
2531 const ImVec2 legend_size = CalcLegendSize(plot.Items, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, !horz);
2532 const bool west = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_West) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_East);
2533 const bool east = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_East) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_West);
2534 const bool north = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_North) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_South);
2535 const bool south = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_South) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_North);
2536 if ((west && !horz) || (west && horz && !north && !south)) {
2537 plot.CanvasRect.Min.x += (legend_size.x + gp.Style.LegendPadding.x);
2538 plot.AxesRect.Min.x += (legend_size.x + gp.Style.PlotPadding.x);
2539 }
2540 if ((east && !horz) || (east && horz && !north && !south)) {
2541 plot.CanvasRect.Max.x -= (legend_size.x + gp.Style.LegendPadding.x);
2542 plot.AxesRect.Max.x -= (legend_size.x + gp.Style.PlotPadding.x);
2543 }
2544 if ((north && horz) || (north && !horz && !west && !east)) {
2545 plot.CanvasRect.Min.y += (legend_size.y + gp.Style.LegendPadding.y);
2546 plot.AxesRect.Min.y += (legend_size.y + gp.Style.PlotPadding.y);
2547 }
2548 if ((south && horz) || (south && !horz && !west && !east)) {
2549 plot.CanvasRect.Max.y -= (legend_size.y + gp.Style.LegendPadding.y);
2550 plot.AxesRect.Max.y -= (legend_size.y + gp.Style.PlotPadding.y);
2551 }
2552 }
2553
2554 // plot bb
2555 float pad_top = 0, pad_bot = 0, pad_left = 0, pad_right = 0;
2556
2557 // (0) calc top padding form title
2558 ImVec2 title_size(0.0f, 0.0f);
2559 if (plot.HasTitle())
2560 title_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(plot.GetTitle(), nullptr, true);
2561 if (title_size.x > 0) {
2562 pad_top += title_size.y + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y;
2563 plot.AxesRect.Min.y += gp.Style.PlotPadding.y + pad_top;
2564 }
2565
2566 // (1) calc addition top padding and bot padding
2567 PadAndDatumAxesX(plot,pad_top,pad_bot,gp.CurrentAlignmentH);
2568
2569 const float plot_height = plot.CanvasRect.GetHeight() - pad_top - pad_bot;
2570
2571 // (2) get y tick labels (needed for left/right pad)
2572 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2573 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.YAxis(i);
2574 if (axis.WillRender() && axis.ShowDefaultTicks && plot_height > 0) {
2575 axis.Locator(axis.Ticker, axis.Range, plot_height, true, axis.Formatter, axis.FormatterData);
2576 }
2577 }
2578
2579 // (3) calc left/right pad
2580 PadAndDatumAxesY(plot,pad_left,pad_right,gp.CurrentAlignmentV);
2581
2582 const float plot_width = plot.CanvasRect.GetWidth() - pad_left - pad_right;
2583
2584 // (4) get x ticks
2585 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
2586 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2587 if (axis.WillRender() && axis.ShowDefaultTicks && plot_width > 0) {
2588 axis.Locator(axis.Ticker, axis.Range, plot_width, false, axis.Formatter, axis.FormatterData);
2589 }
2590 }
2591
2592 // (5) calc plot bb
2593 plot.PlotRect = ImRect(plot.CanvasRect.Min + ImVec2(pad_left, pad_top), plot.CanvasRect.Max - ImVec2(pad_right, pad_bot));
2594
2595 // HOVER------------------------------------------------------------
2596
2597 // axes hover rect, pixel ranges
2598 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; ++i) {
2599 ImPlotAxis& xax = plot.XAxis(i);
2600 xax.HoverRect = ImRect(ImVec2(plot.PlotRect.Min.x, ImMin(xax.Datum1,xax.Datum2)),
2601 ImVec2(plot.PlotRect.Max.x, ImMax(xax.Datum1,xax.Datum2)));
2602 xax.PixelMin = xax.IsInverted() ? plot.PlotRect.Max.x : plot.PlotRect.Min.x;
2603 xax.PixelMax = xax.IsInverted() ? plot.PlotRect.Min.x : plot.PlotRect.Max.x;
2604 xax.UpdateTransformCache();
2605 }
2606
2607 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; ++i) {
2608 ImPlotAxis& yax = plot.YAxis(i);
2609 yax.HoverRect = ImRect(ImVec2(ImMin(yax.Datum1,yax.Datum2),plot.PlotRect.Min.y),
2610 ImVec2(ImMax(yax.Datum1,yax.Datum2),plot.PlotRect.Max.y));
2611 yax.PixelMin = yax.IsInverted() ? plot.PlotRect.Min.y : plot.PlotRect.Max.y;
2612 yax.PixelMax = yax.IsInverted() ? plot.PlotRect.Max.y : plot.PlotRect.Min.y;
2613 yax.UpdateTransformCache();
2614 }
2615 // Equal axis constraint. Must happen after we set Pixels
2616 // constrain equal axes for primary x and y if not approximately equal
2617 // constrains x to y since x pixel size depends on y labels width, and causes feedback loops in opposite case
2618 if (axis_equal) {
2619 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; ++i) {
2620 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2621 if (x_axis.OrthoAxis == nullptr)
2622 continue;
2623 double xar = x_axis.GetAspect();
2624 double yar = x_axis.OrthoAxis->GetAspect();
2625 // edge case: user has set x range this frame, so fit y to x so that we honor their request for x range
2626 // NB: because of feedback across several frames, the user's x request may not be perfectly honored
2627 if (x_axis.HasRange)
2628 x_axis.OrthoAxis->SetAspect(xar);
2629 else if (!ImAlmostEqual(xar,yar) && !x_axis.OrthoAxis->IsInputLocked())
2630 x_axis.SetAspect(yar);
2631 }
2632 }
2633
2634 // INPUT ------------------------------------------------------------------
2635 if (!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoInputs))
2636 UpdateInput(plot);
2637
2638 // fit from FitNextPlotAxes or auto fit
2639 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i) {
2640 if (gp.NextPlotData.Fit[i] || plot.Axes[i].IsAutoFitting()) {
2641 plot.FitThisFrame = true;
2642 plot.Axes[i].FitThisFrame = true;
2643 }
2644 }
2645
2646 // RENDER -----------------------------------------------------------------
2647
2648 const float txt_height = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
2649
2650 // render frame
2651 if (!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoFrame))
2652 ImGui::RenderFrame(plot.FrameRect.Min, plot.FrameRect.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_FrameBg), true, Style.FrameRounding);
2653
2654 // grid bg
2655 DrawList.AddRectFilled(plot.PlotRect.Min, plot.PlotRect.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_PlotBg));
2656
2657 // transform ticks
2658 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; i++) {
2659 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[i];
2660 if (axis.WillRender()) {
2661 for (int t = 0; t < axis.Ticker.TickCount(); t++) {
2662 ImPlotTick& tk = axis.Ticker.Ticks[t];
2663 tk.PixelPos = IM_ROUND(axis.PlotToPixels(tk.PlotPos));
2664 }
2665 }
2666 }
2667
2668 // render grid (background)
2669 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
2670 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2671 if (x_axis.Enabled && x_axis.HasGridLines() && !x_axis.IsForeground())
2672 RenderGridLinesX(DrawList, x_axis.Ticker, plot.PlotRect, x_axis.ColorMaj, x_axis.ColorMin, gp.Style.MajorGridSize.x, gp.Style.MinorGridSize.x);
2673 }
2674 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2675 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
2676 if (y_axis.Enabled && y_axis.HasGridLines() && !y_axis.IsForeground())
2677 RenderGridLinesY(DrawList, y_axis.Ticker, plot.PlotRect, y_axis.ColorMaj, y_axis.ColorMin, gp.Style.MajorGridSize.y, gp.Style.MinorGridSize.y);
2678 }
2679
2680 // render x axis button, label, tick labels
2681 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
2682 ImPlotAxis& ax = plot.XAxis(i);
2683 if (!ax.Enabled)
2684 continue;
2685 if ((ax.Hovered || ax.Held) && !plot.Held && !ImHasFlag(ax.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoHighlight))
2686 DrawList.AddRectFilled(ax.HoverRect.Min, ax.HoverRect.Max, ax.Held ? ax.ColorAct : ax.ColorHov);
2687 else if (ax.ColorHiLi != IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS) {
2688 DrawList.AddRectFilled(ax.HoverRect.Min, ax.HoverRect.Max, ax.ColorHiLi);
2689 ax.ColorHiLi = IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS;
2690 }
2691 else if (ax.ColorBg != IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS) {
2692 DrawList.AddRectFilled(ax.HoverRect.Min, ax.HoverRect.Max, ax.ColorBg);
2693 }
2694 const ImPlotTicker& tkr = ax.Ticker;
2695 const bool opp = ax.IsOpposite();
2696 if (ax.HasLabel()) {
2697 const char* label = plot.GetAxisLabel(ax);
2698 const ImVec2 label_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(label);
2699 const float label_offset = (ax.HasTickLabels() ? tkr.MaxSize.y + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y : 0.0f)
2700 + (tkr.Levels - 1) * (txt_height + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y)
2701 + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y;
2702 const ImVec2 label_pos(plot.PlotRect.GetCenter().x - label_size.x * 0.5f,
2703 opp ? ax.Datum1 - label_offset - label_size.y : ax.Datum1 + label_offset);
2704 DrawList.AddText(label_pos, ax.ColorTxt, label);
2705 }
2706 if (ax.HasTickLabels()) {
2707 for (int j = 0; j < tkr.TickCount(); ++j) {
2708 const ImPlotTick& tk = tkr.Ticks[j];
2709 const float datum = ax.Datum1 + (opp ? (-gp.Style.LabelPadding.y -txt_height -tk.Level * (txt_height + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y))
2710 : gp.Style.LabelPadding.y + tk.Level * (txt_height + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y));
2711 if (tk.ShowLabel && tk.PixelPos >= plot.PlotRect.Min.x - 1 && tk.PixelPos <= plot.PlotRect.Max.x + 1) {
2712 ImVec2 start(tk.PixelPos - 0.5f * tk.LabelSize.x, datum);
2713 DrawList.AddText(start, ax.ColorTxt, tkr.GetText(j));
2714 }
2715 }
2716 }
2717 }
2718
2719 // render y axis button, label, tick labels
2720 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2721 ImPlotAxis& ax = plot.YAxis(i);
2722 if (!ax.Enabled)
2723 continue;
2724 if ((ax.Hovered || ax.Held) && !plot.Held && !ImHasFlag(ax.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoHighlight))
2725 DrawList.AddRectFilled(ax.HoverRect.Min, ax.HoverRect.Max, ax.Held ? ax.ColorAct : ax.ColorHov);
2726 else if (ax.ColorHiLi != IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS) {
2727 DrawList.AddRectFilled(ax.HoverRect.Min, ax.HoverRect.Max, ax.ColorHiLi);
2728 ax.ColorHiLi = IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS;
2729 }
2730 else if (ax.ColorBg != IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS) {
2731 DrawList.AddRectFilled(ax.HoverRect.Min, ax.HoverRect.Max, ax.ColorBg);
2732 }
2733 const ImPlotTicker& tkr = ax.Ticker;
2734 const bool opp = ax.IsOpposite();
2735 if (ax.HasLabel()) {
2736 const char* label = plot.GetAxisLabel(ax);
2737 const ImVec2 label_size = CalcTextSizeVertical(label);
2738 const float label_offset = (ax.HasTickLabels() ? tkr.MaxSize.x + gp.Style.LabelPadding.x : 0.0f)
2739 + gp.Style.LabelPadding.x;
2740 const ImVec2 label_pos(opp ? ax.Datum1 + label_offset : ax.Datum1 - label_offset - label_size.x,
2741 plot.PlotRect.GetCenter().y + label_size.y * 0.5f);
2742 AddTextVertical(&DrawList, label_pos, ax.ColorTxt, label);
2743 }
2744 if (ax.HasTickLabels()) {
2745 for (int j = 0; j < tkr.TickCount(); ++j) {
2746 const ImPlotTick& tk = tkr.Ticks[j];
2747 const float datum = ax.Datum1 + (opp ? gp.Style.LabelPadding.x : (-gp.Style.LabelPadding.x - tk.LabelSize.x));
2748 if (tk.ShowLabel && tk.PixelPos >= plot.PlotRect.Min.y - 1 && tk.PixelPos <= plot.PlotRect.Max.y + 1) {
2749 ImVec2 start(datum, tk.PixelPos - 0.5f * tk.LabelSize.y);
2750 DrawList.AddText(start, ax.ColorTxt, tkr.GetText(j));
2751 }
2752 }
2753 }
2754 }
2755
2756
2757 // clear legend (TODO: put elsewhere)
2758 plot.Items.Legend.Reset();
2759 // push ID to set item hashes (NB: !!!THIS PROBABLY NEEDS TO BE IN BEGIN PLOT!!!!)
2760 ImGui::PushOverrideID(gp.CurrentItems->ID);
2761}
2762
2763//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2764// EndPlot()
2765//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
2766
2767void EndPlot() {
2768 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
2769 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
2770 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "Mismatched BeginPlot()/EndPlot()!");
2771
2772 SetupLock();
2773
2774 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
2775 ImPlotPlot &plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
2776 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
2777 ImDrawList & DrawList = *Window->DrawList;
2778 const ImGuiIO & IO = ImGui::GetIO();
2779
2780 // FINAL RENDER -----------------------------------------------------------
2781
2782 const bool render_border = gp.Style.PlotBorderSize > 0 && GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_PlotBorder).w > 0;
2783 const bool any_x_held = plot.Held || AnyAxesHeld(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_X1], IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES);
2784 const bool any_y_held = plot.Held || AnyAxesHeld(&plot.Axes[ImAxis_Y1], IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES);
2785
2786 ImGui::PushClipRect(plot.FrameRect.Min, plot.FrameRect.Max, true);
2787
2788 // render grid (foreground)
2789 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
2790 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2791 if (x_axis.Enabled && x_axis.HasGridLines() && x_axis.IsForeground())
2792 RenderGridLinesX(DrawList, x_axis.Ticker, plot.PlotRect, x_axis.ColorMaj, x_axis.ColorMin, gp.Style.MajorGridSize.x, gp.Style.MinorGridSize.x);
2793 }
2794 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2795 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
2796 if (y_axis.Enabled && y_axis.HasGridLines() && y_axis.IsForeground())
2797 RenderGridLinesY(DrawList, y_axis.Ticker, plot.PlotRect, y_axis.ColorMaj, y_axis.ColorMin, gp.Style.MajorGridSize.y, gp.Style.MinorGridSize.y);
2798 }
2799
2800
2801 // render title
2802 if (plot.HasTitle()) {
2803 ImU32 col = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_TitleText);
2804 AddTextCentered(&DrawList,ImVec2(plot.PlotRect.GetCenter().x, plot.CanvasRect.Min.y),col,plot.GetTitle());
2805 }
2806
2807 // render x ticks
2808 int count_B = 0, count_T = 0;
2809 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
2810 const ImPlotAxis& ax = plot.XAxis(i);
2811 if (!ax.Enabled)
2812 continue;
2813 const ImPlotTicker& tkr = ax.Ticker;
2814 const bool opp = ax.IsOpposite();
2815 const bool aux = ((opp && count_T > 0)||(!opp && count_B > 0));
2816 if (ax.HasTickMarks()) {
2817 const float direction = opp ? 1.0f : -1.0f;
2818 for (int j = 0; j < tkr.TickCount(); ++j) {
2819 const ImPlotTick& tk = tkr.Ticks[j];
2820 if (tk.Level != 0 || tk.PixelPos < plot.PlotRect.Min.x || tk.PixelPos > plot.PlotRect.Max.x)
2821 continue;
2822 const ImVec2 start(tk.PixelPos, ax.Datum1);
2823 const float len = (!aux && tk.Major) ? gp.Style.MajorTickLen.x : gp.Style.MinorTickLen.x;
2824 const float thk = (!aux && tk.Major) ? gp.Style.MajorTickSize.x : gp.Style.MinorTickSize.x;
2825 DrawList.AddLine(start, start + ImVec2(0,direction*len), ax.ColorTick, thk);
2826 }
2827 if (aux || !render_border)
2828 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(plot.PlotRect.Min.x,ax.Datum1), ImVec2(plot.PlotRect.Max.x,ax.Datum1), ax.ColorTick, gp.Style.MinorTickSize.x);
2829 }
2830 count_B += !opp;
2831 count_T += opp;
2832 }
2833
2834 // render y ticks
2835 int count_L = 0, count_R = 0;
2836 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
2837 const ImPlotAxis& ax = plot.YAxis(i);
2838 if (!ax.Enabled)
2839 continue;
2840 const ImPlotTicker& tkr = ax.Ticker;
2841 const bool opp = ax.IsOpposite();
2842 const bool aux = ((opp && count_R > 0)||(!opp && count_L > 0));
2843 if (ax.HasTickMarks()) {
2844 const float direction = opp ? -1.0f : 1.0f;
2845 for (int j = 0; j < tkr.TickCount(); ++j) {
2846 const ImPlotTick& tk = tkr.Ticks[j];
2847 if (tk.Level != 0 || tk.PixelPos < plot.PlotRect.Min.y || tk.PixelPos > plot.PlotRect.Max.y)
2848 continue;
2849 const ImVec2 start(ax.Datum1, tk.PixelPos);
2850 const float len = (!aux && tk.Major) ? gp.Style.MajorTickLen.y : gp.Style.MinorTickLen.y;
2851 const float thk = (!aux && tk.Major) ? gp.Style.MajorTickSize.y : gp.Style.MinorTickSize.y;
2852 DrawList.AddLine(start, start + ImVec2(direction*len,0), ax.ColorTick, thk);
2853 }
2854 if (aux || !render_border)
2855 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(ax.Datum1, plot.PlotRect.Min.y), ImVec2(ax.Datum1, plot.PlotRect.Max.y), ax.ColorTick, gp.Style.MinorTickSize.y);
2856 }
2857 count_L += !opp;
2858 count_R += opp;
2859 }
2860 ImGui::PopClipRect();
2861
2862 // render annotations
2863 PushPlotClipRect();
2864 for (int i = 0; i < gp.Annotations.Size; ++i) {
2865 const char* txt = gp.Annotations.GetText(i);
2866 ImPlotAnnotation& an = gp.Annotations.Annotations[i];
2867 const ImVec2 txt_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(txt);
2868 const ImVec2 size = txt_size + gp.Style.AnnotationPadding * 2;
2869 ImVec2 pos = an.Pos;
2870 if (an.Offset.x == 0)
2871 pos.x -= size.x / 2;
2872 else if (an.Offset.x > 0)
2873 pos.x += an.Offset.x;
2874 else
2875 pos.x -= size.x - an.Offset.x;
2876 if (an.Offset.y == 0)
2877 pos.y -= size.y / 2;
2878 else if (an.Offset.y > 0)
2879 pos.y += an.Offset.y;
2880 else
2881 pos.y -= size.y - an.Offset.y;
2882 if (an.Clamp)
2883 pos = ClampLabelPos(pos, size, plot.PlotRect.Min, plot.PlotRect.Max);
2884 ImRect rect(pos,pos+size);
2885 if (an.Offset.x != 0 || an.Offset.y != 0) {
2886 ImVec2 corners[4] = {rect.GetTL(), rect.GetTR(), rect.GetBR(), rect.GetBL()};
2887 int min_corner = 0;
2888 float min_len = FLT_MAX;
2889 for (int c = 0; c < 4; ++c) {
2890 float len = ImLengthSqr(an.Pos - corners[c]);
2891 if (len < min_len) {
2892 min_corner = c;
2893 min_len = len;
2894 }
2895 }
2896 DrawList.AddLine(an.Pos, corners[min_corner], an.ColorBg);
2897 }
2898 DrawList.AddRectFilled(rect.Min, rect.Max, an.ColorBg);
2899 DrawList.AddText(pos + gp.Style.AnnotationPadding, an.ColorFg, txt);
2900 }
2901
2902 // render selection
2903 if (plot.Selected)
2904 RenderSelectionRect(DrawList, plot.SelectRect.Min + plot.PlotRect.Min, plot.SelectRect.Max + plot.PlotRect.Min, GetStyleColorVec4(ImPlotCol_Selection));
2905
2906 // render crosshairs
2907 if (ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Crosshairs) && plot.Hovered && !(any_x_held || any_y_held) && !plot.Selecting && !plot.Items.Legend.Hovered) {
2908 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_None);
2909 ImVec2 xy = IO.MousePos;
2910 ImVec2 h1(plot.PlotRect.Min.x, xy.y);
2911 ImVec2 h2(xy.x - 5, xy.y);
2912 ImVec2 h3(xy.x + 5, xy.y);
2913 ImVec2 h4(plot.PlotRect.Max.x, xy.y);
2914 ImVec2 v1(xy.x, plot.PlotRect.Min.y);
2915 ImVec2 v2(xy.x, xy.y - 5);
2916 ImVec2 v3(xy.x, xy.y + 5);
2917 ImVec2 v4(xy.x, plot.PlotRect.Max.y);
2918 ImU32 col = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_Crosshairs);
2919 DrawList.AddLine(h1, h2, col);
2920 DrawList.AddLine(h3, h4, col);
2921 DrawList.AddLine(v1, v2, col);
2922 DrawList.AddLine(v3, v4, col);
2923 }
2924
2925 // render mouse pos
2926 if (!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoMouseText) && (plot.Hovered || ImHasFlag(plot.MouseTextFlags, ImPlotMouseTextFlags_ShowAlways))) {
2927
2928 const bool no_aux = ImHasFlag(plot.MouseTextFlags, ImPlotMouseTextFlags_NoAuxAxes);
2929 const bool no_fmt = ImHasFlag(plot.MouseTextFlags, ImPlotMouseTextFlags_NoFormat);
2930
2931 ImGuiTextBuffer& builder = gp.MousePosStringBuilder;
2932 builder.Buf.shrink(0);
2933 char buff[IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE];
2934
2935 const int num_x = no_aux ? 1 : IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES;
2936 for (int i = 0; i < num_x; ++i) {
2937 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2938 if (!x_axis.Enabled)
2939 continue;
2940 if (i > 0)
2941 builder.append(", (");
2942 double v = x_axis.PixelsToPlot(IO.MousePos.x);
2943 if (no_fmt)
2944 Formatter_Default(v,buff,IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE,(void*)IMPLOT_LABEL_FORMAT);
2945 else
2946 LabelAxisValue(x_axis,v,buff,IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE,true);
2947 builder.append(buff);
2948 if (i > 0)
2949 builder.append(")");
2950 }
2951 builder.append(", ");
2952 const int num_y = no_aux ? 1 : IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES;
2953 for (int i = 0; i < num_y; ++i) {
2954 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
2955 if (!y_axis.Enabled)
2956 continue;
2957 if (i > 0)
2958 builder.append(", (");
2959 double v = y_axis.PixelsToPlot(IO.MousePos.y);
2960 if (no_fmt)
2961 Formatter_Default(v,buff,IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE,(void*)IMPLOT_LABEL_FORMAT);
2962 else
2963 LabelAxisValue(y_axis,v,buff,IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE,true);
2964 builder.append(buff);
2965 if (i > 0)
2966 builder.append(")");
2967 }
2968
2969 if (!builder.empty()) {
2970 const ImVec2 size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(builder.c_str());
2971 const ImVec2 pos = GetLocationPos(plot.PlotRect, size, plot.MouseTextLocation, gp.Style.MousePosPadding);
2972 DrawList.AddText(pos, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_InlayText), builder.c_str());
2973 }
2974 }
2975 PopPlotClipRect();
2976
2977 // axis side switch
2978 if (!plot.Held) {
2979 ImVec2 mouse_pos = ImGui::GetIO().MousePos;
2980 ImRect trigger_rect = plot.PlotRect;
2981 trigger_rect.Expand(-10);
2982 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; ++i) {
2983 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
2984 if (ImHasFlag(x_axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoSideSwitch))
2985 continue;
2986 if (x_axis.Held && plot.PlotRect.Contains(mouse_pos)) {
2987 const bool opp = ImHasFlag(x_axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite);
2988 if (!opp) {
2989 ImRect rect(plot.PlotRect.Min.x - 5, plot.PlotRect.Min.y - 5,
2990 plot.PlotRect.Max.x + 5, plot.PlotRect.Min.y + 5);
2991 if (mouse_pos.y < plot.PlotRect.Max.y - 10)
2992 DrawList.AddRectFilled(rect.Min, rect.Max, x_axis.ColorHov);
2993 if (rect.Contains(mouse_pos))
2994 x_axis.Flags |= ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite;
2995 }
2996 else {
2997 ImRect rect(plot.PlotRect.Min.x - 5, plot.PlotRect.Max.y - 5,
2998 plot.PlotRect.Max.x + 5, plot.PlotRect.Max.y + 5);
2999 if (mouse_pos.y > plot.PlotRect.Min.y + 10)
3000 DrawList.AddRectFilled(rect.Min, rect.Max, x_axis.ColorHov);
3001 if (rect.Contains(mouse_pos))
3002 x_axis.Flags &= ~ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite;
3003 }
3004 }
3005 }
3006 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; ++i) {
3007 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
3008 if (ImHasFlag(y_axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_NoSideSwitch))
3009 continue;
3010 if (y_axis.Held && plot.PlotRect.Contains(mouse_pos)) {
3011 const bool opp = ImHasFlag(y_axis.Flags, ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite);
3012 if (!opp) {
3013 ImRect rect(plot.PlotRect.Max.x - 5, plot.PlotRect.Min.y - 5,
3014 plot.PlotRect.Max.x + 5, plot.PlotRect.Max.y + 5);
3015 if (mouse_pos.x > plot.PlotRect.Min.x + 10)
3016 DrawList.AddRectFilled(rect.Min, rect.Max, y_axis.ColorHov);
3017 if (rect.Contains(mouse_pos))
3018 y_axis.Flags |= ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite;
3019 }
3020 else {
3021 ImRect rect(plot.PlotRect.Min.x - 5, plot.PlotRect.Min.y - 5,
3022 plot.PlotRect.Min.x + 5, plot.PlotRect.Max.y + 5);
3023 if (mouse_pos.x < plot.PlotRect.Max.x - 10)
3024 DrawList.AddRectFilled(rect.Min, rect.Max, y_axis.ColorHov);
3025 if (rect.Contains(mouse_pos))
3026 y_axis.Flags &= ~ImPlotAxisFlags_Opposite;
3027 }
3028 }
3029 }
3030 }
3031
3032 // reset legend hovers
3033 plot.Items.Legend.Hovered = false;
3034 for (int i = 0; i < plot.Items.GetItemCount(); ++i)
3035 plot.Items.GetItemByIndex(i)->LegendHovered = false;
3036 // render legend
3037 if (!ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend) && plot.Items.GetLegendCount() > 0) {
3038 ImPlotLegend& legend = plot.Items.Legend;
3039 const bool legend_out = ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Outside);
3040 const bool legend_horz = ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal);
3041 const ImVec2 legend_size = CalcLegendSize(plot.Items, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, !legend_horz);
3042 const ImVec2 legend_pos = GetLocationPos(legend_out ? plot.FrameRect : plot.PlotRect,
3043 legend_size,
3044 legend.Location,
3045 legend_out ? gp.Style.PlotPadding : gp.Style.LegendPadding);
3046 legend.Rect = ImRect(legend_pos, legend_pos + legend_size);
3047 legend.RectClamped = legend.Rect;
3048 const bool legend_scrollable = ClampLegendRect(legend.RectClamped,
3049 legend_out ? plot.FrameRect : plot.PlotRect,
3050 legend_out ? gp.Style.PlotPadding : gp.Style.LegendPadding
3051 );
3052 const ImGuiButtonFlags legend_button_flags = ImGuiButtonFlags_AllowOverlap
3053 | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnClick
3054 | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnDoubleClick
3055 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonLeft
3056 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonRight
3057 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonMiddle
3058 | ImGuiButtonFlags_FlattenChildren;
3059 ImGui::KeepAliveID(plot.Items.ID);
3060 ImGui::ButtonBehavior(legend.RectClamped, plot.Items.ID, &legend.Hovered, &legend.Held, legend_button_flags);
3061 legend.Hovered = legend.Hovered || (ImGui::IsWindowHovered() && legend.RectClamped.Contains(IO.MousePos));
3062
3063 if (legend_scrollable) {
3064 if (legend.Hovered) {
3065 ImGui::SetKeyOwner(ImGuiKey_MouseWheelY, plot.Items.ID);
3066 if (IO.MouseWheel != 0.0f) {
3067 ImVec2 max_step = legend.Rect.GetSize() * 0.67f;
3068#if IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 19172
3069 float font_size = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->CalcFontSize();
3070#else
3071 float font_size = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->FontRefSize;
3072#endif
3073 float scroll_step = ImFloor(ImMin(2 * font_size, max_step.x));
3074 legend.Scroll.x += scroll_step * IO.MouseWheel;
3075 legend.Scroll.y += scroll_step * IO.MouseWheel;
3076 }
3077 }
3078 const ImVec2 min_scroll_offset = legend.RectClamped.GetSize() - legend.Rect.GetSize();
3079 legend.Scroll.x = ImClamp(legend.Scroll.x, min_scroll_offset.x, 0.0f);
3080 legend.Scroll.y = ImClamp(legend.Scroll.y, min_scroll_offset.y, 0.0f);
3081 const ImVec2 scroll_offset = legend_horz ? ImVec2(legend.Scroll.x, 0) : ImVec2(0, legend.Scroll.y);
3082 ImVec2 legend_offset = legend.RectClamped.Min - legend.Rect.Min + scroll_offset;
3083 legend.Rect.Min += legend_offset;
3084 legend.Rect.Max += legend_offset;
3085 } else {
3086 legend.Scroll = ImVec2(0,0);
3087 }
3088
3089 const ImU32 col_bg = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendBg);
3090 const ImU32 col_bd = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendBorder);
3091 ImGui::PushClipRect(legend.RectClamped.Min, legend.RectClamped.Max, true);
3092 DrawList.AddRectFilled(legend.RectClamped.Min, legend.RectClamped.Max, col_bg);
3093 bool legend_contextable = ShowLegendEntries(plot.Items, legend.Rect, legend.Hovered, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, !legend_horz, DrawList)
3094 && !ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoMenus);
3095 DrawList.AddRect(legend.RectClamped.Min, legend.RectClamped.Max, col_bd);
3096 ImGui::PopClipRect();
3097
3098 // main ctx menu
3099 if (gp.OpenContextThisFrame && legend_contextable && !ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoMenus))
3100 ImGui::OpenPopup("##LegendContext");
3101
3102 if (ImGui::BeginPopup("##LegendContext")) {
3103 ImGui::Text("Legend"); ImGui::Separator();
3104 if (ShowLegendContextMenu(legend, !ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend)))
3105 ImFlipFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend);
3106 ImGui::EndPopup();
3107 }
3108 }
3109 else {
3110 plot.Items.Legend.Rect = ImRect();
3111 }
3112
3113 // render border
3114 if (render_border)
3115 DrawList.AddRect(plot.PlotRect.Min, plot.PlotRect.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_PlotBorder), 0, ImDrawFlags_RoundCornersAll, gp.Style.PlotBorderSize);
3116
3117 // render tags
3118 for (int i = 0; i < gp.Tags.Size; ++i) {
3119 ImPlotTag& tag = gp.Tags.Tags[i];
3120 ImPlotAxis& axis = plot.Axes[tag.Axis];
3121 if (!axis.Enabled || !axis.Range.Contains(tag.Value))
3122 continue;
3123 const char* txt = gp.Tags.GetText(i);
3124 ImVec2 text_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(txt);
3125 ImVec2 size = text_size + gp.Style.AnnotationPadding * 2;
3126 ImVec2 pos;
3127 axis.Ticker.OverrideSizeLate(size);
3128 float pix = IM_ROUND(axis.PlotToPixels(tag.Value));
3129 if (axis.Vertical) {
3130 if (axis.IsOpposite()) {
3131 pos = ImVec2(axis.Datum1 + gp.Style.LabelPadding.x, pix - size.y * 0.5f);
3132 DrawList.AddTriangleFilled(ImVec2(axis.Datum1,pix), pos, pos + ImVec2(0,size.y), tag.ColorBg);
3133 }
3134 else {
3135 pos = ImVec2(axis.Datum1 - size.x - gp.Style.LabelPadding.x, pix - size.y * 0.5f);
3136 DrawList.AddTriangleFilled(pos + ImVec2(size.x,0), ImVec2(axis.Datum1,pix), pos+size, tag.ColorBg);
3137 }
3138 }
3139 else {
3140 if (axis.IsOpposite()) {
3141 pos = ImVec2(pix - size.x * 0.5f, axis.Datum1 - size.y - gp.Style.LabelPadding.y );
3142 DrawList.AddTriangleFilled(pos + ImVec2(0,size.y), pos + size, ImVec2(pix,axis.Datum1), tag.ColorBg);
3143 }
3144 else {
3145 pos = ImVec2(pix - size.x * 0.5f, axis.Datum1 + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y);
3146 DrawList.AddTriangleFilled(pos, ImVec2(pix,axis.Datum1), pos + ImVec2(size.x, 0), tag.ColorBg);
3147 }
3148 }
3149 DrawList.AddRectFilled(pos,pos+size,tag.ColorBg);
3150 DrawList.AddText(pos+gp.Style.AnnotationPadding,tag.ColorFg,txt);
3151 }
3152
3153 // FIT DATA --------------------------------------------------------------
3154 const bool axis_equal = ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_Equal);
3155 if (plot.FitThisFrame) {
3156 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; i++) {
3157 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
3158 if (x_axis.FitThisFrame) {
3159 x_axis.ApplyFit(gp.Style.FitPadding.x);
3160 if (axis_equal && x_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr) {
3161 double aspect = x_axis.GetAspect();
3162 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = *x_axis.OrthoAxis;
3163 if (y_axis.FitThisFrame) {
3164 y_axis.ApplyFit(gp.Style.FitPadding.y);
3165 y_axis.FitThisFrame = false;
3166 aspect = ImMax(aspect, y_axis.GetAspect());
3167 }
3168 x_axis.SetAspect(aspect);
3169 y_axis.SetAspect(aspect);
3170 }
3171 }
3172 }
3173 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; i++) {
3174 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
3175 if (y_axis.FitThisFrame) {
3176 y_axis.ApplyFit(gp.Style.FitPadding.y);
3177 if (axis_equal && y_axis.OrthoAxis != nullptr) {
3178 double aspect = y_axis.GetAspect();
3179 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = *y_axis.OrthoAxis;
3180 if (x_axis.FitThisFrame) {
3181 x_axis.ApplyFit(gp.Style.FitPadding.x);
3182 x_axis.FitThisFrame = false;
3183 aspect = ImMax(x_axis.GetAspect(), aspect);
3184 }
3185 x_axis.SetAspect(aspect);
3186 y_axis.SetAspect(aspect);
3187 }
3188 }
3189 }
3190 plot.FitThisFrame = false;
3191 }
3192
3193 // CONTEXT MENUS -----------------------------------------------------------
3194
3195 ImGui::PushOverrideID(plot.ID);
3196
3197 const bool can_ctx = gp.OpenContextThisFrame &&
3198 !ImHasFlag(plot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoMenus) &&
3199 !plot.Items.Legend.Hovered;
3200
3201
3202
3203 // main ctx menu
3204 if (can_ctx && plot.Hovered)
3205 ImGui::OpenPopup("##PlotContext");
3206 if (ImGui::BeginPopup("##PlotContext")) {
3207 ShowPlotContextMenu(plot);
3208 ImGui::EndPopup();
3209 }
3210
3211 // axes ctx menus
3212 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; ++i) {
3213 ImGui::PushID(i);
3214 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = plot.XAxis(i);
3215 if (can_ctx && x_axis.Hovered && x_axis.HasMenus())
3216 ImGui::OpenPopup("##XContext");
3217 if (ImGui::BeginPopup("##XContext")) {
3218 ImGui::Text(x_axis.HasLabel() ? plot.GetAxisLabel(x_axis) : i == 0 ? "X-Axis" : "X-Axis %d", i + 1);
3219 ImGui::Separator();
3220 ShowAxisContextMenu(x_axis, axis_equal ? x_axis.OrthoAxis : nullptr, true);
3221 ImGui::EndPopup();
3222 }
3223 ImGui::PopID();
3224 }
3225 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; ++i) {
3226 ImGui::PushID(i);
3227 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = plot.YAxis(i);
3228 if (can_ctx && y_axis.Hovered && y_axis.HasMenus())
3229 ImGui::OpenPopup("##YContext");
3230 if (ImGui::BeginPopup("##YContext")) {
3231 ImGui::Text(y_axis.HasLabel() ? plot.GetAxisLabel(y_axis) : i == 0 ? "Y-Axis" : "Y-Axis %d", i + 1);
3232 ImGui::Separator();
3233 ShowAxisContextMenu(y_axis, axis_equal ? y_axis.OrthoAxis : nullptr, false);
3234 ImGui::EndPopup();
3235 }
3236 ImGui::PopID();
3237 }
3238 ImGui::PopID();
3239
3240 // LINKED AXES ------------------------------------------------------------
3241
3242 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i)
3243 plot.Axes[i].PushLinks();
3244
3245
3246 // CLEANUP ----------------------------------------------------------------
3247
3248 // remove items
3249 if (gp.CurrentItems == &plot.Items)
3250 gp.CurrentItems = nullptr;
3251 // reset the plot items for the next frame
3252 for (int i = 0; i < plot.Items.GetItemCount(); ++i) {
3253 plot.Items.GetItemByIndex(i)->SeenThisFrame = false;
3254 }
3255
3256 // mark the plot as initialized, i.e. having made it through one frame completely
3257 plot.Initialized = true;
3258 // Pop ImGui::PushID at the end of BeginPlot
3259 ImGui::PopID();
3260 // Reset context for next plot
3261 ResetCtxForNextPlot(GImPlot);
3262
3263 // setup next subplot
3264 if (gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr) {
3265 ImGui::PopID();
3266 SubplotNextCell();
3267 }
3268}
3269
3270//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3271// BEGIN/END SUBPLOT
3272//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3273
3274static const float SUBPLOT_BORDER_SIZE = 1.0f;
3275static const float SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_HALF_THICKNESS = 4.0f;
3276static const float SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_FEEDBACK_TIMER = 0.06f;
3277
3278void SubplotSetCell(int row, int col) {
3279 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3280 ImPlotSubplot& subplot = *gp.CurrentSubplot;
3281 if (row >= subplot.Rows || col >= subplot.Cols)
3282 return;
3283 float xoff = 0;
3284 float yoff = 0;
3285 for (int c = 0; c < col; ++c)
3286 xoff += subplot.ColRatios[c];
3287 for (int r = 0; r < row; ++r)
3288 yoff += subplot.RowRatios[r];
3289 const ImVec2 grid_size = subplot.GridRect.GetSize();
3290 ImVec2 cpos = subplot.GridRect.Min + ImVec2(xoff*grid_size.x,yoff*grid_size.y);
3291 cpos.x = IM_ROUND(cpos.x);
3292 cpos.y = IM_ROUND(cpos.y);
3293 ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->DC.CursorPos = cpos;
3294 // set cell size
3295 subplot.CellSize.x = IM_ROUND(subplot.GridRect.GetWidth() * subplot.ColRatios[col]);
3296 subplot.CellSize.y = IM_ROUND(subplot.GridRect.GetHeight() * subplot.RowRatios[row]);
3297 // setup links
3298 const bool lx = ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkAllX);
3299 const bool ly = ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkAllY);
3300 const bool lr = ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkRows);
3301 const bool lc = ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_LinkCols);
3302
3303 SetNextAxisLinks(ImAxis_X1, lx ? &subplot.ColLinkData[0].Min : lc ? &subplot.ColLinkData[col].Min : nullptr,
3304 lx ? &subplot.ColLinkData[0].Max : lc ? &subplot.ColLinkData[col].Max : nullptr);
3305 SetNextAxisLinks(ImAxis_Y1, ly ? &subplot.RowLinkData[0].Min : lr ? &subplot.RowLinkData[row].Min : nullptr,
3306 ly ? &subplot.RowLinkData[0].Max : lr ? &subplot.RowLinkData[row].Max : nullptr);
3307 // setup alignment
3308 if (!ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoAlign)) {
3309 gp.CurrentAlignmentH = &subplot.RowAlignmentData[row];
3310 gp.CurrentAlignmentV = &subplot.ColAlignmentData[col];
3311 }
3312 // set idx
3313 if (ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_ColMajor))
3314 subplot.CurrentIdx = col * subplot.Rows + row;
3315 else
3316 subplot.CurrentIdx = row * subplot.Cols + col;
3317}
3318
3319void SubplotSetCell(int idx) {
3320 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3321 ImPlotSubplot& subplot = *gp.CurrentSubplot;
3322 if (idx >= subplot.Rows * subplot.Cols)
3323 return;
3324 int row = 0, col = 0;
3325 if (ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_ColMajor)) {
3326 row = idx % subplot.Rows;
3327 col = idx / subplot.Rows;
3328 }
3329 else {
3330 row = idx / subplot.Cols;
3331 col = idx % subplot.Cols;
3332 }
3333 return SubplotSetCell(row, col);
3334}
3335
3336void SubplotNextCell() {
3337 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3338 ImPlotSubplot& subplot = *gp.CurrentSubplot;
3339 SubplotSetCell(++subplot.CurrentIdx);
3340}
3341
3342bool BeginSubplots(const char* title, int rows, int cols, const ImVec2& size, ImPlotSubplotFlags flags, float* row_sizes, float* col_sizes) {
3343 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(rows > 0 && cols > 0, "Invalid sizing arguments!");
3344 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
3345 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3346 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentSubplot == nullptr, "Mismatched BeginSubplots()/EndSubplots()!");
3347 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
3348 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
3349 if (Window->SkipItems)
3350 return false;
3351 const ImGuiID ID = Window->GetID(title);
3352 bool just_created = gp.Subplots.GetByKey(ID) == nullptr;
3353 gp.CurrentSubplot = gp.Subplots.GetOrAddByKey(ID);
3354 ImPlotSubplot& subplot = *gp.CurrentSubplot;
3355 subplot.ID = ID;
3356 subplot.Items.ID = ID - 1;
3357 subplot.HasTitle = ImGui::FindRenderedTextEnd(title, nullptr) != title;
3358 // push ID
3359 ImGui::PushID(ID);
3360
3361 if (just_created)
3362 subplot.Flags = flags;
3363 else if (flags != subplot.PreviousFlags)
3364 subplot.Flags = flags;
3365 subplot.PreviousFlags = flags;
3366
3367 // check for change in rows and cols
3368 if (subplot.Rows != rows || subplot.Cols != cols) {
3369 subplot.RowAlignmentData.resize(rows);
3370 subplot.RowLinkData.resize(rows);
3371 subplot.RowRatios.resize(rows);
3372 for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r) {
3373 subplot.RowAlignmentData[r].Reset();
3374 subplot.RowLinkData[r] = ImPlotRange(0,1);
3375 subplot.RowRatios[r] = 1.0f / rows;
3376 }
3377 subplot.ColAlignmentData.resize(cols);
3378 subplot.ColLinkData.resize(cols);
3379 subplot.ColRatios.resize(cols);
3380 for (int c = 0; c < cols; ++c) {
3381 subplot.ColAlignmentData[c].Reset();
3382 subplot.ColLinkData[c] = ImPlotRange(0,1);
3383 subplot.ColRatios[c] = 1.0f / cols;
3384 }
3385 }
3386 // check incoming size requests
3387 float row_sum = 0, col_sum = 0;
3388 if (row_sizes != nullptr) {
3389 row_sum = ImSum(row_sizes, rows);
3390 for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r)
3391 subplot.RowRatios[r] = row_sizes[r] / row_sum;
3392 }
3393 if (col_sizes != nullptr) {
3394 col_sum = ImSum(col_sizes, cols);
3395 for (int c = 0; c < cols; ++c)
3396 subplot.ColRatios[c] = col_sizes[c] / col_sum;
3397 }
3398 subplot.Rows = rows;
3399 subplot.Cols = cols;
3400
3401 // calc plot frame sizes
3402 ImVec2 title_size(0.0f, 0.0f);
3403 if (!ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoTitle))
3404 title_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(title, nullptr, true);
3405 const float pad_top = title_size.x > 0.0f ? title_size.y + gp.Style.LabelPadding.y : 0;
3406 const ImVec2 half_pad = gp.Style.PlotPadding/2;
3407 const ImVec2 frame_size = ImGui::CalcItemSize(size, gp.Style.PlotDefaultSize.x, gp.Style.PlotDefaultSize.y);
3408 subplot.FrameRect = ImRect(Window->DC.CursorPos, Window->DC.CursorPos + frame_size);
3409 subplot.GridRect.Min = subplot.FrameRect.Min + half_pad + ImVec2(0,pad_top);
3410 subplot.GridRect.Max = subplot.FrameRect.Max - half_pad;
3411 subplot.FrameHovered = subplot.FrameRect.Contains(ImGui::GetMousePos()) && ImGui::IsWindowHovered(ImGuiHoveredFlags_ChildWindows|ImGuiHoveredFlags_AllowWhenBlockedByActiveItem);
3412
3413 // outside legend adjustments (TODO: make function)
3414 const bool share_items = ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_ShareItems);
3415 if (share_items)
3416 gp.CurrentItems = &subplot.Items;
3417 if (share_items && !ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoLegend) && subplot.Items.GetLegendCount() > 0) {
3418 ImPlotLegend& legend = subplot.Items.Legend;
3419 const bool horz = ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal);
3420 const ImVec2 legend_size = CalcLegendSize(subplot.Items, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, !horz);
3421 const bool west = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_West) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_East);
3422 const bool east = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_East) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_West);
3423 const bool north = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_North) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_South);
3424 const bool south = ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_South) && !ImHasFlag(legend.Location, ImPlotLocation_North);
3425 if ((west && !horz) || (west && horz && !north && !south))
3426 subplot.GridRect.Min.x += (legend_size.x + gp.Style.LegendPadding.x);
3427 if ((east && !horz) || (east && horz && !north && !south))
3428 subplot.GridRect.Max.x -= (legend_size.x + gp.Style.LegendPadding.x);
3429 if ((north && horz) || (north && !horz && !west && !east))
3430 subplot.GridRect.Min.y += (legend_size.y + gp.Style.LegendPadding.y);
3431 if ((south && horz) || (south && !horz && !west && !east))
3432 subplot.GridRect.Max.y -= (legend_size.y + gp.Style.LegendPadding.y);
3433 }
3434
3435 // render single background frame
3436 ImGui::RenderFrame(subplot.FrameRect.Min, subplot.FrameRect.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_FrameBg), true, ImGui::GetStyle().FrameRounding);
3437 // render title
3438 if (title_size.x > 0.0f && !ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoTitle)) {
3439 const ImU32 col = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_TitleText);
3440 AddTextCentered(ImGui::GetWindowDrawList(),ImVec2(subplot.GridRect.GetCenter().x, subplot.GridRect.Min.y - pad_top + half_pad.y),col,title);
3441 }
3442
3443 // render splitters
3444 if (!ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoResize)) {
3445 ImDrawList& DrawList = *ImGui::GetWindowDrawList();
3446 const ImU32 hov_col = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(GImGui->Style.Colors[ImGuiCol_SeparatorHovered]);
3447 const ImU32 act_col = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(GImGui->Style.Colors[ImGuiCol_SeparatorActive]);
3448 float xpos = subplot.GridRect.Min.x;
3449 float ypos = subplot.GridRect.Min.y;
3450 int separator = 1;
3451 // bool pass = false;
3452 for (int r = 0; r < subplot.Rows-1; ++r) {
3453 ypos += subplot.RowRatios[r] * subplot.GridRect.GetHeight();
3454 const ImGuiID sep_id = subplot.ID + separator;
3455 ImGui::KeepAliveID(sep_id);
3456 const ImRect sep_bb = ImRect(subplot.GridRect.Min.x, ypos-SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_HALF_THICKNESS, subplot.GridRect.Max.x, ypos+SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_HALF_THICKNESS);
3457 bool sep_hov = false, sep_hld = false;
3458 const bool sep_clk = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(sep_bb, sep_id, &sep_hov, &sep_hld, ImGuiButtonFlags_FlattenChildren | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnClick | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnDoubleClick);
3459 if ((sep_hov && G.HoveredIdTimer > SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_FEEDBACK_TIMER) || sep_hld) {
3460 if (sep_clk && ImGui::IsMouseDoubleClicked(0)) {
3461 float p = (subplot.RowRatios[r] + subplot.RowRatios[r+1])/2;
3462 subplot.RowRatios[r] = subplot.RowRatios[r+1] = p;
3463 }
3464 if (sep_clk) {
3465 subplot.TempSizes[0] = subplot.RowRatios[r];
3466 subplot.TempSizes[1] = subplot.RowRatios[r+1];
3467 }
3468 if (sep_hld) {
3469 float dp = ImGui::GetMouseDragDelta(0).y / subplot.GridRect.GetHeight();
3470 if (subplot.TempSizes[0] + dp > 0.1f && subplot.TempSizes[1] - dp > 0.1f) {
3471 subplot.RowRatios[r] = subplot.TempSizes[0] + dp;
3472 subplot.RowRatios[r+1] = subplot.TempSizes[1] - dp;
3473 }
3474 }
3475 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(IM_ROUND(subplot.GridRect.Min.x),IM_ROUND(ypos)),
3476 ImVec2(IM_ROUND(subplot.GridRect.Max.x),IM_ROUND(ypos)),
3477 sep_hld ? act_col : hov_col, SUBPLOT_BORDER_SIZE);
3478 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNS);
3479 }
3480 separator++;
3481 }
3482 for (int c = 0; c < subplot.Cols-1; ++c) {
3483 xpos += subplot.ColRatios[c] * subplot.GridRect.GetWidth();
3484 const ImGuiID sep_id = subplot.ID + separator;
3485 ImGui::KeepAliveID(sep_id);
3486 const ImRect sep_bb = ImRect(xpos-SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_HALF_THICKNESS, subplot.GridRect.Min.y, xpos+SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_HALF_THICKNESS, subplot.GridRect.Max.y);
3487 bool sep_hov = false, sep_hld = false;
3488 const bool sep_clk = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(sep_bb, sep_id, &sep_hov, &sep_hld, ImGuiButtonFlags_FlattenChildren | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnClick | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnDoubleClick);
3489 if ((sep_hov && G.HoveredIdTimer > SUBPLOT_SPLITTER_FEEDBACK_TIMER) || sep_hld) {
3490 if (sep_clk && ImGui::IsMouseDoubleClicked(0)) {
3491 float p = (subplot.ColRatios[c] + subplot.ColRatios[c+1])/2;
3492 subplot.ColRatios[c] = subplot.ColRatios[c+1] = p;
3493 }
3494 if (sep_clk) {
3495 subplot.TempSizes[0] = subplot.ColRatios[c];
3496 subplot.TempSizes[1] = subplot.ColRatios[c+1];
3497 }
3498 if (sep_hld) {
3499 float dp = ImGui::GetMouseDragDelta(0).x / subplot.GridRect.GetWidth();
3500 if (subplot.TempSizes[0] + dp > 0.1f && subplot.TempSizes[1] - dp > 0.1f) {
3501 subplot.ColRatios[c] = subplot.TempSizes[0] + dp;
3502 subplot.ColRatios[c+1] = subplot.TempSizes[1] - dp;
3503 }
3504 }
3505 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(IM_ROUND(xpos),IM_ROUND(subplot.GridRect.Min.y)),
3506 ImVec2(IM_ROUND(xpos),IM_ROUND(subplot.GridRect.Max.y)),
3507 sep_hld ? act_col : hov_col, SUBPLOT_BORDER_SIZE);
3508 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeEW);
3509 }
3510 separator++;
3511 }
3512 }
3513
3514 // set outgoing sizes
3515 if (row_sizes != nullptr) {
3516 for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r)
3517 row_sizes[r] = subplot.RowRatios[r] * row_sum;
3518 }
3519 if (col_sizes != nullptr) {
3520 for (int c = 0; c < cols; ++c)
3521 col_sizes[c] = subplot.ColRatios[c] * col_sum;
3522 }
3523
3524 // push styling
3525 PushStyleColor(ImPlotCol_FrameBg, IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS);
3526 PushStyleVar(ImPlotStyleVar_PlotPadding, half_pad);
3527 PushStyleVar(ImPlotStyleVar_PlotMinSize, ImVec2(0,0));
3528 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_FrameBorderSize,0);
3529
3530 // set initial cursor pos
3531 Window->DC.CursorPos = subplot.GridRect.Min;
3532 // begin alignments
3533 for (int r = 0; r < subplot.Rows; ++r)
3534 subplot.RowAlignmentData[r].Begin();
3535 for (int c = 0; c < subplot.Cols; ++c)
3536 subplot.ColAlignmentData[c].Begin();
3537 // clear legend data
3538 subplot.Items.Legend.Reset();
3539 // Setup first subplot
3540 SubplotSetCell(0,0);
3541 return true;
3542}
3543
3544void EndSubplots() {
3545 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
3546 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3547 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr, "Mismatched BeginSubplots()/EndSubplots()!");
3548 ImPlotSubplot& subplot = *gp.CurrentSubplot;
3549 const ImGuiIO& IO = ImGui::GetIO();
3550 // set alignments
3551 for (int r = 0; r < subplot.Rows; ++r)
3552 subplot.RowAlignmentData[r].End();
3553 for (int c = 0; c < subplot.Cols; ++c)
3554 subplot.ColAlignmentData[c].End();
3555 // pop styling
3556 PopStyleColor();
3557 PopStyleVar();
3558 PopStyleVar();
3559 ImGui::PopStyleVar();
3560 // legend
3561 subplot.Items.Legend.Hovered = false;
3562 for (int i = 0; i < subplot.Items.GetItemCount(); ++i)
3563 subplot.Items.GetItemByIndex(i)->LegendHovered = false;
3564 // render legend
3565 const bool share_items = ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_ShareItems);
3566 ImDrawList& DrawList = *ImGui::GetWindowDrawList();
3567 if (share_items && !ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoLegend) && subplot.Items.GetLegendCount() > 0) {
3568 ImPlotLegend& legend = subplot.Items.Legend;
3569 const bool legend_horz = ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_Horizontal);
3570 const ImVec2 legend_size = CalcLegendSize(subplot.Items, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, !legend_horz);
3571 const ImVec2 legend_pos = GetLocationPos(subplot.FrameRect, legend_size, legend.Location, gp.Style.PlotPadding);
3572 legend.Rect = ImRect(legend_pos, legend_pos + legend_size);
3573 legend.RectClamped = legend.Rect;
3574 const bool legend_scrollable = ClampLegendRect(legend.RectClamped,subplot.FrameRect, gp.Style.PlotPadding);
3575 const ImGuiButtonFlags legend_button_flags = ImGuiButtonFlags_AllowOverlap
3576 | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnClick
3577 | ImGuiButtonFlags_PressedOnDoubleClick
3578 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonLeft
3579 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonRight
3580 | ImGuiButtonFlags_MouseButtonMiddle
3581 | ImGuiButtonFlags_FlattenChildren;
3582 ImGui::KeepAliveID(subplot.Items.ID);
3583 ImGui::ButtonBehavior(legend.RectClamped, subplot.Items.ID, &legend.Hovered, &legend.Held, legend_button_flags);
3584 legend.Hovered = legend.Hovered || (subplot.FrameHovered && legend.RectClamped.Contains(ImGui::GetIO().MousePos));
3585
3586 if (legend_scrollable) {
3587 if (legend.Hovered) {
3588 ImGui::SetKeyOwner(ImGuiKey_MouseWheelY, subplot.Items.ID);
3589 if (IO.MouseWheel != 0.0f) {
3590 ImVec2 max_step = legend.Rect.GetSize() * 0.67f;
3591#if IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 19172
3592 float font_size = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->CalcFontSize();
3593#else
3594 float font_size = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->FontRefSize;
3595#endif
3596 float scroll_step = ImFloor(ImMin(2 * font_size, max_step.x));
3597 legend.Scroll.x += scroll_step * IO.MouseWheel;
3598 legend.Scroll.y += scroll_step * IO.MouseWheel;
3599 }
3600 }
3601 const ImVec2 min_scroll_offset = legend.RectClamped.GetSize() - legend.Rect.GetSize();
3602 legend.Scroll.x = ImClamp(legend.Scroll.x, min_scroll_offset.x, 0.0f);
3603 legend.Scroll.y = ImClamp(legend.Scroll.y, min_scroll_offset.y, 0.0f);
3604 const ImVec2 scroll_offset = legend_horz ? ImVec2(legend.Scroll.x, 0) : ImVec2(0, legend.Scroll.y);
3605 ImVec2 legend_offset = legend.RectClamped.Min - legend.Rect.Min + scroll_offset;
3606 legend.Rect.Min += legend_offset;
3607 legend.Rect.Max += legend_offset;
3608 } else {
3609 legend.Scroll = ImVec2(0,0);
3610 }
3611
3612 const ImU32 col_bg = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendBg);
3613 const ImU32 col_bd = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendBorder);
3614 ImGui::PushClipRect(legend.RectClamped.Min, legend.RectClamped.Max, true);
3615 DrawList.AddRectFilled(legend.RectClamped.Min, legend.RectClamped.Max, col_bg);
3616 bool legend_contextable = ShowLegendEntries(subplot.Items, legend.Rect, legend.Hovered, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, !legend_horz, DrawList)
3617 && !ImHasFlag(legend.Flags, ImPlotLegendFlags_NoMenus);
3618 DrawList.AddRect(legend.RectClamped.Min, legend.RectClamped.Max, col_bd);
3619 ImGui::PopClipRect();
3620
3621 if (legend_contextable && !ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotSubplotFlags_NoMenus) && ImGui::GetIO().MouseReleased[gp.InputMap.Menu])
3622 ImGui::OpenPopup("##LegendContext");
3623 if (ImGui::BeginPopup("##LegendContext")) {
3624 ImGui::Text("Legend"); ImGui::Separator();
3625 if (ShowLegendContextMenu(legend, !ImHasFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend)))
3626 ImFlipFlag(subplot.Flags, ImPlotFlags_NoLegend);
3627 ImGui::EndPopup();
3628 }
3629 }
3630 else {
3631 subplot.Items.Legend.Rect = ImRect();
3632 }
3633 // remove items
3634 if (gp.CurrentItems == &subplot.Items)
3635 gp.CurrentItems = nullptr;
3636 // reset the plot items for the next frame (TODO: put this elsewhere)
3637 for (int i = 0; i < subplot.Items.GetItemCount(); ++i) {
3638 subplot.Items.GetItemByIndex(i)->SeenThisFrame = false;
3639 }
3640 // pop id
3641 ImGui::PopID();
3642 // set DC back correctly
3643 GImGui->CurrentWindow->DC.CursorPos = subplot.FrameRect.Min;
3644 ImGui::Dummy(subplot.FrameRect.GetSize());
3645 ResetCtxForNextSubplot(GImPlot);
3646
3647}
3648
3649//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3650// [SECTION] Plot Utils
3651//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3652
3653void SetAxis(ImAxis axis) {
3654 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
