3655 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "SetAxis() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3656 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(axis >= ImAxis_X1 && axis < ImAxis_COUNT, "Axis index out of bounds!");
3657 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[axis].Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
3658 SetupLock();
3659 if (axis < ImAxis_Y1)
3660 gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX = axis;
3661 else
3662 gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY = axis;
3663}
3664
3665void SetAxes(ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3666 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3667 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "SetAxes() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3668 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(x_idx >= ImAxis_X1 && x_idx < ImAxis_Y1, "X-Axis index out of bounds!");
3669 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(y_idx >= ImAxis_Y1 && y_idx < ImAxis_COUNT, "Y-Axis index out of bounds!");
3670 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[x_idx].Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
3671 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[y_idx].Enabled, "Axis is not enabled! Did you forget to call SetupAxis()?");
3672 SetupLock();
3673 gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX = x_idx;
3674 gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY = y_idx;
3675}
3676
3677ImPlotPoint PixelsToPlot(float x, float y, ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3678 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3679 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "PixelsToPlot() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3680 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(x_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO || (x_idx >= ImAxis_X1 && x_idx < ImAxis_Y1), "X-Axis index out of bounds!");
3681 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(y_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO || (y_idx >= ImAxis_Y1 && y_idx < ImAxis_COUNT), "Y-Axis index out of bounds!");
3682 SetupLock();
3683 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
3684 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = x_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO ? plot.Axes[plot.CurrentX] : plot.Axes[x_idx];
3685 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = y_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO ? plot.Axes[plot.CurrentY] : plot.Axes[y_idx];
3686 return ImPlotPoint( x_axis.PixelsToPlot(x), y_axis.PixelsToPlot(y) );
3687}
3688
3689ImPlotPoint PixelsToPlot(const ImVec2& pix, ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3690 return PixelsToPlot(pix.x, pix.y, x_idx, y_idx);
3691}
3692
3693ImVec2 PlotToPixels(double x, double y, ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3694 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3695 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "PlotToPixels() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3696 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(x_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO || (x_idx >= ImAxis_X1 && x_idx < ImAxis_Y1), "X-Axis index out of bounds!");
3697 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(y_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO || (y_idx >= ImAxis_Y1 && y_idx < ImAxis_COUNT), "Y-Axis index out of bounds!");
3698 SetupLock();
3699 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
3700 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = x_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO ? plot.Axes[plot.CurrentX] : plot.Axes[x_idx];
3701 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = y_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO ? plot.Axes[plot.CurrentY] : plot.Axes[y_idx];
3702 return ImVec2( x_axis.PlotToPixels(x), y_axis.PlotToPixels(y) );
3703}
3704
3705ImVec2 PlotToPixels(const ImPlotPoint& plt, ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3706 return PlotToPixels(plt.x, plt.y, x_idx, y_idx);
3707}
3708
3709ImVec2 GetPlotPos() {
3710 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3711 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "GetPlotPos() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3712 SetupLock();
3713 return gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Min;
3714}
3715
3716ImVec2 GetPlotSize() {
3717 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3718 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "GetPlotSize() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3719 SetupLock();
3720 return gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.GetSize();
3721}
3722
3723ImPlotPoint GetPlotMousePos(ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3724 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot->CurrentPlot != nullptr, "GetPlotMousePos() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3725 SetupLock();
3726 return PixelsToPlot(ImGui::GetMousePos(), x_idx, y_idx);
3727}
3728
3729ImPlotRect GetPlotLimits(ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3730 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3731 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "GetPlotLimits() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3732 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(x_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO || (x_idx >= ImAxis_X1 && x_idx < ImAxis_Y1), "X-Axis index out of bounds!");
3733 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(y_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO || (y_idx >= ImAxis_Y1 && y_idx < ImAxis_COUNT), "Y-Axis index out of bounds!");
3734 SetupLock();
3735 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
3736 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = x_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO ? plot.Axes[plot.CurrentX] : plot.Axes[x_idx];
3737 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = y_idx == IMPLOT_AUTO ? plot.Axes[plot.CurrentY] : plot.Axes[y_idx];
3738 ImPlotRect limits;
3739 limits.X = x_axis.Range;
3740 limits.Y = y_axis.Range;
3741 return limits;
3742}
3743
3744bool IsPlotHovered() {
3745 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3746 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "IsPlotHovered() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3747 SetupLock();
3748 return gp.CurrentPlot->Hovered;
3749}
3750
3751bool IsAxisHovered(ImAxis axis) {
3752 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3753 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "IsPlotXAxisHovered() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3754 SetupLock();
3755 return gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[axis].Hovered;
3756}
3757
3758bool IsSubplotsHovered() {
3759 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3760 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentSubplot != nullptr, "IsSubplotsHovered() needs to be called between BeginSubplots() and EndSubplots()!");
3761 return gp.CurrentSubplot->FrameHovered;
3762}
3763
3764bool IsPlotSelected() {
3765 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3766 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "IsPlotSelected() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3767 SetupLock();
3768 return gp.CurrentPlot->Selected;
3769}
3770
3771ImPlotRect GetPlotSelection(ImAxis x_idx, ImAxis y_idx) {
3772 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3773 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "GetPlotSelection() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3774 SetupLock();
3775 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
3776 if (!plot.Selected)
3777 return ImPlotRect(0,0,0,0);
3778 ImPlotPoint p1 = PixelsToPlot(plot.SelectRect.Min + plot.PlotRect.Min, x_idx, y_idx);
3779 ImPlotPoint p2 = PixelsToPlot(plot.SelectRect.Max + plot.PlotRect.Min, x_idx, y_idx);
3780 ImPlotRect result;
3781 result.X.Min = ImMin(p1.x, p2.x);
3782 result.X.Max = ImMax(p1.x, p2.x);
3783 result.Y.Min = ImMin(p1.y, p2.y);
3784 result.Y.Max = ImMax(p1.y, p2.y);
3785 return result;
3786}
3787
3788void CancelPlotSelection() {
3789 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3790 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "CancelPlotSelection() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3791 SetupLock();
3792 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.CurrentPlot;
3793 if (plot.Selected)
3794 plot.Selected = plot.Selecting = false;
3795}
3796
3797void HideNextItem(bool hidden, ImPlotCond cond) {
3798 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3799 gp.NextItemData.HasHidden = true;
3800 gp.NextItemData.Hidden = hidden;
3801 gp.NextItemData.HiddenCond = cond;
3802}
3803
3804//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3805// [SECTION] Plot Tools
3806//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
3807
3808void Annotation(double x, double y, const ImVec4& col, const ImVec2& offset, bool clamp, bool round) {
3809 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3810 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "Annotation() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3811 SetupLock();
3812 char x_buff[IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE];
3813 char y_buff[IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE];
3814 ImPlotAxis& x_axis = gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX];
3815 ImPlotAxis& y_axis = gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY];
3816 LabelAxisValue(x_axis, x, x_buff, sizeof(x_buff), round);
3817 LabelAxisValue(y_axis, y, y_buff, sizeof(y_buff), round);
3818 Annotation(x,y,col,offset,clamp,"%s, %s",x_buff,y_buff);
3819}
3820
3821void AnnotationV(double x, double y, const ImVec4& col, const ImVec2& offset, bool clamp, const char* fmt, va_list args) {
3822 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3823 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "Annotation() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3824 SetupLock();
3825 ImVec2 pos = PlotToPixels(x,y,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
3826 ImU32 bg = ImGui::GetColorU32(col);
3827 ImU32 fg = col.w == 0 ? GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_InlayText) : CalcTextColor(col);
3828 gp.Annotations.AppendV(pos, offset, bg, fg, clamp, fmt, args);
3829}
3830
3831void Annotation(double x, double y, const ImVec4& col, const ImVec2& offset, bool clamp, const char* fmt, ...) {
3832 va_list args;
3833 va_start(args, fmt);
3834 AnnotationV(x,y,col,offset,clamp,fmt,args);
3835 va_end(args);
3836}
3837
3838void TagV(ImAxis axis, double v, const ImVec4& col, const char* fmt, va_list args) {
3839 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3840 SetupLock();
3841 ImU32 bg = ImGui::GetColorU32(col);
3842 ImU32 fg = col.w == 0 ? GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_AxisText) : CalcTextColor(col);
3843 gp.Tags.AppendV(axis,v,bg,fg,fmt,args);
3844}
3845
3846void Tag(ImAxis axis, double v, const ImVec4& col, const char* fmt, ...) {
3847 va_list args;
3848 va_start(args, fmt);
3849 TagV(axis,v,col,fmt,args);
3850 va_end(args);
3851}
3852
3853void Tag(ImAxis axis, double v, const ImVec4& color, bool round) {
3854 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3855 SetupLock();
3856 char buff[IMPLOT_LABEL_MAX_SIZE];
3857 ImPlotAxis& ax = gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[axis];
3858 LabelAxisValue(ax, v, buff, sizeof(buff), round);
3859 Tag(axis,v,color,"%s",buff);
3860}
3861
3862IMPLOT_API void TagX(double x, const ImVec4& color, bool round) {
3863 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3864 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "TagX() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3865 Tag(gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX, x, color, round);
3866}
3867
3868IMPLOT_API void TagX(double x, const ImVec4& color, const char* fmt, ...) {
3869 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3870 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "TagX() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3871 va_list args;
3872 va_start(args, fmt);
3873 TagV(gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX,x,color,fmt,args);
3874 va_end(args);
3875}
3876
3877IMPLOT_API void TagXV(double x, const ImVec4& color, const char* fmt, va_list args) {
3878 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3879 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "TagX() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3880 TagV(gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentX, x, color, fmt, args);
3881}
3882
3883IMPLOT_API void TagY(double y, const ImVec4& color, bool round) {
3884 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3885 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "TagY() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3886 Tag(gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY, y, color, round);
3887}
3888
3889IMPLOT_API void TagY(double y, const ImVec4& color, const char* fmt, ...) {
3890 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3891 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "TagY() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3892 va_list args;
3893 va_start(args, fmt);
3894 TagV(gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY,y,color,fmt,args);
3895 va_end(args);
3896}
3897
3898IMPLOT_API void TagYV(double y, const ImVec4& color, const char* fmt, va_list args) {
3899 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3900 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "TagY() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3901 TagV(gp.CurrentPlot->CurrentY, y, color, fmt, args);
3902}
3903
3904static const float DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE = 4.0f;
3905
3906bool DragPoint(int n_id, double* x, double* y, const ImVec4& col, float radius, ImPlotDragToolFlags flags, bool* out_clicked, bool* out_hovered, bool* out_held) {
3907 ImGui::PushID("#IMPLOT_DRAG_POINT");
3908 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot->CurrentPlot != nullptr, "DragPoint() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3909 SetupLock();
3910
3911 if (!ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoFit) && FitThisFrame()) {
3912 FitPoint(ImPlotPoint(*x,*y));
3913 }
3914
3915 const bool input = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoInputs);
3916 const bool show_curs = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoCursors);
3917 const bool no_delay = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_Delayed);
3918 const float grab_half_size = ImMax(DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, radius);
3919 const ImVec4 color = IsColorAuto(col) ? ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text) : col;
3920 const ImU32 col32 = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(color);
3921
3922 ImVec2 pos = PlotToPixels(*x,*y,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
3923 const ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->GetID(n_id);
3924 ImRect rect(pos.x-grab_half_size,pos.y-grab_half_size,pos.x+grab_half_size,pos.y+grab_half_size);
3925 bool hovered = false, held = false;
3926
3927 ImGui::KeepAliveID(id);
3928 if (input) {
3929 bool clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(rect,id,&hovered,&held);
3930 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = clicked;
3931 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = hovered;
3932 if (out_held) *out_held = held;
3933 }
3934
3935 bool modified = false;
3936 if (held && ImGui::IsMouseDragging(0)) {
3937 *x = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x;
3938 *y = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).y;
3939 modified = true;
3940 }
3941
3942 PushPlotClipRect();
3943 ImDrawList& DrawList = *GetPlotDrawList();
3944 if ((hovered || held) && show_curs)
3945 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_Hand);
3946 if (modified && no_delay)
3947 pos = PlotToPixels(*x,*y,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
3948 DrawList.AddCircleFilled(pos, radius, col32);
3949 PopPlotClipRect();
3950
3951 ImGui::PopID();
3952 return modified;
3953}
3954
3955bool DragLineX(int n_id, double* value, const ImVec4& col, float thickness, ImPlotDragToolFlags flags, bool* out_clicked, bool* out_hovered, bool* out_held) {
3956 // ImGui::PushID("#IMPLOT_DRAG_LINE_X");
3957 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
3958 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "DragLineX() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
3959 SetupLock();
3960
3961 if (!ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoFit) && FitThisFrame()) {
3962 FitPointX(*value);
3963 }
3964
3965 const bool input = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoInputs);
3966 const bool show_curs = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoCursors);
3967 const bool no_delay = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_Delayed);
3968 const float grab_half_size = ImMax(DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, thickness/2);
3969 float yt = gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Min.y;
3970 float yb = gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Max.y;
3971 float x = IM_ROUND(PlotToPixels(*value,0,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x);
3972 const ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->GetID(n_id);
3973 ImRect rect(x-grab_half_size,yt,x+grab_half_size,yb);
3974 bool hovered = false, held = false;
3975
3976 ImGui::KeepAliveID(id);
3977 if (input) {
3978 bool clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(rect,id,&hovered,&held);
3979 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = clicked;
3980 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = hovered;
3981 if (out_held) *out_held = held;
3982 }
3983
3984 if ((hovered || held) && show_curs)
3985 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeEW);
3986
3987 float len = gp.Style.MajorTickLen.x;
3988 ImVec4 color = IsColorAuto(col) ? ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text) : col;
3989 ImU32 col32 = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(color);
3990
3991 bool modified = false;
3992 if (held && ImGui::IsMouseDragging(0)) {
3993 *value = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x;
3994 modified = true;
3995 }
3996
3997 PushPlotClipRect();
3998 ImDrawList& DrawList = *GetPlotDrawList();
3999 if (modified && no_delay)
4000 x = IM_ROUND(PlotToPixels(*value,0,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x);
4001 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(x,yt), ImVec2(x,yb), col32, thickness);
4002 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(x,yt), ImVec2(x,yt+len), col32, 3*thickness);
4003 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(x,yb), ImVec2(x,yb-len), col32, 3*thickness);
4004 PopPlotClipRect();
4005
4006 // ImGui::PopID();
4007 return modified;
4008}
4009
4010bool DragLineY(int n_id, double* value, const ImVec4& col, float thickness, ImPlotDragToolFlags flags, bool* out_clicked, bool* out_hovered, bool* out_held) {
4011 ImGui::PushID("#IMPLOT_DRAG_LINE_Y");
4012 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4013 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "DragLineY() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
4014 SetupLock();
4015
4016 if (!ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoFit) && FitThisFrame()) {
4017 FitPointY(*value);
4018 }
4019
4020 const bool input = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoInputs);
4021 const bool show_curs = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoCursors);
4022 const bool no_delay = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_Delayed);
4023 const float grab_half_size = ImMax(DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, thickness/2);
4024 float xl = gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Min.x;
4025 float xr = gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect.Max.x;
4026 float y = IM_ROUND(PlotToPixels(0, *value,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).y);
4027
4028 const ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->GetID(n_id);
4029 ImRect rect(xl,y-grab_half_size,xr,y+grab_half_size);
4030 bool hovered = false, held = false;
4031
4032 ImGui::KeepAliveID(id);
4033 if (input) {
4034 bool clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(rect,id,&hovered,&held);
4035 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = clicked;
4036 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = hovered;
4037 if (out_held) *out_held = held;
4038 }
4039
4040 if ((hovered || held) && show_curs)
4041 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNS);
4042
4043 float len = gp.Style.MajorTickLen.y;
4044 ImVec4 color = IsColorAuto(col) ? ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text) : col;
4045 ImU32 col32 = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(color);
4046
4047 bool modified = false;
4048 if (held && ImGui::IsMouseDragging(0)) {
4049 *value = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).y;
4050 modified = true;
4051 }
4052
4053 PushPlotClipRect();
4054 ImDrawList& DrawList = *GetPlotDrawList();
4055 if (modified && no_delay)
4056 y = IM_ROUND(PlotToPixels(0, *value,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).y);
4057 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(xl,y), ImVec2(xr,y), col32, thickness);
4058 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(xl,y), ImVec2(xl+len,y), col32, 3*thickness);
4059 DrawList.AddLine(ImVec2(xr,y), ImVec2(xr-len,y), col32, 3*thickness);
4060 PopPlotClipRect();
4061
4062 ImGui::PopID();
4063 return modified;
4064}
4065
4066bool DragRect(int n_id, double* x_min, double* y_min, double* x_max, double* y_max, const ImVec4& col, ImPlotDragToolFlags flags, bool* out_clicked, bool* out_hovered, bool* out_held) {
4067 ImGui::PushID("#IMPLOT_DRAG_RECT");
4068 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot->CurrentPlot != nullptr, "DragRect() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
4069 SetupLock();
4070
4071 if (!ImHasFlag(flags,ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoFit) && FitThisFrame()) {
4072 FitPoint(ImPlotPoint(*x_min,*y_min));
4073 FitPoint(ImPlotPoint(*x_max,*y_max));
4074 }
4075
4076 const bool input = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoInputs);
4077 const bool show_curs = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_NoCursors);
4078 const bool no_delay = !ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotDragToolFlags_Delayed);
4079 bool h[] = {true,false,true,false};
4080 double* x[] = {x_min,x_max,x_max,x_min};
4081 double* y[] = {y_min,y_min,y_max,y_max};
4082 ImVec2 p[4];
4083 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
4084 p[i] = PlotToPixels(*x[i],*y[i],IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
4085 ImVec2 pc = PlotToPixels((*x_min+*x_max)/2,(*y_min+*y_max)/2,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
4086 ImRect rect(ImMin(p[0],p[2]),ImMax(p[0],p[2]));
4087 ImRect rect_grab = rect; rect_grab.Expand(DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE);
4088
4089 ImGuiMouseCursor cur[4];
4090 if (show_curs) {
4091 cur[0] = (rect.Min.x == p[0].x && rect.Min.y == p[0].y) || (rect.Max.x == p[0].x && rect.Max.y == p[0].y) ? ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE : ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNESW;
4092 cur[1] = cur[0] == ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE ? ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNESW : ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE;
4093 cur[2] = cur[1] == ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE ? ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNESW : ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE;
4094 cur[3] = cur[2] == ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE ? ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNESW : ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNWSE;
4095 }
4096
4097 ImVec4 color = IsColorAuto(col) ? ImGui::GetStyleColorVec4(ImGuiCol_Text) : col;
4098 ImU32 col32 = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(color);
4099 color.w *= 0.25f;
4100 ImU32 col32_a = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(color);
4101 const ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->GetID(n_id);
4102
4103 bool modified = false;
4104 bool clicked = false, hovered = false, held = false;
4105
4106 const bool is_movable = *x_min != *x_max || *y_min != *y_max;
4107 if (is_movable) {
4108 ImGui::KeepAliveID(id);
4109 if (input) {
4110 // middle point
4111 ImRect b_rect(pc.x-DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE,pc.y-DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE,pc.x+DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE,pc.y+DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE);
4112 clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(b_rect,id,&hovered,&held);
4113 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = clicked;
4114 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = hovered;
4115 if (out_held) *out_held = held;
4116 }
4117
4118 if ((hovered || held) && show_curs)
4119 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeAll);
4120 if (held && ImGui::IsMouseDragging(0)) {
4121 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
4122 ImPlotPoint pp = PixelsToPlot(p[i] + ImGui::GetIO().MouseDelta,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
4123 *y[i] = pp.y;
4124 *x[i] = pp.x;
4125 }
4126 modified = true;
4127 }
4128 }
4129
4130 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
4131 // points
4132 ImRect b_rect(p[i].x - DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, p[i].y - DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, p[i].x + DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, p[i].y + DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE);
4133 ImGuiID p_id = id + i + 1;
4134 ImGui::KeepAliveID(p_id);
4135 if (input) {
4136 clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(b_rect,p_id,&hovered,&held);
4137 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = *out_clicked || clicked;
4138 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = *out_hovered || hovered;
4139 if (out_held) *out_held = *out_held || held;
4140 }
4141 if ((hovered || held) && show_curs)
4142 ImGui::SetMouseCursor(cur[i]);
4143
4144 if (held && ImGui::IsMouseDragging(0)) {
4145 *x[i] = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x;
4146 *y[i] = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).y;
4147 modified = true;
4148 }
4149
4150 // edges
4151 ImVec2 e_min = ImMin(p[i],p[(i+1)%4]);
4152 ImVec2 e_max = ImMax(p[i],p[(i+1)%4]);
4153 b_rect = h[i] ? ImRect(e_min.x + DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, e_min.y - DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, e_max.x - DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, e_max.y + DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE)
4154 : ImRect(e_min.x - DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, e_min.y + DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, e_max.x + DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE, e_max.y - DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE);
4155 ImGuiID e_id = id + i + 5;
4156 ImGui::KeepAliveID(e_id);
4157 if (input) {
4158 clicked = ImGui::ButtonBehavior(b_rect,e_id,&hovered,&held);
4159 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = *out_clicked || clicked;
4160 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = *out_hovered || hovered;
4161 if (out_held) *out_held = *out_held || held;
4162 }
4163 if ((hovered || held) && show_curs)
4164 h[i] ? ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeNS) : ImGui::SetMouseCursor(ImGuiMouseCursor_ResizeEW);
4165 if (held && ImGui::IsMouseDragging(0)) {
4166 if (h[i])
4167 *y[i] = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).y;
4168 else
4169 *x[i] = ImPlot::GetPlotMousePos(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO).x;
4170 modified = true;
4171 }
4172 if (hovered && ImGui::IsMouseDoubleClicked(0))
4173 {
4174 ImPlotRect b = GetPlotLimits(IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
4175 if (h[i])
4176 *y[i] = ((y[i] == y_min && *y_min < *y_max) || (y[i] == y_max && *y_max < *y_min)) ? b.Y.Min : b.Y.Max;
4177 else
4178 *x[i] = ((x[i] == x_min && *x_min < *x_max) || (x[i] == x_max && *x_max < *x_min)) ? b.X.Min : b.X.Max;
4179 modified = true;
4180 }
4181 }
4182
4183 const bool mouse_inside = rect_grab.Contains(ImGui::GetMousePos());
4184 const bool mouse_clicked = ImGui::IsMouseClicked(0);
4185 const bool mouse_down = ImGui::IsMouseDown(0);
4186 if (input && mouse_inside) {
4187 if (out_clicked) *out_clicked = *out_clicked || mouse_clicked;
4188 if (out_hovered) *out_hovered = true;
4189 if (out_held) *out_held = *out_held || mouse_down;
4190 }
4191
4192 PushPlotClipRect();
4193 ImDrawList& DrawList = *GetPlotDrawList();
4194 if (modified && no_delay) {
4195 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
4196 p[i] = PlotToPixels(*x[i],*y[i],IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
4197 pc = PlotToPixels((*x_min+*x_max)/2,(*y_min+*y_max)/2,IMPLOT_AUTO,IMPLOT_AUTO);
4198 rect = ImRect(ImMin(p[0],p[2]),ImMax(p[0],p[2]));
4199 }
4200 DrawList.AddRectFilled(rect.Min, rect.Max, col32_a);
4201 DrawList.AddRect(rect.Min, rect.Max, col32);
4202 if (input && (modified || mouse_inside)) {
4203 DrawList.AddCircleFilled(pc,DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE,col32);
4204 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i)
4205 DrawList.AddCircleFilled(p[i],DRAG_GRAB_HALF_SIZE,col32);
4206 }
4207 PopPlotClipRect();
4208 ImGui::PopID();
4209 return modified;
4210}
4211
4212bool DragRect(int id, ImPlotRect* bounds, const ImVec4& col, ImPlotDragToolFlags flags, bool* out_clicked, bool* out_hovered, bool* out_held) {
4213 return DragRect(id, &bounds->X.Min, &bounds->Y.Min,&bounds->X.Max, &bounds->Y.Max, col, flags, out_clicked, out_hovered, out_held);
4214}
4215
4216//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4217// [SECTION] Legend Utils and Tools
4218//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4219
4220bool IsLegendEntryHovered(const char* label_id) {
4221 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4222 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentItems != nullptr, "IsPlotItemHighlight() needs to be called within an itemized context!");
4223 SetupLock();
4224 ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetIDWithSeed(label_id, nullptr, gp.CurrentItems->ID);
4225 ImPlotItem* item = gp.CurrentItems->GetItem(id);
4226 return item && item->LegendHovered;
4227}
4228
4229bool BeginLegendPopup(const char* label_id, ImGuiMouseButton mouse_button) {
4230 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4231 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentItems != nullptr, "BeginLegendPopup() needs to be called within an itemized context!");
4232 SetupLock();
4233 ImGuiWindow* window = GImGui->CurrentWindow;
4234 if (window->SkipItems)
4235 return false;
4236 ImGuiID id = ImGui::GetIDWithSeed(label_id, nullptr, gp.CurrentItems->ID);
4237 if (ImGui::IsMouseReleased(mouse_button)) {
4238 ImPlotItem* item = gp.CurrentItems->GetItem(id);
4239 if (item && item->LegendHovered)
4240 ImGui::OpenPopupEx(id);
4241 }
4242 return ImGui::BeginPopupEx(id, ImGuiWindowFlags_AlwaysAutoResize | ImGuiWindowFlags_NoTitleBar | ImGuiWindowFlags_NoSavedSettings);
4243}
4244
4245void EndLegendPopup() {
4246 SetupLock();
4247 ImGui::EndPopup();
4248}
4249
4250void ShowAltLegend(const char* title_id, bool vertical, const ImVec2 size, bool interactable) {
4251 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4252 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
4253 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
4254 if (Window->SkipItems)
4255 return;
4256 ImDrawList &DrawList = *Window->DrawList;
4257 ImPlotPlot* plot = GetPlot(title_id);
4258 ImVec2 legend_size;
4259 ImVec2 default_size = gp.Style.LegendPadding * 2;
4260 if (plot != nullptr) {
4261 legend_size = CalcLegendSize(plot->Items, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, vertical);
4262 default_size = legend_size + gp.Style.LegendPadding * 2;
4263 }
4264 ImVec2 frame_size = ImGui::CalcItemSize(size, default_size.x, default_size.y);
4265 ImRect bb_frame = ImRect(Window->DC.CursorPos, Window->DC.CursorPos + frame_size);
4266 ImGui::ItemSize(bb_frame);
4267 if (!ImGui::ItemAdd(bb_frame, 0, &bb_frame))
4268 return;
4269 ImGui::RenderFrame(bb_frame.Min, bb_frame.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_FrameBg), true, G.Style.FrameRounding);
4270 DrawList.PushClipRect(bb_frame.Min, bb_frame.Max, true);
4271 if (plot != nullptr) {
4272 const ImVec2 legend_pos = GetLocationPos(bb_frame, legend_size, 0, gp.Style.LegendPadding);
4273 const ImRect legend_bb(legend_pos, legend_pos + legend_size);
4274 interactable = interactable && bb_frame.Contains(ImGui::GetIO().MousePos);
4275 // render legend box
4276 ImU32 col_bg = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendBg);
4277 ImU32 col_bd = GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_LegendBorder);
4278 DrawList.AddRectFilled(legend_bb.Min, legend_bb.Max, col_bg);
4279 DrawList.AddRect(legend_bb.Min, legend_bb.Max, col_bd);
4280 // render entries
4281 ShowLegendEntries(plot->Items, legend_bb, interactable, gp.Style.LegendInnerPadding, gp.Style.LegendSpacing, vertical, DrawList);
4282 }
4283 DrawList.PopClipRect();
4284}
4285
4286//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4287// [SECTION] Drag and Drop Utils
4288//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4289
4290bool BeginDragDropTargetPlot() {
4291 SetupLock();
4292 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4293 ImRect rect = gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect;
4294 return ImGui::BeginDragDropTargetCustom(rect, gp.CurrentPlot->ID);
4295}
4296
4297bool BeginDragDropTargetAxis(ImAxis axis) {
4298 SetupLock();
4299 ImPlotPlot& plot = *GImPlot->CurrentPlot;
4300 ImPlotAxis& ax = plot.Axes[axis];
4301 ImRect rect = ax.HoverRect;
4302 rect.Expand(-3.5f);
4303 return ImGui::BeginDragDropTargetCustom(rect, ax.ID);
4304}
4305
4306bool BeginDragDropTargetLegend() {
4307 SetupLock();
4308 ImPlotItemGroup& items = *GImPlot->CurrentItems;
4309 ImRect rect = items.Legend.RectClamped;
4310 return ImGui::BeginDragDropTargetCustom(rect, items.ID);
4311}
4312
4313void EndDragDropTarget() {
4314 SetupLock();
4315 ImGui::EndDragDropTarget();
4316}
4317
4318bool BeginDragDropSourcePlot(ImGuiDragDropFlags flags) {
4319 SetupLock();
4320 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4321 ImPlotPlot* plot = gp.CurrentPlot;
4322 if (GImGui->IO.KeyMods == gp.InputMap.OverrideMod || GImGui->DragDropPayload.SourceId == plot->ID)
4323 return ImGui::ItemAdd(plot->PlotRect, plot->ID) && ImGui::BeginDragDropSource(flags);
4324 return false;
4325}
4326
4327bool BeginDragDropSourceAxis(ImAxis idx, ImGuiDragDropFlags flags) {
4328 SetupLock();
4329 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4330 ImPlotAxis& axis = gp.CurrentPlot->Axes[idx];
4331 if (GImGui->IO.KeyMods == gp.InputMap.OverrideMod || GImGui->DragDropPayload.SourceId == axis.ID)
4332 return ImGui::ItemAdd(axis.HoverRect, axis.ID) && ImGui::BeginDragDropSource(flags);
4333 return false;
4334}
4335
4336bool BeginDragDropSourceItem(const char* label_id, ImGuiDragDropFlags flags) {
4337 SetupLock();
4338 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4339 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentItems != nullptr, "BeginDragDropSourceItem() needs to be called within an itemized context!");
4340 ImGuiID item_id = ImGui::GetIDWithSeed(label_id, nullptr, gp.CurrentItems->ID);
4341 ImPlotItem* item = gp.CurrentItems->GetItem(item_id);
4342 if (item != nullptr) {
4343 return ImGui::ItemAdd(item->LegendHoverRect, item->ID) && ImGui::BeginDragDropSource(flags);
4344 }
4345 return false;
4346}
4347
4348void EndDragDropSource() {
4349 SetupLock();
4350 ImGui::EndDragDropSource();
4351}
4352
4353//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4354// [SECTION] Aligned Plots
4355//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4356
4357bool BeginAlignedPlots(const char* group_id, bool vertical) {
4358 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
4359 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4360 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentAlignmentH == nullptr && gp.CurrentAlignmentV == nullptr, "Mismatched BeginAlignedPlots()/EndAlignedPlots()!");
4361 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
4362 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
4363 if (Window->SkipItems)
4364 return false;
4365 const ImGuiID ID = Window->GetID(group_id);
4366 ImPlotAlignmentData* alignment = gp.AlignmentData.GetOrAddByKey(ID);
4367 if (vertical)
4368 gp.CurrentAlignmentV = alignment;
4369 else
4370 gp.CurrentAlignmentH = alignment;
4371 if (alignment->Vertical != vertical)
4372 alignment->Reset();
4373 alignment->Vertical = vertical;
4374 alignment->Begin();
4375 return true;
4376}
4377
4378void EndAlignedPlots() {
4379 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
4380 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4381 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentAlignmentH != nullptr || gp.CurrentAlignmentV != nullptr, "Mismatched BeginAlignedPlots()/EndAlignedPlots()!");
4382 ImPlotAlignmentData* alignment = gp.CurrentAlignmentH != nullptr ? gp.CurrentAlignmentH : (gp.CurrentAlignmentV != nullptr ? gp.CurrentAlignmentV : nullptr);
4383 if (alignment)
4384 alignment->End();
4385 ResetCtxForNextAlignedPlots(GImPlot);
4386}
4387
4388//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4389// [SECTION] Plot and Item Styling
4390//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4391
4392ImPlotStyle& GetStyle() {
4393 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
4394 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4395 return gp.Style;
4396}
4397
4398void PushStyleColor(ImPlotCol idx, ImU32 col) {
4399 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4400 ImGuiColorMod backup;
4401 backup.Col = (ImGuiCol)idx;
4402 backup.BackupValue = gp.Style.Colors[idx];
4403 gp.ColorModifiers.push_back(backup);
4404 gp.Style.Colors[idx] = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(col);
4405}
4406
4407void PushStyleColor(ImPlotCol idx, const ImVec4& col) {
4408 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4409 ImGuiColorMod backup;
4410 backup.Col = (ImGuiCol)idx;
4411 backup.BackupValue = gp.Style.Colors[idx];
4412 gp.ColorModifiers.push_back(backup);
4413 gp.Style.Colors[idx] = col;
4414}
4415
4416void PopStyleColor(int count) {
4417 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4418 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(count <= gp.ColorModifiers.Size, "You can't pop more modifiers than have been pushed!");
4419 while (count > 0)
4420 {
4421 ImGuiColorMod& backup = gp.ColorModifiers.back();
4422 gp.Style.Colors[backup.Col] = backup.BackupValue;
4423 gp.ColorModifiers.pop_back();
4424 count--;
4425 }
4426}
4427
4428void PushStyleVar(ImPlotStyleVar idx, float val) {
4429 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4430 const ImPlotStyleVarInfo* var_info = GetPlotStyleVarInfo(idx);
4431 if (var_info->Type == ImGuiDataType_Float && var_info->Count == 1) {
4432 float* pvar = (float*)var_info->GetVarPtr(&gp.Style);
4433 gp.StyleModifiers.push_back(ImGuiStyleMod((ImGuiStyleVar)idx, *pvar));
4434 *pvar = val;
4435 return;
4436 }
4437 IM_ASSERT(0 && "Called PushStyleVar() float variant but variable is not a float!");
4438}
4439
4440void PushStyleVar(ImPlotStyleVar idx, int val) {
4441 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4442 const ImPlotStyleVarInfo* var_info = GetPlotStyleVarInfo(idx);
4443 if (var_info->Type == ImGuiDataType_S32 && var_info->Count == 1) {
4444 int* pvar = (int*)var_info->GetVarPtr(&gp.Style);
4445 gp.StyleModifiers.push_back(ImGuiStyleMod((ImGuiStyleVar)idx, *pvar));
4446 *pvar = val;
4447 return;
4448 }
4449 else if (var_info->Type == ImGuiDataType_Float && var_info->Count == 1) {
4450 float* pvar = (float*)var_info->GetVarPtr(&gp.Style);
4451 gp.StyleModifiers.push_back(ImGuiStyleMod((ImGuiStyleVar)idx, *pvar));
4452 *pvar = (float)val;
4453 return;
4454 }
4455 IM_ASSERT(0 && "Called PushStyleVar() int variant but variable is not a int!");
4456}
4457
4458void PushStyleVar(ImPlotStyleVar idx, const ImVec2& val)
4459{
4460 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4461 const ImPlotStyleVarInfo* var_info = GetPlotStyleVarInfo(idx);
4462 if (var_info->Type == ImGuiDataType_Float && var_info->Count == 2)
4463 {
4464 ImVec2* pvar = (ImVec2*)var_info->GetVarPtr(&gp.Style);
4465 gp.StyleModifiers.push_back(ImGuiStyleMod((ImGuiStyleVar)idx, *pvar));
4466 *pvar = val;
4467 return;
4468 }
4469 IM_ASSERT(0 && "Called PushStyleVar() ImVec2 variant but variable is not a ImVec2!");
4470}
4471
4472void PopStyleVar(int count) {
4473 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4474 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(count <= gp.StyleModifiers.Size, "You can't pop more modifiers than have been pushed!");
4475 while (count > 0) {
4476 ImGuiStyleMod& backup = gp.StyleModifiers.back();
4477 const ImPlotStyleVarInfo* info = GetPlotStyleVarInfo(backup.VarIdx);
4478 void* data = info->GetVarPtr(&gp.Style);
4479 if (info->Type == ImGuiDataType_Float && info->Count == 1) {
4480 ((float*)data)[0] = backup.BackupFloat[0];
4481 }
4482 else if (info->Type == ImGuiDataType_Float && info->Count == 2) {
4483 ((float*)data)[0] = backup.BackupFloat[0];
4484 ((float*)data)[1] = backup.BackupFloat[1];
4485 }
4486 else if (info->Type == ImGuiDataType_S32 && info->Count == 1) {
4487 ((int*)data)[0] = backup.BackupInt[0];
4488 }
4489 gp.StyleModifiers.pop_back();
4490 count--;
4491 }
4492}
4493
4494//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
4495// [Section] Colormaps
4496//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
4497
4498ImPlotColormap AddColormap(const char* name, const ImVec4* colormap, int size, bool qual) {
4499 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4500 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(size > 1, "The colormap size must be greater than 1!");
4501 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.ColormapData.GetIndex(name) == -1, "The colormap name has already been used!");
4502 ImVector<ImU32> buffer;
4503 buffer.resize(size);
4504 for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i)
4505 buffer[i] = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(colormap[i]);
4506 return gp.ColormapData.Append(name, buffer.Data, size, qual);
4507}
4508
4509ImPlotColormap AddColormap(const char* name, const ImU32* colormap, int size, bool qual) {
4510 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4511 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(size > 1, "The colormap size must be greater than 1!");
4512 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.ColormapData.GetIndex(name) == -1, "The colormap name has already be used!");
4513 return gp.ColormapData.Append(name, colormap, size, qual);
4514}
4515
4516int GetColormapCount() {
4517 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4518 return gp.ColormapData.Count;
4519}
4520
4521const char* GetColormapName(ImPlotColormap colormap) {
4522 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4523 return gp.ColormapData.GetName(colormap);
4524}
4525
4526ImPlotColormap GetColormapIndex(const char* name) {
4527 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4528 return gp.ColormapData.GetIndex(name);
4529}
4530
4531void PushColormap(ImPlotColormap colormap) {
4532 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4533 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(colormap >= 0 && colormap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "The colormap index is invalid!");
4534 gp.ColormapModifiers.push_back(gp.Style.Colormap);
4535 gp.Style.Colormap = colormap;
4536}
4537
4538void PushColormap(const char* name) {
4539 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4540 ImPlotColormap idx = gp.ColormapData.GetIndex(name);
4541 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(idx != -1, "The colormap name is invalid!");
4542 PushColormap(idx);
4543}
4544
4545void PopColormap(int count) {
4546 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4547 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(count <= gp.ColormapModifiers.Size, "You can't pop more modifiers than have been pushed!");
4548 while (count > 0) {
4549 const ImPlotColormap& backup = gp.ColormapModifiers.back();
4550 gp.Style.Colormap = backup;
4551 gp.ColormapModifiers.pop_back();
4552 count--;
4553 }
4554}
4555
4556ImU32 NextColormapColorU32() {
4557 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4558 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentItems != nullptr, "NextColormapColor() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
4559 int idx = gp.CurrentItems->ColormapIdx % gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(gp.Style.Colormap);
4560 ImU32 col = gp.ColormapData.GetKeyColor(gp.Style.Colormap, idx);
4561 gp.CurrentItems->ColormapIdx++;
4562 return col;
4563}
4564
4565ImVec4 NextColormapColor() {
4566 return ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(NextColormapColorU32());
4567}
4568
4569int GetColormapSize(ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4570 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4571 cmap = cmap == IMPLOT_AUTO ? gp.Style.Colormap : cmap;
4572 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(cmap >= 0 && cmap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "Invalid colormap index!");
4573 return gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(cmap);
4574}
4575
4576ImU32 GetColormapColorU32(int idx, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4577 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4578 cmap = cmap == IMPLOT_AUTO ? gp.Style.Colormap : cmap;
4579 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(cmap >= 0 && cmap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "Invalid colormap index!");
4580 idx = idx % gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(cmap);
4581 return gp.ColormapData.GetKeyColor(cmap, idx);
4582}
4583
4584ImVec4 GetColormapColor(int idx, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4585 return ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(GetColormapColorU32(idx,cmap));
4586}
4587
4588ImU32 SampleColormapU32(float t, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4589 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4590 cmap = cmap == IMPLOT_AUTO ? gp.Style.Colormap : cmap;
4591 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(cmap >= 0 && cmap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "Invalid colormap index!");
4592 return gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(cmap, t);
4593}
4594
4595ImVec4 SampleColormap(float t, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4596 return ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(SampleColormapU32(t,cmap));
4597}
4598
4599void RenderColorBar(const ImU32* colors, int size, ImDrawList& DrawList, const ImRect& bounds, bool vert, bool reversed, bool continuous) {
4600 const int n = continuous ? size - 1 : size;
4601 ImU32 col1, col2;
4602 if (vert) {
4603 const float step = bounds.GetHeight() / n;
4604 ImRect rect(bounds.Min.x, bounds.Min.y, bounds.Max.x, bounds.Min.y + step);
4605 for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
4606 if (reversed) {
4607 col1 = colors[size-i-1];
4608 col2 = continuous ? colors[size-i-2] : col1;
4609 }
4610 else {
4611 col1 = colors[i];
4612 col2 = continuous ? colors[i+1] : col1;
4613 }
4614 DrawList.AddRectFilledMultiColor(rect.Min, rect.Max, col1, col1, col2, col2);
4615 rect.TranslateY(step);
4616 }
4617 }
4618 else {
4619 const float step = bounds.GetWidth() / n;
4620 ImRect rect(bounds.Min.x, bounds.Min.y, bounds.Min.x + step, bounds.Max.y);
4621 for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
4622 if (reversed) {
4623 col1 = colors[size-i-1];
4624 col2 = continuous ? colors[size-i-2] : col1;
4625 }
4626 else {
4627 col1 = colors[i];
4628 col2 = continuous ? colors[i+1] : col1;
4629 }
4630 DrawList.AddRectFilledMultiColor(rect.Min, rect.Max, col1, col2, col2, col1);
4631 rect.TranslateX(step);
4632 }
4633 }
4634}
4635
4636void ColormapScale(const char* label, double scale_min, double scale_max, const ImVec2& size, const char* format, ImPlotColormapScaleFlags flags, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4637 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
4638 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
4639 if (Window->SkipItems)
4640 return;
4641
4642 const ImGuiID ID = Window->GetID(label);
4643 ImVec2 label_size(0,0);
4644 if (!ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotColormapScaleFlags_NoLabel)) {
4645 label_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(label,nullptr,true);
4646 }
4647
4648 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4649 cmap = cmap == IMPLOT_AUTO ? gp.Style.Colormap : cmap;
4650 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(cmap >= 0 && cmap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "Invalid colormap index!");
4651
4652 ImVec2 frame_size = ImGui::CalcItemSize(size, 0, gp.Style.PlotDefaultSize.y);
4653 if (frame_size.y < gp.Style.PlotMinSize.y && size.y < 0.0f)
4654 frame_size.y = gp.Style.PlotMinSize.y;
4655
4656 ImPlotRange range(ImMin(scale_min,scale_max), ImMax(scale_min,scale_max));
4657 gp.CTicker.Reset();
4658 Locator_Default(gp.CTicker, range, frame_size.y, true, Formatter_Default, (void*)format);
4659
4660 const bool rend_label = label_size.x > 0;
4661 const float txt_off = gp.Style.LabelPadding.x;
4662 const float pad = txt_off + gp.CTicker.MaxSize.x + (rend_label ? txt_off + label_size.y : 0);
4663 float bar_w = 20;
4664 if (frame_size.x == 0)
4665 frame_size.x = bar_w + pad + 2 * gp.Style.PlotPadding.x;
4666 else {
4667 bar_w = frame_size.x - (pad + 2 * gp.Style.PlotPadding.x);
4668 if (bar_w < gp.Style.MajorTickLen.y)
4669 bar_w = gp.Style.MajorTickLen.y;
4670 }
4671
4672 ImDrawList &DrawList = *Window->DrawList;
4673 ImRect bb_frame = ImRect(Window->DC.CursorPos, Window->DC.CursorPos + frame_size);
4674 ImGui::ItemSize(bb_frame);
4675 if (!ImGui::ItemAdd(bb_frame, ID, &bb_frame))
4676 return;
4677
4678 ImGui::RenderFrame(bb_frame.Min, bb_frame.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_FrameBg), true, G.Style.FrameRounding);
4679
4680 const bool opposite = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotColormapScaleFlags_Opposite);
4681 const bool inverted = ImHasFlag(flags, ImPlotColormapScaleFlags_Invert);
4682 const bool reversed = scale_min > scale_max;
4683
4684 float bb_grad_shift = opposite ? pad : 0;
4685 ImRect bb_grad(bb_frame.Min + gp.Style.PlotPadding + ImVec2(bb_grad_shift, 0),
4686 bb_frame.Min + ImVec2(bar_w + gp.Style.PlotPadding.x + bb_grad_shift,
4687 frame_size.y - gp.Style.PlotPadding.y));
4688
4689 ImGui::PushClipRect(bb_frame.Min, bb_frame.Max, true);
4690 const ImU32 col_text = ImGui::GetColorU32(ImGuiCol_Text);
4691
4692 const bool invert_scale = inverted ? (reversed ? false : true) : (reversed ? true : false);
4693 const float y_min = invert_scale ? bb_grad.Max.y : bb_grad.Min.y;
4694 const float y_max = invert_scale ? bb_grad.Min.y : bb_grad.Max.y;
4695
4696 RenderColorBar(gp.ColormapData.GetKeys(cmap), gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(cmap), DrawList, bb_grad, true, !inverted, !gp.ColormapData.IsQual(cmap));
4697 for (int i = 0; i < gp.CTicker.TickCount(); ++i) {
4698 const double y_pos_plt = gp.CTicker.Ticks[i].PlotPos;
4699 const float y_pos = ImRemap((float)y_pos_plt, (float)range.Max, (float)range.Min, y_min, y_max);
4700 const float tick_width = gp.CTicker.Ticks[i].Major ? gp.Style.MajorTickLen.y : gp.Style.MinorTickLen.y;
4701 const float tick_thick = gp.CTicker.Ticks[i].Major ? gp.Style.MajorTickSize.y : gp.Style.MinorTickSize.y;
4702 const float tick_t = (float)((y_pos_plt - scale_min) / (scale_max - scale_min));
4703 const ImU32 tick_col = CalcTextColor(gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(cmap,tick_t));
4704 if (y_pos < bb_grad.Max.y - 2 && y_pos > bb_grad.Min.y + 2) {
4705 DrawList.AddLine(opposite ? ImVec2(bb_grad.Min.x+1, y_pos) : ImVec2(bb_grad.Max.x-1, y_pos),
4706 opposite ? ImVec2(bb_grad.Min.x + tick_width, y_pos) : ImVec2(bb_grad.Max.x - tick_width, y_pos),
4707 tick_col,
4708 tick_thick);
4709 }
4710 const float txt_x = opposite ? bb_grad.Min.x - txt_off - gp.CTicker.Ticks[i].LabelSize.x : bb_grad.Max.x + txt_off;
4711 const float txt_y = y_pos - gp.CTicker.Ticks[i].LabelSize.y * 0.5f;
4712 DrawList.AddText(ImVec2(txt_x, txt_y), col_text, gp.CTicker.GetText(i));
4713 }
4714
4715 if (rend_label) {
4716 const float pos_x = opposite ? bb_frame.Min.x + gp.Style.PlotPadding.x : bb_grad.Max.x + 2 * txt_off + gp.CTicker.MaxSize.x;
4717 const float pos_y = bb_grad.GetCenter().y + label_size.x * 0.5f;
4718 const char* label_end = ImGui::FindRenderedTextEnd(label);
4719 AddTextVertical(&DrawList,ImVec2(pos_x,pos_y),col_text,label,label_end);
4720 }
4721 DrawList.AddRect(bb_grad.Min, bb_grad.Max, GetStyleColorU32(ImPlotCol_PlotBorder));
4722 ImGui::PopClipRect();
4723}
4724
4725bool ColormapSlider(const char* label, float* t, ImVec4* out, const char* format, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4726 *t = ImClamp(*t,0.0f,1.0f);
4727 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
4728 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
4729 if (Window->SkipItems)
4730 return false;
4731 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4732 cmap = cmap == IMPLOT_AUTO ? gp.Style.Colormap : cmap;
4733 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(cmap >= 0 && cmap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "Invalid colormap index!");
4734 const ImU32* keys = gp.ColormapData.GetKeys(cmap);
4735 const int count = gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(cmap);
4736 const bool qual = gp.ColormapData.IsQual(cmap);
4737 const ImVec2 pos = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->DC.CursorPos;
4738 const float w = ImGui::CalcItemWidth();
4739 const float h = ImGui::GetFrameHeight();
4740 const ImRect rect = ImRect(pos.x,pos.y,pos.x+w,pos.y+h);
4741 RenderColorBar(keys,count,*ImGui::GetWindowDrawList(),rect,false,false,!qual);
4742 const ImU32 grab = CalcTextColor(gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(cmap,*t));
4743 // const ImU32 text = CalcTextColor(gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(cmap,0.5f));
4744 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_FrameBg,IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS);
4745 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_FrameBgActive,IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS);
4746 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_FrameBgHovered,ImVec4(1,1,1,0.1f));
4747 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_SliderGrab,grab);
4748 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_SliderGrabActive, grab);
4749 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_GrabMinSize,2);
4750 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_FrameRounding,0);
4751 const bool changed = ImGui::SliderFloat(label,t,0,1,format);
4752 ImGui::PopStyleColor(5);
4753 ImGui::PopStyleVar(2);
4754 if (out != nullptr)
4755 *out = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(cmap,*t));
4756 return changed;
4757}
4758
4759bool ColormapButton(const char* label, const ImVec2& size_arg, ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4760 ImGuiContext &G = *GImGui;
4761 const ImGuiStyle& style = G.Style;
4762 ImGuiWindow * Window = G.CurrentWindow;
4763 if (Window->SkipItems)
4764 return false;
4765 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4766 cmap = cmap == IMPLOT_AUTO ? gp.Style.Colormap : cmap;
4767 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(cmap >= 0 && cmap < gp.ColormapData.Count, "Invalid colormap index!");
4768 const ImU32* keys = gp.ColormapData.GetKeys(cmap);
4769 const int count = gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(cmap);
4770 const bool qual = gp.ColormapData.IsQual(cmap);
4771 const ImVec2 pos = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow()->DC.CursorPos;
4772 const ImVec2 label_size = ImGui::CalcTextSize(label, nullptr, true);
4773 ImVec2 size = ImGui::CalcItemSize(size_arg, label_size.x + style.FramePadding.x * 2.0f, label_size.y + style.FramePadding.y * 2.0f);
4774 const ImRect rect = ImRect(pos.x,pos.y,pos.x+size.x,pos.y+size.y);
4775 RenderColorBar(keys,count,*ImGui::GetWindowDrawList(),rect,false,false,!qual);
4776 const ImU32 text = CalcTextColor(gp.ColormapData.LerpTable(cmap,G.Style.ButtonTextAlign.x));
4777 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_Button,IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS);
4778 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_ButtonHovered,ImVec4(1,1,1,0.1f));
4779 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_ButtonActive,ImVec4(1,1,1,0.2f));
4780 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_Text,text);
4781 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_FrameRounding,0);
4782 const bool pressed = ImGui::Button(label,size);
4783 ImGui::PopStyleColor(4);
4784 ImGui::PopStyleVar(1);
4785 return pressed;
4786}
4787
4788//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4789// [Section] Miscellaneous
4790//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4791
4792ImPlotInputMap& GetInputMap() {
4793 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(GImPlot != nullptr, "No current context. Did you call ImPlot::CreateContext() or ImPlot::SetCurrentContext()?");
4794 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4795 return gp.InputMap;
4796}
4797
4798void MapInputDefault(ImPlotInputMap* dst) {
4799 ImPlotInputMap& map = dst ? *dst : GetInputMap();
4800 map.Pan = ImGuiMouseButton_Left;
4801 map.PanMod = ImGuiMod_None;
4802 map.Fit = ImGuiMouseButton_Left;
4803 map.Menu = ImGuiMouseButton_Right;
4804 map.Select = ImGuiMouseButton_Right;
4805 map.SelectMod = ImGuiMod_None;
4806 map.SelectCancel = ImGuiMouseButton_Left;
4807 map.SelectHorzMod = ImGuiMod_Alt;
4808 map.SelectVertMod = ImGuiMod_Shift;
4809 map.OverrideMod = ImGuiMod_Ctrl;
4810 map.ZoomMod = ImGuiMod_None;
4811 map.ZoomRate = 0.1f;
4812}
4813
4814void MapInputReverse(ImPlotInputMap* dst) {
4815 ImPlotInputMap& map = dst ? *dst : GetInputMap();
4816 map.Pan = ImGuiMouseButton_Right;
4817 map.PanMod = ImGuiMod_None;
4818 map.Fit = ImGuiMouseButton_Left;
4819 map.Menu = ImGuiMouseButton_Right;
4820 map.Select = ImGuiMouseButton_Left;
4821 map.SelectMod = ImGuiMod_None;
4822 map.SelectCancel = ImGuiMouseButton_Right;
4823 map.SelectHorzMod = ImGuiMod_Alt;
4824 map.SelectVertMod = ImGuiMod_Shift;
4825 map.OverrideMod = ImGuiMod_Ctrl;
4826 map.ZoomMod = ImGuiMod_None;
4827 map.ZoomRate = 0.1f;
4828}
4829
4830//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4831// [Section] Miscellaneous
4832//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4833
4834void ItemIcon(const ImVec4& col) {
4835 ItemIcon(ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(col));
4836}
4837
4838void ItemIcon(ImU32 col) {
4839 const float txt_size = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
4840 ImVec2 size(txt_size-4,txt_size);
4841 ImGuiWindow* window = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow();
4842 ImVec2 pos = window->DC.CursorPos;
4843 ImGui::GetWindowDrawList()->AddRectFilled(pos + ImVec2(0,2), pos + size - ImVec2(0,2), col);
4844 ImGui::Dummy(size);
4845}
4846
4847void ColormapIcon(ImPlotColormap cmap) {
4848 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4849 const float txt_size = ImGui::GetTextLineHeight();
4850 ImVec2 size(txt_size-4,txt_size);
4851 ImGuiWindow* window = ImGui::GetCurrentWindow();
4852 ImVec2 pos = window->DC.CursorPos;
4853 ImRect rect(pos+ImVec2(0,2),pos+size-ImVec2(0,2));
4854 ImDrawList& DrawList = *ImGui::GetWindowDrawList();
4855 RenderColorBar(gp.ColormapData.GetKeys(cmap),gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(cmap),DrawList,rect,false,false,!gp.ColormapData.IsQual(cmap));
4856 ImGui::Dummy(size);
4857}
4858
4859ImDrawList* GetPlotDrawList() {
4860 return ImGui::GetWindowDrawList();
4861}
4862
4863void PushPlotClipRect(float expand) {
4864 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4865 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(gp.CurrentPlot != nullptr, "PushPlotClipRect() needs to be called between BeginPlot() and EndPlot()!");
4866 SetupLock();
4867 ImRect rect = gp.CurrentPlot->PlotRect;
4868 rect.Expand(expand);
4869 ImGui::PushClipRect(rect.Min, rect.Max, true);
4870}
4871
4872void PopPlotClipRect() {
4873 SetupLock();
4874 ImGui::PopClipRect();
4875}
4876
4877static void HelpMarker(const char* desc) {
4878 ImGui::TextDisabled("(?)");
4879 if (ImGui::IsItemHovered()) {
4880 ImGui::BeginTooltip();
4881 ImGui::PushTextWrapPos(ImGui::GetFontSize() * 35.0f);
4882 ImGui::TextUnformatted(desc);
4883 ImGui::PopTextWrapPos();
4884 ImGui::EndTooltip();
4885 }
4886}
4887
4888bool ShowStyleSelector(const char* label)
4889{
4890 static int style_idx = -1;
4891 if (ImGui::Combo(label, &style_idx, "Auto\0Classic\0Dark\0Light\0"))
4892 {
4893 switch (style_idx)
4894 {
4895 case 0: StyleColorsAuto(); break;
4896 case 1: StyleColorsClassic(); break;
4897 case 2: StyleColorsDark(); break;
4898 case 3: StyleColorsLight(); break;
4899 }
4900 return true;
4901 }
4902 return false;
4903}
4904
4905bool ShowColormapSelector(const char* label) {
4906 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4907 bool set = false;
4908 if (ImGui::BeginCombo(label, gp.ColormapData.GetName(gp.Style.Colormap))) {
4909 for (int i = 0; i < gp.ColormapData.Count; ++i) {
4910 const char* name = gp.ColormapData.GetName(i);
4911 if (ImGui::Selectable(name, gp.Style.Colormap == i)) {
4912 gp.Style.Colormap = i;
4913 ImPlot::BustItemCache();
4914 set = true;
4915 }
4916 }
4917 ImGui::EndCombo();
4918 }
4919 return set;
4920}
4921
4922bool ShowInputMapSelector(const char* label) {
4923 static int map_idx = -1;
4924 if (ImGui::Combo(label, &map_idx, "Default\0Reversed\0"))
4925 {
4926 switch (map_idx)
4927 {
4928 case 0: MapInputDefault(); break;
4929 case 1: MapInputReverse(); break;
4930 }
4931 return true;
4932 }
4933 return false;
4934}
4935
4936
4937void ShowStyleEditor(ImPlotStyle* ref) {
4938 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
4939 ImPlotStyle& style = GetStyle();
4940 static ImPlotStyle ref_saved_style;
4941 // Default to using internal storage as reference
4942 static bool init = true;
4943 if (init && ref == nullptr)
4944 ref_saved_style = style;
4945 init = false;
4946 if (ref == nullptr)
4947 ref = &ref_saved_style;
4948
4949 if (ImPlot::ShowStyleSelector("Colors##Selector"))
4950 ref_saved_style = style;
4951
4952 // Save/Revert button
4953 if (ImGui::Button("Save Ref"))
4954 *ref = ref_saved_style = style;
4955 ImGui::SameLine();
4956 if (ImGui::Button("Revert Ref"))
4957 style = *ref;
4958 ImGui::SameLine();
4959 HelpMarker("Save/Revert in local non-persistent storage. Default Colors definition are not affected. "
4960 "Use \"Export\" below to save them somewhere.");
4961 if (ImGui::BeginTabBar("##StyleEditor")) {
4962 if (ImGui::BeginTabItem("Variables")) {
4963 ImGui::Text("Item Styling");
4964 ImGui::SliderFloat("LineWeight", &style.LineWeight, 0.0f, 5.0f, "%.1f");
4965 ImGui::SliderFloat("MarkerSize", &style.MarkerSize, 2.0f, 10.0f, "%.1f");
4966 ImGui::SliderFloat("MarkerWeight", &style.MarkerWeight, 0.0f, 5.0f, "%.1f");
4967 ImGui::SliderFloat("FillAlpha", &style.FillAlpha, 0.0f, 1.0f, "%.2f");
4968 ImGui::SliderFloat("ErrorBarSize", &style.ErrorBarSize, 0.0f, 10.0f, "%.1f");
4969 ImGui::SliderFloat("ErrorBarWeight", &style.ErrorBarWeight, 0.0f, 5.0f, "%.1f");
4970 ImGui::SliderFloat("DigitalBitHeight", &style.DigitalBitHeight, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.1f");
4971 ImGui::SliderFloat("DigitalBitGap", &style.DigitalBitGap, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.1f");
4972 ImGui::Text("Plot Styling");
4973 ImGui::SliderFloat("PlotBorderSize", &style.PlotBorderSize, 0.0f, 2.0f, "%.0f");
4974 ImGui::SliderFloat("MinorAlpha", &style.MinorAlpha, 0.0f, 1.0f, "%.2f");
4975 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MajorTickLen", (float*)&style.MajorTickLen, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.0f");
4976 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MinorTickLen", (float*)&style.MinorTickLen, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.0f");
4977 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MajorTickSize", (float*)&style.MajorTickSize, 0.0f, 2.0f, "%.1f");
4978 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MinorTickSize", (float*)&style.MinorTickSize, 0.0f, 2.0f, "%.1f");
4979 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MajorGridSize", (float*)&style.MajorGridSize, 0.0f, 2.0f, "%.1f");
4980 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MinorGridSize", (float*)&style.MinorGridSize, 0.0f, 2.0f, "%.1f");
4981 ImGui::SliderFloat2("PlotDefaultSize", (float*)&style.PlotDefaultSize, 0.0f, 1000, "%.0f");
4982 ImGui::SliderFloat2("PlotMinSize", (float*)&style.PlotMinSize, 0.0f, 300, "%.0f");
4983 ImGui::Text("Plot Padding");
4984 ImGui::SliderFloat2("PlotPadding", (float*)&style.PlotPadding, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.0f");
4985 ImGui::SliderFloat2("LabelPadding", (float*)&style.LabelPadding, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.0f");
4986 ImGui::SliderFloat2("LegendPadding", (float*)&style.LegendPadding, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.0f");
4987 ImGui::SliderFloat2("LegendInnerPadding", (float*)&style.LegendInnerPadding, 0.0f, 10.0f, "%.0f");
4988 ImGui::SliderFloat2("LegendSpacing", (float*)&style.LegendSpacing, 0.0f, 5.0f, "%.0f");
4989 ImGui::SliderFloat2("MousePosPadding", (float*)&style.MousePosPadding, 0.0f, 20.0f, "%.0f");
4990 ImGui::SliderFloat2("AnnotationPadding", (float*)&style.AnnotationPadding, 0.0f, 5.0f, "%.0f");
4991 ImGui::SliderFloat2("FitPadding", (float*)&style.FitPadding, 0, 0.2f, "%.2f");
4992
4993 ImGui::EndTabItem();
4994 }
4995 if (ImGui::BeginTabItem("Colors")) {
4996 static int output_dest = 0;
4997 static bool output_only_modified = false;
4998
4999 if (ImGui::Button("Export", ImVec2(75,0))) {
5000 if (output_dest == 0)
5001 ImGui::LogToClipboard();
5002 else
5003 ImGui::LogToTTY();
5004 ImGui::LogText("ImVec4* colors = ImPlot::GetStyle().Colors;\n");
5005 for (int i = 0; i < ImPlotCol_COUNT; i++) {
5006 const ImVec4& col = style.Colors[i];
5007 const char* name = ImPlot::GetStyleColorName(i);
5008 if (!output_only_modified || memcmp(&col, &ref->Colors[i], sizeof(ImVec4)) != 0) {
5009 if (IsColorAuto(i))
5010 ImGui::LogText("colors[ImPlotCol_%s]%*s= IMPLOT_AUTO_COL;\n",name,14 - (int)strlen(name), "");
5011 else
5012 ImGui::LogText("colors[ImPlotCol_%s]%*s= ImVec4(%.2ff, %.2ff, %.2ff, %.2ff);\n",
5013 name, 14 - (int)strlen(name), "", col.x, col.y, col.z, col.w);
5014 }
5015 }
5016 ImGui::LogFinish();
5017 }
5018 ImGui::SameLine(); ImGui::SetNextItemWidth(120); ImGui::Combo("##output_type", &output_dest, "To Clipboard\0To TTY\0");
5019 ImGui::SameLine(); ImGui::Checkbox("Only Modified Colors", &output_only_modified);
5020
5021 static ImGuiTextFilter filter;
5022 filter.Draw("Filter colors", ImGui::GetFontSize() * 16);
5023
5024 static ImGuiColorEditFlags alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreviewHalf;
5025#if IMGUI_VERSION_NUM < 19173
5026 if (ImGui::RadioButton("Opaque", alpha_flags == ImGuiColorEditFlags_None)) { alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_None; } ImGui::SameLine();
5027 if (ImGui::RadioButton("Alpha", alpha_flags == ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreview)) { alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreview; } ImGui::SameLine();
5028 if (ImGui::RadioButton("Both", alpha_flags == ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreviewHalf)) { alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreviewHalf; } ImGui::SameLine();
5029#else
5030 if (ImGui::RadioButton("Opaque", alpha_flags == ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaOpaque)) { alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaOpaque; } ImGui::SameLine();
5031 if (ImGui::RadioButton("Alpha", alpha_flags == ImGuiColorEditFlags_None)) { alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_None; } ImGui::SameLine();
5032 if (ImGui::RadioButton("Both", alpha_flags == ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreviewHalf)) { alpha_flags = ImGuiColorEditFlags_AlphaPreviewHalf; } ImGui::SameLine();
5033#endif
5034 HelpMarker(
5035 "In the color list:\n"
5036 "Left-click on colored square to open color picker,\n"
5037 "Right-click to open edit options menu.");
5038 ImGui::Separator();
5039 ImGui::PushItemWidth(-160);
5040 for (int i = 0; i < ImPlotCol_COUNT; i++) {
5041 const char* name = ImPlot::GetStyleColorName(i);
5042 if (!filter.PassFilter(name))
5043 continue;
5044 ImGui::PushID(i);
5045 ImVec4 temp = GetStyleColorVec4(i);
5046 const bool is_auto = IsColorAuto(i);
5047 if (!is_auto)
5048 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_Alpha, 0.25f);
5049 if (ImGui::Button("Auto")) {
5050 if (is_auto)
5051 style.Colors[i] = temp;
5052 else
5053 style.Colors[i] = IMPLOT_AUTO_COL;
5054 BustItemCache();
5055 }
5056 if (!is_auto)
5057 ImGui::PopStyleVar();
5058 ImGui::SameLine();
5059 if (ImGui::ColorEdit4(name, &temp.x, ImGuiColorEditFlags_NoInputs | alpha_flags)) {
5060 style.Colors[i] = temp;
5061 BustItemCache();
5062 }
5063 if (memcmp(&style.Colors[i], &ref->Colors[i], sizeof(ImVec4)) != 0) {
5064 ImGui::SameLine(175); if (ImGui::Button("Save")) { ref->Colors[i] = style.Colors[i]; }
5065 ImGui::SameLine(); if (ImGui::Button("Revert")) {
5066 style.Colors[i] = ref->Colors[i];
5067 BustItemCache();
5068 }
5069 }
5070 ImGui::PopID();
5071 }
5072 ImGui::PopItemWidth();
5073 ImGui::Separator();
5074 ImGui::Text("Colors that are set to Auto (i.e. IMPLOT_AUTO_COL) will\n"
5075 "be automatically deduced from your ImGui style or the\n"
5076 "current ImPlot Colormap. If you want to style individual\n"
5077 "plot items, use Push/PopStyleColor around its function.");
5078 ImGui::EndTabItem();
5079 }
5080 if (ImGui::BeginTabItem("Colormaps")) {
5081 static int output_dest = 0;
5082 if (ImGui::Button("Export", ImVec2(75,0))) {
5083 if (output_dest == 0)
5084 ImGui::LogToClipboard();
5085 else
5086 ImGui::LogToTTY();
5087 int size = GetColormapSize();
5088 const char* name = GetColormapName(gp.Style.Colormap);
5089 ImGui::LogText("static const ImU32 %s_Data[%d] = {\n", name, size);
5090 for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {
5091 ImU32 col = GetColormapColorU32(i,gp.Style.Colormap);
5092 ImGui::LogText(" %u%s\n", col, i == size - 1 ? "" : ",");
5093 }
5094 ImGui::LogText("};\nImPlotColormap %s = ImPlot::AddColormap(\"%s\", %s_Data, %d);", name, name, name, size);
5095 ImGui::LogFinish();
5096 }
5097 ImGui::SameLine(); ImGui::SetNextItemWidth(120); ImGui::Combo("##output_type", &output_dest, "To Clipboard\0To TTY\0");
5098 ImGui::SameLine();
5099 static bool edit = false;
5100 ImGui::Checkbox("Edit Mode",&edit);
5101
5102 // built-in/added
5103 ImGui::Separator();
5104 for (int i = 0; i < gp.ColormapData.Count; ++i) {
5105 ImGui::PushID(i);
5106 int size = gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(i);
5107 bool selected = i == gp.Style.Colormap;
5108
5109 const char* name = GetColormapName(i);
5110 if (!selected)
5111 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_Alpha, 0.25f);
5112 if (ImGui::Button(name, ImVec2(100,0))) {
5113 gp.Style.Colormap = i;
5114 BustItemCache();
5115 }
5116 if (!selected)
5117 ImGui::PopStyleVar();
5118 ImGui::SameLine();
5119 ImGui::BeginGroup();
5120 if (edit) {
5121 for (int c = 0; c < size; ++c) {
5122 ImGui::PushID(c);
5123 ImVec4 col4 = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(gp.ColormapData.GetKeyColor(i,c));
5124 if (ImGui::ColorEdit4("",&col4.x,ImGuiColorEditFlags_NoInputs)) {
5125 ImU32 col32 = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(col4);
5126 gp.ColormapData.SetKeyColor(i,c,col32);
5127 BustItemCache();
5128 }
5129 if ((c + 1) % 12 != 0 && c != size -1)
5130 ImGui::SameLine();
5131 ImGui::PopID();
5132 }
5133 }
5134 else {
5135 if (ImPlot::ColormapButton("##",ImVec2(-1,0),i))
5136 edit = true;
5137 }
5138 ImGui::EndGroup();
5139 ImGui::PopID();
5140 }
5141
5142
5143 static ImVector<ImVec4> custom;
5144 if (custom.Size == 0) {
5145 custom.push_back(ImVec4(1,0,0,1));
5146 custom.push_back(ImVec4(0,1,0,1));
5147 custom.push_back(ImVec4(0,0,1,1));
5148 }
5149 ImGui::Separator();
5150 ImGui::BeginGroup();
5151 static char name[16] = "MyColormap";
5152
5153
5154 if (ImGui::Button("+", ImVec2((100 - ImGui::GetStyle().ItemSpacing.x)/2,0)))
5155 custom.push_back(ImVec4(0,0,0,1));
5156 ImGui::SameLine();
5157 if (ImGui::Button("-", ImVec2((100 - ImGui::GetStyle().ItemSpacing.x)/2,0)) && custom.Size > 2)
5158 custom.pop_back();
5159 ImGui::SetNextItemWidth(100);
5160 ImGui::InputText("##Name",name,16,ImGuiInputTextFlags_CharsNoBlank);
5161 static bool qual = true;
5162 ImGui::Checkbox("Qualitative",&qual);
5163 if (ImGui::Button("Add", ImVec2(100, 0)) && gp.ColormapData.GetIndex(name)==-1)
5164 AddColormap(name,custom.Data,custom.Size,qual);
5165
5166 ImGui::EndGroup();
5167 ImGui::SameLine();
5168 ImGui::BeginGroup();
5169 for (int c = 0; c < custom.Size; ++c) {
5170 ImGui::PushID(c);
5171 if (ImGui::ColorEdit4("##Col1", &custom[c].x, ImGuiColorEditFlags_NoInputs)) {
5172
5173 }
5174 if ((c + 1) % 12 != 0)
5175 ImGui::SameLine();
5176 ImGui::PopID();
5177 }
5178 ImGui::EndGroup();
5179
5180
5181 ImGui::EndTabItem();
5182 }
5183 ImGui::EndTabBar();
5184 }
5185}
5186
5187void ShowUserGuide() {
5188 ImGui::BulletText("Left-click drag within the plot area to pan X and Y axes.");
5189 ImGui::Indent();
5190 ImGui::BulletText("Left-click drag on axis labels to pan an individual axis.");
5191 ImGui::Unindent();
5192 ImGui::BulletText("Scroll in the plot area to zoom both X and Y axes.");
5193 ImGui::Indent();
5194 ImGui::BulletText("Scroll on axis labels to zoom an individual axis.");
5195 ImGui::Unindent();
5196 ImGui::BulletText("Right-click drag to box select data.");
5197 ImGui::Indent();
5198 ImGui::BulletText("Hold Alt to expand box selection horizontally.");
5199 ImGui::BulletText("Hold Shift to expand box selection vertically.");
5200 ImGui::BulletText("Left-click while box selecting to cancel the selection.");
5201 ImGui::Unindent();
5202 ImGui::BulletText("Double left-click to fit all visible data.");
5203 ImGui::Indent();
5204 ImGui::BulletText("Double left-click axis labels to fit the individual axis.");
5205 ImGui::Unindent();
5206 ImGui::BulletText("Right-click open the full plot context menu.");
5207 ImGui::Indent();
5208 ImGui::BulletText("Right-click axis labels to open an individual axis context menu.");
5209 ImGui::Unindent();
5210 ImGui::BulletText("Click legend label icons to show/hide plot items.");
5211}
5212
5213void ShowTicksMetrics(const ImPlotTicker& ticker) {
5214 ImGui::BulletText("Size: %d", ticker.TickCount());
5215 ImGui::BulletText("MaxSize: [%f,%f]", ticker.MaxSize.x, ticker.MaxSize.y);
5216}
5217
5218void ShowAxisMetrics(const ImPlotPlot& plot, const ImPlotAxis& axis) {
5219 ImGui::BulletText("Label: %s", axis.LabelOffset == -1 ? "[none]" : plot.GetAxisLabel(axis));
5220 ImGui::BulletText("Flags: 0x%08X", axis.Flags);
5221 ImGui::BulletText("Range: [%f,%f]",axis.Range.Min, axis.Range.Max);
5222 ImGui::BulletText("Pixels: %f", axis.PixelSize());
5223 ImGui::BulletText("Aspect: %f", axis.GetAspect());
5224 ImGui::BulletText(axis.OrthoAxis == nullptr ? "OrthoAxis: NULL" : "OrthoAxis: 0x%08X", axis.OrthoAxis->ID);
5225 ImGui::BulletText("LinkedMin: %p", (void*)axis.LinkedMin);
5226 ImGui::BulletText("LinkedMax: %p", (void*)axis.LinkedMax);
5227 ImGui::BulletText("HasRange: %s", axis.HasRange ? "true" : "false");
5228 ImGui::BulletText("Hovered: %s", axis.Hovered ? "true" : "false");
5229 ImGui::BulletText("Held: %s", axis.Held ? "true" : "false");
5230
5231 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Transform")) {
5232 ImGui::BulletText("PixelMin: %f", axis.PixelMin);
5233 ImGui::BulletText("PixelMax: %f", axis.PixelMax);
5234 ImGui::BulletText("ScaleToPixel: %f", axis.ScaleToPixel);
5235 ImGui::BulletText("ScaleMax: %f", axis.ScaleMax);
5236 ImGui::TreePop();
5237 }
5238
5239 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Ticks")) {
5240 ShowTicksMetrics(axis.Ticker);
5241 ImGui::TreePop();
5242 }
5243}
5244
5245void ShowMetricsWindow(bool* p_popen) {
5246
5247 static bool show_plot_rects = false;
5248 static bool show_axes_rects = false;
5249 static bool show_axis_rects = false;
5250 static bool show_canvas_rects = false;
5251 static bool show_frame_rects = false;
5252 static bool show_subplot_frame_rects = false;
5253 static bool show_subplot_grid_rects = false;
5254 static bool show_legend_rects = false;
5255
5256 ImDrawList& fg = *ImGui::GetForegroundDrawList();
5257
5258 ImPlotContext& gp = *GImPlot;
5259 // ImGuiContext& g = *GImGui;
5260 ImGuiIO& io = ImGui::GetIO();
5261 ImGui::Begin("ImPlot Metrics", p_popen);
5262 ImGui::Text("ImPlot " IMPLOT_VERSION);
5263 ImGui::Text("Application average %.3f ms/frame (%.1f FPS)", 1000.0f / io.Framerate, io.Framerate);
5264 ImGui::Text("Mouse Position: [%.0f,%.0f]", io.MousePos.x, io.MousePos.y);
5265 ImGui::Separator();
5266 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Tools")) {
5267 if (ImGui::Button("Bust Plot Cache"))
5268 BustPlotCache();
5269 ImGui::SameLine();
5270 if (ImGui::Button("Bust Item Cache"))
5271 BustItemCache();
5272 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Frame Rects", &show_frame_rects);
5273 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Canvas Rects",&show_canvas_rects);
5274 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Plot Rects", &show_plot_rects);
5275 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Axes Rects", &show_axes_rects);
5276 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Axis Rects", &show_axis_rects);
5277 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Subplot Frame Rects", &show_subplot_frame_rects);
5278 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Subplot Grid Rects", &show_subplot_grid_rects);
5279 ImGui::Checkbox("Show Legend Rects", &show_legend_rects);
5280 ImGui::TreePop();
5281 }
5282 const int n_plots = gp.Plots.GetBufSize();
5283 const int n_subplots = gp.Subplots.GetBufSize();
5284 // render rects
5285 for (int p = 0; p < n_plots; ++p) {
5286 ImPlotPlot* plot = gp.Plots.GetByIndex(p);
5287 if (show_frame_rects)
5288 fg.AddRect(plot->FrameRect.Min, plot->FrameRect.Max, IM_COL32(255,0,255,255));
5289 if (show_canvas_rects)
5290 fg.AddRect(plot->CanvasRect.Min, plot->CanvasRect.Max, IM_COL32(0,255,255,255));
5291 if (show_plot_rects)
5292 fg.AddRect(plot->PlotRect.Min, plot->PlotRect.Max, IM_COL32(255,255,0,255));
5293 if (show_axes_rects)
5294 fg.AddRect(plot->AxesRect.Min, plot->AxesRect.Max, IM_COL32(0,255,128,255));
5295 if (show_axis_rects) {
5296 for (int i = 0; i < ImAxis_COUNT; ++i) {
5297 if (plot->Axes[i].Enabled)
5298 fg.AddRect(plot->Axes[i].HoverRect.Min, plot->Axes[i].HoverRect.Max, IM_COL32(0,255,0,255));
5299 }
5300 }
5301 if (show_legend_rects && plot->Items.GetLegendCount() > 0) {
5302 fg.AddRect(plot->Items.Legend.Rect.Min, plot->Items.Legend.Rect.Max, IM_COL32(255,192,0,255));
5303 fg.AddRect(plot->Items.Legend.RectClamped.Min, plot->Items.Legend.RectClamped.Max, IM_COL32(255,128,0,255));
5304 }
5305 }
5306 for (int p = 0; p < n_subplots; ++p) {
5307 ImPlotSubplot* subplot = gp.Subplots.GetByIndex(p);
5308 if (show_subplot_frame_rects)
5309 fg.AddRect(subplot->FrameRect.Min, subplot->FrameRect.Max, IM_COL32(255,0,0,255));
5310 if (show_subplot_grid_rects)
5311 fg.AddRect(subplot->GridRect.Min, subplot->GridRect.Max, IM_COL32(0,0,255,255));
5312 if (show_legend_rects && subplot->Items.GetLegendCount() > 0) {
5313 fg.AddRect(subplot->Items.Legend.Rect.Min, subplot->Items.Legend.Rect.Max, IM_COL32(255,192,0,255));
5314 fg.AddRect(subplot->Items.Legend.RectClamped.Min, subplot->Items.Legend.RectClamped.Max, IM_COL32(255,128,0,255));
5315 }
5316 }
5317 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Plots","Plots (%d)", n_plots)) {
5318 for (int p = 0; p < n_plots; ++p) {
5319 // plot
5320 ImPlotPlot& plot = *gp.Plots.GetByIndex(p);
5321 ImGui::PushID(p);
5322 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Plot", "Plot [0x%08X]", plot.ID)) {
5323 int n_items = plot.Items.GetItemCount();
5324 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Items", "Items (%d)", n_items)) {
5325 for (int i = 0; i < n_items; ++i) {
5326 ImPlotItem* item = plot.Items.GetItemByIndex(i);
5327 ImGui::PushID(i);
5328 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Item", "Item [0x%08X]", item->ID)) {
5329 ImGui::Bullet(); ImGui::Checkbox("Show", &item->Show);
5330 ImGui::Bullet();
5331 ImVec4 temp = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(item->Color);
5332 if (ImGui::ColorEdit4("Color",&temp.x, ImGuiColorEditFlags_NoInputs))
5333 item->Color = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(temp);
5334
5335 ImGui::BulletText("NameOffset: %d",item->NameOffset);
5336 ImGui::BulletText("Name: %s", item->NameOffset != -1 ? plot.Items.Legend.Labels.Buf.Data + item->NameOffset : "N/A");
5337 ImGui::BulletText("Hovered: %s",item->LegendHovered ? "true" : "false");
5338 ImGui::TreePop();
5339 }
5340 ImGui::PopID();
5341 }
5342 ImGui::TreePop();
5343 }
5344 char buff[16];
5345 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_X_AXES; ++i) {
5346 ImFormatString(buff,16,"X-Axis %d", i+1);
5347 if (plot.XAxis(i).Enabled && ImGui::TreeNode(buff, "X-Axis %d [0x%08X]", i+1, plot.XAxis(i).ID)) {
5348 ShowAxisMetrics(plot, plot.XAxis(i));
5349 ImGui::TreePop();
5350 }
5351 }
5352 for (int i = 0; i < IMPLOT_NUM_Y_AXES; ++i) {
5353 ImFormatString(buff,16,"Y-Axis %d", i+1);
5354 if (plot.YAxis(i).Enabled && ImGui::TreeNode(buff, "Y-Axis %d [0x%08X]", i+1, plot.YAxis(i).ID)) {
5355 ShowAxisMetrics(plot, plot.YAxis(i));
5356 ImGui::TreePop();
5357 }
5358 }
5359 ImGui::BulletText("Title: %s", plot.HasTitle() ? plot.GetTitle() : "none");
5360 ImGui::BulletText("Flags: 0x%08X", plot.Flags);
5361 ImGui::BulletText("Initialized: %s", plot.Initialized ? "true" : "false");
5362 ImGui::BulletText("Selecting: %s", plot.Selecting ? "true" : "false");
5363 ImGui::BulletText("Selected: %s", plot.Selected ? "true" : "false");
5364 ImGui::BulletText("Hovered: %s", plot.Hovered ? "true" : "false");
5365 ImGui::BulletText("Held: %s", plot.Held ? "true" : "false");
5366 ImGui::BulletText("LegendHovered: %s", plot.Items.Legend.Hovered ? "true" : "false");
5367 ImGui::BulletText("ContextLocked: %s", plot.ContextLocked ? "true" : "false");
5368 ImGui::TreePop();
5369 }
5370 ImGui::PopID();
5371 }
5372 ImGui::TreePop();
5373 }
5374
5375 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Subplots","Subplots (%d)", n_subplots)) {
5376 for (int p = 0; p < n_subplots; ++p) {
5377 // plot
5378 ImPlotSubplot& plot = *gp.Subplots.GetByIndex(p);
5379 ImGui::PushID(p);
5380 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Subplot", "Subplot [0x%08X]", plot.ID)) {
5381 int n_items = plot.Items.GetItemCount();
5382 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Items", "Items (%d)", n_items)) {
5383 for (int i = 0; i < n_items; ++i) {
5384 ImPlotItem* item = plot.Items.GetItemByIndex(i);
5385 ImGui::PushID(i);
5386 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Item", "Item [0x%08X]", item->ID)) {
5387 ImGui::Bullet(); ImGui::Checkbox("Show", &item->Show);
5388 ImGui::Bullet();
5389 ImVec4 temp = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(item->Color);
5390 if (ImGui::ColorEdit4("Color",&temp.x, ImGuiColorEditFlags_NoInputs))
5391 item->Color = ImGui::ColorConvertFloat4ToU32(temp);
5392
5393 ImGui::BulletText("NameOffset: %d",item->NameOffset);
5394 ImGui::BulletText("Name: %s", item->NameOffset != -1 ? plot.Items.Legend.Labels.Buf.Data + item->NameOffset : "N/A");
5395 ImGui::BulletText("Hovered: %s",item->LegendHovered ? "true" : "false");
5396 ImGui::TreePop();
5397 }
5398 ImGui::PopID();
5399 }
5400 ImGui::TreePop();
5401 }
5402 ImGui::BulletText("Flags: 0x%08X", plot.Flags);
5403 ImGui::BulletText("FrameHovered: %s", plot.FrameHovered ? "true" : "false");
5404 ImGui::BulletText("LegendHovered: %s", plot.Items.Legend.Hovered ? "true" : "false");
5405 ImGui::TreePop();
5406 }
5407 ImGui::PopID();
5408 }
5409 ImGui::TreePop();
5410 }
5411 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Colormaps")) {
5412 ImGui::BulletText("Colormaps: %d", gp.ColormapData.Count);
5413 ImGui::BulletText("Memory: %d bytes", gp.ColormapData.Tables.Size * 4);
5414 if (ImGui::TreeNode("Data")) {
5415 for (int m = 0; m < gp.ColormapData.Count; ++m) {
5416 if (ImGui::TreeNode(gp.ColormapData.GetName(m))) {
5417 int count = gp.ColormapData.GetKeyCount(m);
5418 int size = gp.ColormapData.GetTableSize(m);
5419 bool qual = gp.ColormapData.IsQual(m);
5420 ImGui::BulletText("Qualitative: %s", qual ? "true" : "false");
5421 ImGui::BulletText("Key Count: %d", count);
5422 ImGui::BulletText("Table Size: %d", size);
5423 ImGui::Indent();
5424
5425 static float t = 0.5;
5426 ImVec4 samp;
5427 float wid = 32 * 10 - ImGui::GetFrameHeight() - ImGui::GetStyle().ItemSpacing.x;
5428 ImGui::SetNextItemWidth(wid);
5429 ImPlot::ColormapSlider("##Sample",&t,&samp,"%.3f",m);
5430 ImGui::SameLine();
5431 ImGui::ColorButton("Sampler",samp);
5432 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_FrameBg, ImVec4(0,0,0,0));
5433 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_ItemSpacing, ImVec2(0,0));
5434 for (int c = 0; c < size; ++c) {
5435 ImVec4 col = ImGui::ColorConvertU32ToFloat4(gp.ColormapData.GetTableColor(m,c));
5436 ImGui::PushID(m*1000+c);
5437 ImGui::ColorButton("",col,0,ImVec2(10,10));
5438 ImGui::PopID();
5439 if ((c + 1) % 32 != 0 && c != size - 1)
5440 ImGui::SameLine();
5441 }
5442 ImGui::PopStyleVar();
5443 ImGui::PopStyleColor();
5444 ImGui::Unindent();
5445 ImGui::TreePop();
5446 }
5447 }
5448 ImGui::TreePop();
5449 }
5450 ImGui::TreePop();
5451 }
5452 ImGui::End();
5453}
5454
5455bool ShowDatePicker(const char* id, int* level, ImPlotTime* t, const ImPlotTime* t1, const ImPlotTime* t2) {
5456
5457 ImGui::PushID(id);
5458 ImGui::BeginGroup();
5459
5460 ImGuiStyle& style = ImGui::GetStyle();
5461 ImVec4 col_txt = style.Colors[ImGuiCol_Text];
5462 ImVec4 col_dis = style.Colors[ImGuiCol_TextDisabled];
5463 ImVec4 col_btn = style.Colors[ImGuiCol_Button];
5464 ImGui::PushStyleColor(ImGuiCol_Button, ImVec4(0,0,0,0));
5465 ImGui::PushStyleVar(ImGuiStyleVar_ItemSpacing, ImVec2(0,0));
5466
5467 const float ht = ImGui::GetFrameHeight();
5468 ImVec2 cell_size(ht*1.25f,ht);
5469 char buff[32];
5470 bool clk = false;
5471 tm& Tm = GImPlot->Tm;
5472
5473 const int min_yr = 1970;
5474 const int max_yr = 2999;
5475
5476 // t1 parts
5477 int t1_mo = 0; int t1_md = 0; int t1_yr = 0;
5478 if (t1 != nullptr) {
5479 GetTime(*t1,&Tm);
5480 t1_mo = Tm.tm_mon;
5481 t1_md = Tm.tm_mday;
5482 t1_yr = Tm.tm_year + 1900;
5483 }
5484
5485 // t2 parts
5486 int t2_mo = 0; int t2_md = 0; int t2_yr = 0;
5487 if (t2 != nullptr) {
5488 GetTime(*t2,&Tm);
5489 t2_mo = Tm.tm_mon;
5490 t2_md = Tm.tm_mday;
5491 t2_yr = Tm.tm_year + 1900;
5492 }
5493
5494 // day widget
5495 if (*level == 0) {
5496 *t = FloorTime(*t, ImPlotTimeUnit_Day);
5497 GetTime(*t, &Tm);
5498 const int this_year = Tm.tm_year + 1900;
5499 const int last_year = this_year - 1;
5500 const int next_year = this_year + 1;
5501 const int this_mon = Tm.tm_mon;
5502 const int last_mon = this_mon == 0 ? 11 : this_mon - 1;
5503 const int next_mon = this_mon == 11 ? 0 : this_mon + 1;
5504 const int days_this_mo = GetDaysInMonth(this_year, this_mon);
5505 const int days_last_mo = GetDaysInMonth(this_mon == 0 ? last_year : this_year, last_mon);
5506 ImPlotTime t_first_mo = FloorTime(*t,ImPlotTimeUnit_Mo);
5507 GetTime(t_first_mo,&Tm);
5508 const int first_wd = Tm.tm_wday;
5509 // month year
5510 ImFormatString(buff, 32, "%s %d", MONTH_NAMES[this_mon], this_year);
5511 if (ImGui::Button(buff))
5512 *level = 1;
5513 ImGui::SameLine(5*cell_size.x);
5514 BeginDisabledControls(this_year <= min_yr && this_mon == 0);
5515 if (ImGui::ArrowButtonEx("##Up",ImGuiDir_Up,cell_size))
5516 *t = AddTime(*t, ImPlotTimeUnit_Mo, -1);
